name: Mark Warner
subject: Anti-abortion groups are spending millions in these final days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If we don’t fight back, we risk losing Virginia’s status as a haven for reproductive rights

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857200/436604410/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU3Zjk3MC0zNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qQIiX9EyPMx18A0qxlhJIjuMhPqb2VaCHFNdo3pzOU=&emci=6927540e-747a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=9ae7f970-377c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We’re now just two days away from Election Day in Virginia, and Republicans have made one goal very clear: If they take control of the General Assembly, they’re planning to pass a ban on abortion that would end Virginia’s status as a haven for reproductive rights in the south. To that end, a PAC promoting anti-choice candidates is spending _more than $1.5 million_ to prop up Republican General Assembly candidates in Virginia. These races are going to be tight, and control of the General Assembly could come down to just a few votes. The money being spent by anti-choice PACs could be the difference between a Republican-controlled legislature and a state where health care choices are still made by people and their doctors. __[**We’re running out of time to make a difference and fight back against groups like these, and we need to hit our $14,000 goal before Election Day on Tuesday. Please, chip in right now to help us win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857201/436604412/321414868?refcode=mw_em_231105_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU3Zjk3MC0zNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qQIiX9EyPMx18A0qxlhJIjuMhPqb2VaCHFNdo3pzOU=)__ Reproductive health care isn’t the only thing at stake on Tuesday. If candidates supported by these groups head to victory thanks to big spending like this, we could see additional voter suppression laws and gun safety rollbacks almost immediately. We truly cannot afford a Republican-controlled General Assembly. Right now, it’s a real possibility. But if we step up and fight back against these outside groups, we can turn the tide. __[**We’ll need to dig deep in these final days before Election Day. I’m hoping you can help – will you chip in anything you can before Tuesday to help us meet our $14,000 goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857202/436604413/321414868?refcode=mw_em_231105_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU3Zjk3MC0zNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qQIiX9EyPMx18A0qxlhJIjuMhPqb2VaCHFNdo3pzOU=)__ Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857203/436604416/321414868?refcode=mw_em_231105_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU3Zjk3MC0zNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qQIiX9EyPMx18A0qxlhJIjuMhPqb2VaCHFNdo3pzOU=)********

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: I am writing to ask you to rush a $3 contribution to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party before Tuesday's elections. Many of the judges who will determine the outcome of the 2024 election are on the ballot.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Republicans realize how important these races are to 2024.

Friends -
I am writing today asking you to rush an urgent contribution directly to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party before Tuesday's elections.
With Republican efforts to overturn the 2020 election in the courts and otherwise, these races for state Supreme Court, Superior Court and more are in many ways the first elections of the 2024 presidential race... and in one of the most important states possible.
If that's all you need to hear, please rush your donation to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party today:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/PA-Dems**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-padems?refcode=em231106-1-D&refcode2=1653_4767699_WLi06R&akid=1653%2E4767699%2EWLi06R)
Here's the truth:
Pennsylvania is one of the most important races in the 2024 presidential election. Not only that, but there's a contested Senate race there, as well.
In 2020, Pennsylvania was the only state where a court case was decided in Trump's favor. It was in the Commonwealth Court, one of the many races on Tuesday.
Republicans realize how important these races are to 2024. That is why they are already gearing up for recounts and challenges.
So the Pennsylvania Democrats reached out for help, and I think it's important that we do.
[**Can you please rush a $3 contribution directly to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party today? They are expecting Republican challenges to many election results on Tuesday, elections that may have a role in determining the next presidential race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-padems?refcode=em231106-1-D&refcode2=1653_4767699_WLi06R&akid=1653%2E4767699%2EWLi06R)

Friend, so much is at stake in the 2024 elections.
If Republicans regain power, they'll spend every day blocking progress and pushing their extremist agenda. They'll launch new attacks against our reproductive rights. They'll undermine our elections and our democratic institutions. They'll fight for tax cuts for their wealthiest donors while leaving working families to pick up the tab.
The presidency, the Senate and the House are all up for grabs — and Republican megadonors are working overtime to buy control of Washington. With the GOP's agenda moving further to the right every single day, we cannot let them win.
**The only way to stop them is with an unprecedented voter turnout at the polls. But we still don't know if you're planning to vote in 2024.[_Please, will you sign your name and commit before midnight?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857601/436607659/-1267551873?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4568-su-nd&refcode=jtk4568-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2U3Y2MyMy0zODdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2qVDKsqJKZOU2vq4gV88KKRuxj7LqvWfgjr04rTdMo=&emci=17df1b51-417a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=1ce7cc23-387c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

If Republicans regain power, they'll spend every day blocking progress and pushing their extremist agenda. They'll launch new attacks against our reproductive rights. They'll undermine our elections and our democratic institutions. They'll fight for tax cuts for their wealthiest donors while leaving working families to pick up the tab. The presidency, the Senate and the House are all up for grabs — and Republican megadonors are working overtime to buy control of Washington. With the GOP's agenda moving further to the right every single day, we cannot let them win. The only way to stop them is with an unprecedented voter turnout at the polls. But we still don't know if you're planning to vote in 2024. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

And what’s more, President Trump has instructed our team to ship YOU your very own set of Trump 2024 Bumper Stickers for FREE. Special Promotion Only Valid Through 11:59 P.M. This is not an ordinary election. This is an election to determine if America is still a Republic where you have the power and the right to vote for the leaders, the future, and the country YOU want... ...Or, if we have become no different from those Banana Republics where the dictator holds an “election” and magically receives 99.9% of the vote. If Crooked Joe and the Democrats realize that they can weaponize the legal system to completely avoid a real election, then they will not stop there. This will go on forever and ever – and America will NEVER have a genuine election again. subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56498?t=6&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56498?t=7&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56498?t=8&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56498?t=9&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56498?t=10&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11664%2E878179%2EuAbI9X)

body:
We’re in a bit of a tight spot. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72858035/436624154/17860314?refcode=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjM0YzZkNzMtM2Q3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5pIFmggBm4yKi6ttOy_9nJWjTVwtjvRobWBA4yb9WQQ=)

Look, Peter — I’ve got good news and bad news. The good news: _Cook Political Report_ just shifted this race in our favor — AND brand new polling shows this race in a DEAD HEAT. With just 2 days left in this race, we have a clear path to victory. **The bad news: we have a major gap between our fundraising projections and our campaign budget through Election Day. If we don’t raise $50,000 by tomorrow night, we’re going to have to look at budget cuts for Tuesday.** [Can I count on you to help us close that gap, Peter? With Election Day almost here, your $25 contribution is more important than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72858036/436624155/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjM0YzZkNzMtM2Q3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5pIFmggBm4yKi6ttOy_9nJWjTVwtjvRobWBA4yb9WQQ=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72858037/436624156/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjM0YzZkNzMtM2Q3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5pIFmggBm4yKi6ttOy_9nJWjTVwtjvRobWBA4yb9WQQ=)**
---
I’m not going to lie, we are in a tight spot. Cutting back on operations right now means fewer volunteer materials and mobilization tools right when we need them most — we’d have to drastically cut back the number of voters that we’re talking to.
In a race this competitive, that could be the difference between winning and losing.
Tate Reeves is pulling out all the stops to win this race. He and his good ole boy donor network are spending millions of dollars to lie about Brandon’s record everywhere they can. We’ve managed to go toe-to-toe with them, but are in serious danger of being overwhelmed if we don’t close this gap.
[That’s why I’m asking again: Will you chip in $25 right now to help elect Brandon Presley the next governor of Mississippi? Any amount makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72858038/436624157/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f34c6d73-3d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjM0YzZkNzMtM2Q3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5pIFmggBm4yKi6ttOy_9nJWjTVwtjvRobWBA4yb9WQQ=)
Thanks for your help,
Isaac Lampner
Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Governor

clean_body: We’re in a bit of a tight spot. | = Look, Peter — I’ve got good news and bad news. The good news: Cook Political Report just shifted this race in our favor — AND brand new polling shows this race in a DEAD HEAT. With just 2 days left in this race, we have a clear path to victory. The bad news: we have a major gap between our fundraising projections and our campaign budget through Election Day. If we don’t raise $50,000 by tomorrow night, we’re going to have to look at budget cuts for Tuesday. = | = I’m not going to lie, we are in a tight spot. Cutting back on operations right now means fewer volunteer materials and mobilization tools right when we need them most — we’d have to drastically cut back the number of voters that we’re talking to. In a race this competitive, that could be the difference between winning and losing. Tate Reeves is pulling out all the stops to win this race. He and his good ole boy donor network are spending millions of dollars to lie about Brandon’s record everywhere they can. We’ve managed to go toe-to-toe with them, but are in serious danger of being overwhelmed if we don’t close this gap. = Thanks for your help, Isaac Lampner Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Governor | | = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72859100/436640595/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjkyNzViNi00NDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xybrrX6WtTTTt0tAhVumPkD3sm-IKYYN_EzSiVyHxwg=&emci=8482cdfe-3b7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6f9275b6-447c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter,

I have a quick update on what’s going on at the Democratic Party of Georgia.

The 2024 election cycle is already here – we’re one year away from Election Day 2024! At this point next year, we’ll be watching the results come in. What does that mean for Georgia? It means we have a LOT of work to do, y’all.

In 2020, Georgia was the closest state in the entire country. In fact, Joe Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast – **_just 11,779 votes._** And the reality is, **in 2024, it could be even closer.**

That means we need to get to work _**yesterday,_** y’all. We need to build the team of organizers that will keep Georgia blue. We need to strengthen our infrastructure across the state to support our candidates up and down the ballot. We need to engage our grassroots coalitions in Macon, Savannah, Augusta, Albany, Columbus, Atlanta, and every corner of the state.

[**_And that means we need YOUR help. Please, we can’t do this without a massive grassroots team. So I’m asking you one year out from the 2024 elections to pitch in whatever amount you can. Anything you can do will go a LONG way toward funding the critical work the Democratic Party of Georgia does to keep our state blue._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72859101/436640596/710125701?refcode=20231105.3_NW_11N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjkyNzViNi00NDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xybrrX6WtTTTt0tAhVumPkD3sm-IKYYN_EzSiVyHxwg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I have a quick update on what’s going on at the Democratic Party of Georgia. The 2024 election cycle is already here – we’re one year away from Election Day 2024! At this point next year, we’ll be watching the results come in. What does that mean for Georgia? It means we have a LOT of work to do, y’all. In 2020, Georgia was the closest state in the entire country. In fact, Joe Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast – just 11,779 votes. And the reality is, in 2024, it could be even closer. That means we need to get to work yesterday, y’all. We need to build the team of organizers that will keep Georgia blue. We need to strengthen our infrastructure across the state to support our candidates up and down the ballot. We need to engage our grassroots coalitions in Macon, Savannah, Augusta, Albany, Columbus, Atlanta, and every corner of the state. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = And as Chair of the DPG, I’ve got to make one more ask of you. = Recurring donations are the lifeblood of our funding. People committing even just $5 every month ensures that we can count on sustained fundraising every single month until Election Day. It means we can budget out months in advance knowing that we’ve got your support. This is Eric Underwood, Chairman for the NEGOP. I believe in the people of Nebraska and I believe in YOU. This message is for you! I know you SUPPORT the objectives of the Party. I know you desire to defend our Platform. Because of you...we WILL be successful.

The financial reality is that we must _**raise an additional $21,000 within the next 30 days to continue state party campaign operations.**_

| Peter, the NEGOP is funded by hard-working patriots like **__YOU__**. Your dollars are used for operations and resources, NOT direct contributions to elected officials. Let me REPEAT, we fund the resources of the Republican Party, YOU, the leaders of the Republican party, determine your elected representatives by recruiting Constitutional and Platform Republicans. This is the NEW NEGOP and you are the NEW leaders of change. **For this grassroots movement to continue, for the NEGOP to stand for OUR VALUES, we need you and every person receiving this message to contribute $25 today. **

Remember, this is a _**true grassroots party**_. We are funded by the people of Nebraska and their **generous donations. **

**Your support is vital in this endeavor, and we will continue this GO FUND NEGOP campaign until we have achieved the TOTAL $35,000 goal. ** There are many different ways to help **_TODAY:_**
* Contribute $25 ([_CLICK HERE TO SEND YOUR DONATION_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=490cbc839a&e=25844e23a8))
* If you’ve already donated, consider doubling or tripling your contribution.
* Become an [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a0691e8384&e=25844e23a8) member or increase your [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d23e0a5d61&e=25844e23a8) member level.
* Pray that thousands of Nebraska Republicans (there are 600,000 Nebraska Republicans) provide support to their NEGOP.

_**We can do this if we all work together.**_ **Your NEGOP needs your help now.**
---

| | Patriot,

---
1 year from today, Americans will cast their vote for the next President of the United States.
---
At such a critical moment, I would love nothing more than to be talking to voters about the very important issues on your mind and the many solutions I can (and will) deliver as your next President. That’s what an election __should__ be about.
---
_But instead, I am being forced to take the witness stand tomorrow in a SHAM trial in New York City where an extremely anti-Trump Attorney General is trying to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me and even my family._
---
It’s an absolute disgrace what is happening to our country.

---
**Crooked Joe’s regime is weaponizing the legal system to try and destroy his LEADING opponent who’s beating him in the polls by 10 points.**

---
This is Election Interference plain and simple. No reasonable person can deny it.

---
Democrats know they’re on the brink of losing to us in an epic landslide. And now with only 1 year to go until the election, they see that our movement has only grown stronger.

---
So, they’re accelerating the attacks and forcing me to stand trial in their never-ending witch hunts.

---
But with your support, we will prove that NOTHING – not even the most vicious acts of Election Interference imaginable – can stop the greatest political movement in history.

---
_Of course, if you’re doing poorly right now due to the very incompetent crook in the White House, don’t worry about donating. Just remember that 1 year from today, we will be celebrating our country’s triumph over tyranny._

---

clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, 1 year from today, Americans will cast their vote for the next President of the United States. At such a critical moment, I would love nothing more than to be talking to voters about the very important issues on your mind and the many solutions I can (and will) deliver as your next President. That’s what an election should be about. But instead, I am being forced to take the witness stand tomorrow in a SHAM trial in New York City where an extremely anti-Trump Attorney General is trying to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me and even my family. It’s an absolute disgrace what is happening to our country. Crooked Joe’s regime is weaponizing the legal system to try and destroy his LEADING opponent who’s beating him in the polls by 10 points. This is Election Interference plain and simple. No reasonable person can deny it. Democrats know they’re on the brink of losing to us in an epic landslide. And now with only 1 year to go until the election, they see that our movement has only grown stronger. So, they’re accelerating the attacks and forcing me to stand trial in their never-ending witch hunts. But with your support, we will prove that NOTHING – not even the most vicious acts of Election Interference imaginable – can stop the greatest political movement in history. Of course, if you’re doing poorly right now due to the very incompetent crook in the White House, don’t worry about donating. Just remember that 1 year from today, we will be celebrating our country’s triumph over tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
I Made The List HAHA Late last night, Newsweek released the TOP 12 most dangerous FALSE PROPHETS in America according to the Faithful America organiz

---
## I Made The List HAHA
---
Late last night, [Newsweek](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1068.1.f24952c7f0bb0eab462bcaad4e3399cb) released the **TOP 12 most dangerous FALSE PROPHETS** in America according to the [Faithful America](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1069.1.549bee2fa91bd28f9b9a39f973b0497e) organization and I made the list...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1070.1.deffe16f4a0f46fc5eeb65611f0bd1e4)
---
Looking at those listed as the **12 most dangerous false prophets** in America, I take it as a compliment actually.
The _Luciferian Left_ hates [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1071.1.bc87cfa66636885eea74c53e2ca9d6aa) and the organization, [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1072.1.7983b3f2766f1f4ec1026355b890dcb9), that I started last year because they know if the Evangelicals turnout and vote, there is no chance anyone but **Donald Trump** wins in 2024.
I want thank our Partners for their continued support in the efforts of [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1073.1.1fcf7da682a119f5cf4f61ceebb3d413) which is making such a splash the the Luciferian Left is on full attack mode every single day.
I want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1074.1.f3d7fdc481e304701565d5bf99f8ba70) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election.
Here is how you can partner with us:
-**Share the recorded Prayer Call** of [Pastor's For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1075.1.e593457d8f5c1934451a02d564d27a80) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1076.1.701bead012136b8cf57ea73bd0146ff1)
-**Make a donation to**[Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1077.1.9631e8c9fd54f2e40386a8cb717d7448) of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1078.1.cb187a5f7c60f04c131584255ea677fb)
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1079.1.09c1acd2e4bab5fe73e168c2d85a5fc3), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1080.1.a98c272889bd0f1364cf217d3c9c941a), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1081.1.6a48e8ab48f2df8b4fcf658d4eb383db), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1082.1.242826c636ffc87c64567d2b6c9bb116), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1083.1.c074a1c8a71540f0a63d5232534031e5), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1084.1.4667b1fe58e19b7569bb7c93c1880b73)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1085.1.877b9eaa51d5855b7df11ffaff1f0db2)
| | [ Support Pastors For Trump ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1086.1.81c6eef40b8a64cd34050f5a4a09b105)

## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1087.1.ebe0c650b055747a3da89b00db1bc33a)
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_.
**I am convinced that the BEST commentary on the Bible is the Bible itself.**
Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1088.1.78f5147fc767abb44bb8b6eac8102fc9), I walked our Church through the Bible and identified the **7 Signs Of The Times**.
Here you can learn what the 7 Signs are: [https://youtube.com/live/TuNK8YzJBRY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1089.1.2b5dddeefb61fe2cdf6833f9cb38e4c9)
| | [ Watch: 7 Signs Of The End Times ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1090.1.cbb1c730e1a0bd9d268ed00871b999b1)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1091.1.8fec7c7e74aabf152e676937e6705680)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1092.1.00785b7cf64ae1286a731948867e84f3) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1093.1.8cd66301c11c61e968b2e2536f033e64)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1094.1.462b0989ac186d34709bc60f70ffae15)

## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3312535.1095.1.06c795e30aea8e65a4c57a5aa16e554b)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**

**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**

These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!

name: Caleb Max
subject: We Must Win - Please Vote on Tuesday
body:
Polls Open Tuesday from 6:00am to 7:00pm
| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| We Must Win!
---
| Friends,
The future of Virginia is on the line. We are faced with crucial elections up and down the ballot from Treasurer to State Senate. The last months I have been working tirelessly with Juan Pablo Segura and the Renew Virginia Pac to hold Republican seats and flip our State Senate.
It has been inspiring to see the outpouring of support for so many of our candidates, but none of that will matter if we do not finish the job. To finish the job we must ensure high turnout on Tuesday. We need you to vote, tell your friends to vote, post on your social media pages, knock on your neighbors' door, drive an elderly person in to vote, whatever it takes.
Whether we like to admit it or not, the Democrats have a grip on Northern Virginia. We are blessed to have an amazing Republican Governor in Glenn Younkgin, as well as other statewide offices like AG Miyares and LG Sears. However, they will not be able to pass a lasting conservative agenda without winning our State Senate.
That is why I am imploring you to come out and support our amazing Northern Virginia and 10th district specific candidates like [Juan Pablo Segura](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nV6I6ShmQbvPkhjGHXhu5AICCTy1tcouXQojyoBgKq3Ko3wKWs1qGUYKugjlg2SQnWGFAl-v79ghtkqcPATF_QmiqdXZ9Ha22x-Cfxe_aR7zV6inTVkuJxNmUK0-pCuv6PRLD51AiQ3ga5O9tWXT_A==&c=FVycin0fsoLe-i5wKNFc-uXKHg_R3TuRlbdVLd_xkfsiza305FuzEQ==&ch=15pUUvbL2hf38FuXCfJOSStHXh5njpdiHBNmCZerg_AH0i7vHnHdfw==) and [Bill Woolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nV6I6ShmQbvPkhjGHXhu5AICCTy1tcouXQojyoBgKq3Ko3wKWs1qGXZWlqMATm2Y_dYeNzmJimNyGpM8cl-HNgnuwhlF7JjqihYk5k2U5gApqpcdLYjVFDU0xmJMF2oPDqqSJA5a_Eq0wvC0GCRlvg==&c=FVycin0fsoLe-i5wKNFc-uXKHg_R3TuRlbdVLd_xkfsiza305FuzEQ==&ch=15pUUvbL2hf38FuXCfJOSStHXh5njpdiHBNmCZerg_AH0i7vHnHdfw==).
I have had the distinct pleasure of campaigning and working for Juan Pablo Segura everyday since March. We have visited Mosques, churches, Latin businesses and churches, Cattlemen meetings, County Fairs, farmers markets and dozens of other community events.
They say the way you campaign is the way you will govern and it is clear that Juan Pablo has put in the work to earn your support and will be a fantastic representative in Richmond. He has pledged to lower the cost to commuters but instituted a rebate for tolls. He has pledged to preserve our rural heritage by keeping Data Centers off of our farmland. He has pledged to continue being a voice to the voiceless in many of our working immigrant communities. We need Juan Pablo Segura in District 31 and for all of Virginia.
This upcoming Monday the 6th at 6:30PM at the Segra Field in Leesburg, is the FINAL rally before the election with Governor Youngkin, Lt. Governor Sears and Attorney General Miyares. I hope that you will attend and invite your friends. [Details HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nV6I6ShmQbvPkhjGHXhu5AICCTy1tcouXQojyoBgKq3Ko3wKWs1qGftuv776ItLE2Z-wKp40mYXvkgntszhUXKl1GizTIyqQrKUvO5LhelujbRDV1virNb8yj6SB_H3eBYrFAEDLrpAKlIR9IFlNBHSJcMXVK6VgHkQaXMIvviTk_ui3nw57vRo7sFAFpk7qekEA0joCywA=&c=FVycin0fsoLe-i5wKNFc-uXKHg_R3TuRlbdVLd_xkfsiza305FuzEQ==&ch=15pUUvbL2hf38FuXCfJOSStHXh5njpdiHBNmCZerg_AH0i7vHnHdfw==).
And remember to vote on Tuesday, November 7th!
Thank you and God bless, Caleb
P.S. If you don't know your location to vote, follow the link below and it will provide you with your polling location. Thank you again for voting!
---

subject: VETERANS' DAY MESSAGE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
The Tale of Two Pats.
| | | |
---
# A Tale of Two Veterans
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
This is the story of two Military Veterans named Pat with a Southern Nevada connection.
Pat Veteran Number One: Pat Tillman was a standout college and professional football player. Early in his NFL career with the Arizona Cardinals and being named to the 2001 NFL's All-Pro team, 9/11 hit. At season's end, Pat turned down a $3.6M contract and enlisted in the Army with his little brother Kevin. Pat would qualify as an elite Army Airborne Ranger and was deployed to Afghanistan. Shortly after arriving in the country, on a combat patrol near the border with Pakistan, Pat was killed. In recognition of his valiant service, Pat was posthumously awarded the Silver Star, the Purple Heart, and the Meritorious Service Medal. In 2010, the newly constructed bridge over the Colorado River was named the Pat Tillman Memorial Bridge in his honor. Pat Veteran Number Two: Patricia Huntley was born in 1936 in Boston. After high school, Pat was awarded a scholarship to a nursing program. During that time, she went to the theater and saw "The Lieutenant Wore Skirts." So moved by the film she immediately went to the recruiting station and joined the Navy. She graduated top in her class from the Navy's Hospital Corp School. While in training, she met a fellow sailor named Lee. They started dating, eventually married; and when it was time to start a family, Pat's Navy service ended, and she was honorably discharged from the Navy. So, what is Patricia's connection to Southern Nevada? Eventually, she and Lee would move to Henderson, where Pat taught nursing at UNLV and CSN. Pat and Lee now lie side-by-side in the Boulder City Veterans' Memorial Cemetery. Though Patricia served less than two years in the Navy, her service would inspire others. Her first two sons joined the military: one in the Navy and the other in the Army. A grandson and granddaughter would also serve. Pat, or should I say, Patty, as only my dad could call her, was my Mom. Like almost all veterans who serve, my mom doesn't have a bridge or memorial named after her. Most veterans humbly serve the country they love, then return home to their families and communities. Some give their life, while others give a lifetime of service. This Veterans' Day, it is my prayer that we remember them all.
---
Questions and Answers
Q: What is Mark's military background? -J.P. A. Mark enlisted in the Army as a Private and retired as a Colonel. He deployed to ten different countries, including combat zones in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Kuwait. Mark was selected as Company and Battalion Commander. He served in the Pentagon and was on the faculty of the National Defense University. In 2017, he was a U.S. Delegate to the Global Coalition Against ISIS. This 68-nation coalition devised the strategies that defeated the ISIS caliphate in Iraq and Syria. Mark's awards and decorations include the Legion of Merit, Bronze Star, Meritorious Serve Medal, Secretary of Defense Badge, and Airborne Wings.

Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for Mark? Simply reply to this email to ask Mark a question.
---
---
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsdrcDpiNs

Mike Johnson for Congress

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of
God.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osdrcDpiNs

Friend -
I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no
secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our
nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created
equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the
government.

The
founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national
identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and
morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so
many American households through the generations, in our house,
we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and
serve people.

I know
our country is in desperate need of prayer.

Today I
am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our
nations, you'll join us.

We cannot
allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was
founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up
for our Republic.

STAND
WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON

God
bless,

Mike
Johnson
Speaker
of the House

MIKE JOHNSON

Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a
constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career
to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values
that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?

PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: When you wake up on November 6th, 2024... Will you be satisfied?
body:
| | | |
---
|
# 366 Days to Make a Difference!
---
---
| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018KB9tqegdQMHcX3yRNTgnWOqKsmynz-QGiNuVEPFI6iYI1otu5svKjEF7DtFuKH00COMWsrIOr3SdTYVSTKcz0jaTBn4X11m5wTDkOQPcHM2IFw2lJjU0wUgufuFX4w2ToKPzoJ-7Pjh7dS-6BCHgP50vPcnb98J1qnya4cXSKOJxJxJ3cMyRnFBf2NidxfwEHur_BjfrBQRkBuyhxA2k_kYTan9fdVATcSDsiOyOLrsk-WJXdxShWEdyF8KMtIcqlMIGcMmidlg_d1R5eAANw==&c=F0GiW9VZnRGyyJNf03syFy25FbcLJ-XYMXU0MT0Eql83UQYzVU3UwA==&ch=X4yHehufg2rrpMA7nNORMrfK-aEYXUxe_nt6CVr2t_nCam5vS1NZBg==)
---|---

Good Morning and Happy Monday!

Today is November 6th \- That means that one year from now we will be waking up to the results of the work that we put in over the next 12 months.

When I wake up on November 6th, 2024, I want to be confident I gave my all and be satisfied with the work that I put in.

There is far too much at stake to risk waking up feeling the weight of all of the woulda-shoulda-coulda's knowing that I could have done more to save my country from the devastating transformation that is underway by the far-left democrats like Mark Pocan, Tammy Baldwin, and Joe Biden!

Will you join me in Retiring Mark Pocan?

Since my announcement last month, I have been laying the groundwork necessary to build a strong campaign - and now I need to know who is with me!

Please let me know that you want to be a part of the change by:

1. Replying to this email!
2. Using the Volunteer Button below to sign up!
3. Making a donation to help me get the word out!

Your help and support are what will make victory a reality for all of us in the 2nd Congressional District!

Thank you!

Charity Barry

P.S. Don't forget to follow the campaign on social media!
---

| | Friends,

I'm excited to announce that **President Donald J. Trump will be joining me for a Get-Out-The-Vote Tele-Rally TONIGHT November 6th, at 9 PM ET / 8 PM CT** and I'd love for you to join us! President Trump knows that I am the right candidate to lead Kentucky and whole-heartedly endorsed me in this race. **Dial (502)334-0844 at 9 PM ET / 8 PM CT TONIGHT**

Looking forward to you joining President Trump and myself TONIGHT at 9 PM ET / 8 PM CT! For Kentucky,Daniel Cameron

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: Campaign Updates November 4!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| | |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.

This week we are pleased to share the support of former Pennsylvania Gubernatorial Candidate Charlie Gerow. Charlie worked with Ronald Reagan during his presidency and many years thereafter. He was the vice chair of the American Conservative Union which sponsors CPAC, and is CEO of Quantum Communications who are experts in strategy, advocacy, and media. They also host monthly Conservative roundtables in Harrisburg with thought-leaders from around PA. Gerow is a nationally renown, trusted, and respected leader who has advised many successful candidates.

"I've known Maria nearly 15 years and from the beginning I was impressed by her leadership, commitment to serving the community, and strong Conservative values. I am certain Maria can handily defeat Susan Wild in November 2024 and will represent the district well. Quite frankly, it's refreshing to have a candidate who is Conservative and can win in a general election. It is clear Maria is the front-runner in this primary race. Maria is a native of the 7th Congressional District, is from private sector, and can directly communicate our Conservative message to the 55,000 registered Spanish speaking voters in the 7th District. I am proud to support Maria Montero for U.S. Congress!"

# MONDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** This date in 1860 was election day for Abraham Lincoln. By the time Lincoln was inaugurated, seven Southern states had left the Union. Some say this [famous 1860 photo of Lincoln](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUANCvwRsWXDDYA8Nb2PLWjhaBi6EiYGGaKP36Sp37B0fn47bfXC65Hv_dA82IbXd-5CfunFNFQexyCiYiAooJDVfbBlqB3qZkFiG34JUOEha1CCcEaFgl6LjKDZ2fsgEGgnOmOFukkLOQy4KK63Xl0skoiGQY8mh9_my5joSxvNsT--zbYyomjXFeRPwjYAnYiG4k7JdPL9fHd2zXwD7fSzsIWGAABCzjBCxnBGzJ1bdS6b278KauBjoSUt_aiZ1-1dwqPVMb7ejuTATs1E04X7mUfClNJDseLpdfx_hz5ScAAP__7e5iKQ) helped him get elected. Of course, we would love for you to check out our advertiser Amara [_**here**_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUxvGnwZsjOBBsDwxXyvXUtFKHVp0sAoeYFIwFOFHevkrUsev3Wz79P4_TUfvgl_OrjqiqS5M21V9xYqyVLfBJNFY5REDeoGJyGKCT0A3NrGhHO0MBT8CN7pGedI_ciUFaKx0423gFFDhjVDK6F1zsuNjvUbKu75nQwnEiKFpfU95dkl_qjC7c0xXzzqTYBDXXuhbC_xEYCYw133WOWT-QwLjmZDdTC4HxObenLXy3F50JH7cap5K2bJDww4K3ErBWzATkQyJav0XCD2VNS0kZ7S8YHVftzwvhh_Hl6-3j_3uTlV1vPgRfZEcEPUftw_Nd_bPVTwAAAP__6P9s1A) \- but if you're a dog-lover, you could also check out [2023's best dog photos here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uwyAURp8Gtljcy4_NwNDFW7p2tLC52FQ4WDYKyttXadeOn_TpHJ2v-3T3KafH-ul3cjWWyS81PWkCuJkbyknx4CIRkuTkwFiLvcHe8s3NM0gUPmiwMcwa4jAI69WAC1rUknhyKFACCANCK6k6qbQmA_0wgPIqSqYEhVTL2X2X9KgbxfwqTzq7pew8u63W42Lyg-HIcGytdaGsx1ZqWU9_bC_f_Bmu95nh-DdubyPDkZ8uHC3lnC7TMyXW3af8i63_Rv4EAAD__zrUUgE) And if you're a cat lover who wants to understand [the 276 different expressions your cat makes, click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAUhJ8Gd1hw-LMLitvQ7W1TWgQOu0TYrAy7jt8-cupU04xmPn0ft-Xmc8nb_b9f0fZUFx96fuPCOdUUxCKHaBMioBjQcj3PYDSYeXjYJBJMMc0qGKUF4CQSM9Mn90rOTIo4ZAsMBOdMc6akkKOQSqHmZpq49DIJIhnG3Os-ftW89QemctY37mOo61Dso_dnI-IfAUfAHccxvprvNfrzKhBwrdf9JOA2PNoVvue6EXDXLQHHOQHHgIALvjca6rq-thx8RwpG0-RD9oXi93PH1nLdGm39Fa9BwyUomA1jhoAbdhufRy4lN22IZPfV5_LL2P809hMAAP__wHhpHw). ## Pro-Gaza Mob Attacks White House Gates
Tens of thousands of pro-Palestinian demonstrators marched around the world this weekend in protests, marked in Washington D.C. by a mob trying to [raise the Palestinian flag atop the White House gates.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yszAQAJ8GumPQD5IpVHyNO39tSkZYB5wjS4x0gSRPn3HqdDuzzc6-3aabp0hp_e-f6HjJk78zHTgJAQakmnQb3IIoUbXohBlHaY20Y7s5JXVQVojRajNbo-WlH-ZRDVoIO-vFtORkL5UQvRH9oJXulB4GNMJeLkJ7vahG9xiIc-kemRJvuMSvfGDp7vnZRrcx77VR_xp5beT1PM9uyZ8Jz_ryjbzuORLTvb6wZNh9xMqUyCfYS2asjKVCRUxQN_9OaYVzI0bY8kdFWD0jHD4FH-kbAxQMsHtKDI-MMFPA1BYX9pNipGpso_v16Sn-1vGfr34CAAD__8gUbQY) Thousands of anti-Israel protestors in Washington sprayed antisemitic messages on buildings and chanted anti-Israel and anti-Biden slogans. At the White House, a pack of demonstrators mobbed the gate ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz72O6yAQQOGngS4RzGB-Coo07pL2lhbBQ8wVNpE9myhvv9Juu_WRjvT9u07XVFvdHre0UuTSp5S5vmjS-mRPgJORcyxEQCgpahsCOAsuyCX64kP2xd-zI5tsMZjvLhNisRpNzrJGUIBaK6vVYNCc0QwDWe281yaZgsIomiv3_fy_140XKu3TX7Sfc19liwvz8xB4ETAKGPldmX-bgPG6X7b5c3t0AePBib8OAaN2oIJToJ0KNgwYMMg9zs93ba0e1gmjHmuq7efPf2q_AwAA__8QZlMP)) and [vandalized it with red paint](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFurDAQANDTmM4ID8ZAQbH6X3SbNiUazLBMYmOEZxft7dOkzAme9D7v0x058P74wEiDrGlCL_yiyRjtNNSTLZZhJQKqCxqM63toHbR9sQ1r46DrAGBe5855a63rK4vNPFskQ67gASqojamcqRpb27K2TUPOtF1nLNq1VraihSWd5VfiXTZawzu96Cx9ikUYNpEjq_qmYFQwXtdVLsjhHZFD6VP5_FYw7nRlBSOewj6QNtAa05lGwXjbhTNFFvb6hfuCgXPUHg8WDFq29My4L1kfZxLKQmfW__-Vm8RQnMNyXBwCZ9cqWz1-xVjIn0M_AQAA__97GmgU). In London, where Hamas is officially labeled a terrorist organization and support of it has been criminalized, at least a dozen [masked demonstrators were arrested](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUgOGngU0jnCPowNDF7XbtaFAOem5RjJJr-vZNO9_5T_7k-3qMD8-J9-XTb-RKzKOfC79oVKoylYYRZXCRSBNIcsr0vbZG216uLhoPANNsAgVsJx9D31mcJh2tDRh6yU43GpRqjGpaBKwB25aMsl2n0GMEgQ0FLvmsn5n3slJMP_lFZz3nTSa3lnJcAj6EHoQe7vuun0e-yl8VephO8t-8L9VO9yX04M_Cc6LKWmUB5OnCcXNKfBkrsFk2z-n_W94qfwMAAP__FvBSyA) for battling and launching fireworks at police.
## Politico Report Casts Doubt on Biden Denials
An investigative special report by Politico [casts doubt on President Biden's statements](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH8N3mzB48PxwNCFLV07WmCe4xdhiAyJlX9fpXP3k-50P9f56ilRvn37HW1by-yXRi-chehND3JWXbQrIqDs0AozTTAaGKdusxcel8mEdY0mBLUo4EF6HpYpxpH7UXdkgYMUghvBtZJqkEprNGK8XITyapVMcYzUyjHcC-W24Zre5YXHsJS9S3Zr7VGZ_GLgGLjzPIdHSdRoKR-Agct4VgbuY2HghGDguGbgtmduePT3gn2giLkPz0oZa-0b1kZ7ye-ecwGaa9MdNj5OSomqGZnit91T-gto_-74DQAA___k3F8t) about his lack of involvement in his family's overseas financial dealings. The publication cites evidence contradicting White House claims on a number of points. ## Blaney Wins NASCAR Cup Championshhip
Ryan Blaney [won the 2023 NASCAR Cup Series championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPtCAUAH8Ndhh4IGph8TV2-7VXGsTH-i4IBtg1_vvLXn31TDGZr8fysBQoPv_bA6fq02JdpTcuUnLDQS262SaPCKganKQZR-gN9GOzT5vpOtgGMw5C2g59v0oxKrUq36-b7vqGJhCgpBRGik4r3SrddWhkPwxSW-0V0wI3qim334li3dGHO70xty4dTZj2Ws_C1D8GM4P5uq4Wyxk_kMGcraP4ZDCXmvLNYF4YzLQxmNUwwCBAf6TbRr4GG_HmBd0rY-Gecqnc2YyYebTF2czd6-Rut8dJKZadziZP23lRCFRMz7R4HpbCb1X989FPAAAA__-PhGdw) in Phoenix after passing Kyle Larson with 20 laps to go in a fierce battle for second place. It was Blaney's first career NASCAR championship. The race itself was won by Ross Chastain, but he wasn't [one of the four drivers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnsTcscxCIB4Yu2dK1o3W2z-EqDAhoIr99lc6dvuWTftL_6z7fkQPHxyce5NqeZlwbP2mWUhgBatb95nYiINWTk2aawBqwU-8dkVFkrkprlNN7NqsXOe1mpAXtsvTsYAQl5WjkeNFKD0pfLmSkvV6lRr2rTo-0cUtl-E4cm6c9nOlJZVjT0QfnW8u1Ux8d3Dq41ZxKq8OJPqX3oYNbOTGKJWCkU7w4VvH2RMS6YhHrTxaVClMVq8cjc4rVcxagwCppAAbfjtAXt-UXh8DV2E6PjwM5_Pnt3xq_AQAA___CeGBD) with enough Cup series points to compete for the championship. The four were Blaney, Larson, William Byron, and Christopher Bell. It was the first time the Cup championship race was won by a driver who wasn't racing for the title since the current format was adopted in 2014.

Politico Report Casts Doubt on Biden Denials An investigative special report by Politico about his lack of involvement in his family's overseas financial dealings. The publication cites evidence contradicting White House claims on a number of points. These include Biden's claim that he never discussed business dealings with his family; his suggestion that incriminating e-mails were Russian disinformation; and his denials that his son made money in China or The report by Politico indicates that ongoing House investigations into the Biden family are beginning to break through. An AP-NORC poll shows that Blaney Wins NASCAR Cup Championshhip Ryan Blaney in Phoenix after passing Kyle Larson with 20 laps to go in a fierce battle for second place. It was Blaney's first career NASCAR championship. The race itself was won by Ross Chastain, but he wasn't with enough Cup series points to compete for the championship. The four were Blaney, Larson, William Byron, and Christopher Bell. It was the first time the Cup championship race was won by a driver who wasn't racing for the title since the current format was adopted in 2014. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: The last 89 gray wolves in Yellowstone are in danger this hunting season
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **An entire Yellowstone wolf pack is gone forever. Donate $27 today to help us reach our $3,900 goal and protect vulnerable wildlife and the planet. ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I wish I had better news to share. But hunting season is in full swing, and vulnerable wolves are in serious trouble.
We thought gray wolves were making a promising comeback. But just last year, a trophy hunter rampage ruthlessly gunned down _**an entire Yellowstone wolf pack.**_ Now, **only 89 gray wolves remain in the park.** And though they’re protected in the park, there’s nothing stopping them from stepping across park borders. Once they do, they could find themselves in bordering states where **hunters can senselessly murder them without consequence.** [_**This hunting season, gray wolves must be protected at all costs. Donate $27 today and help us reach our urgent $3,900 goal to protect vulnerable wildlife and the planet!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099978?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
It gets worse. Because for trophy hunters, it isn’t enough to simply kill a wolf. Hunters killing for sport needlessly terrorize these helpless animals. They resort to **painful neck snares** , leaving wolves to choke to death in futile attempts to escape. They **chase them down with helicopters.** In some states, it’s even legal to **DYNAMITE nursing wolf mamas and their baby pups** inside their dens!
All the while, hunters and Big Polluters are fighting against protections for wolves. Why? So they can keep killing for “fun” and take over the land for mining and logging. This system is broken, Friend. But it’s not too late to fix it. Thanks to members like you, we still have the chance to make real change happen. But we need to protect our vulnerable wildlife and the planet before the loss is too great! Will you join us in this fight?
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099979?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Wolves don’t deserve to suffer like this. Donate $27 today towards our $3,900 goal for our nation’s wildlife and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This fall and winter could be devastating for wolves. With only** 6,000 remaining in the lower 48 states,** these precious canines can’t afford another hunting season like this.
That’s because one wolf kill isn’t just one wolf kill. When a mama wolf is gunned down by a trophy hunter, her babies’ chances for survival plummet. Without protection, **orphaned wolf pups could starve or freeze to death.** Or they might survive long enough to fall prey to other animals and trophy hunters.
No animal deserves this fate, Friend. But if we don’t act soon, it could get even easier for hunters to viciously torture and kill wolves in droves. That’s because Big Polluters are using their massive influence to help trophy hunters strip away the last few protections wolves still have. If they get their way, they could wipe out wolves. All so they can take over their lands and open them up for destructive mining and logging. That would also destroy any possibility of wolves being able to recover in the future.
Trophy hunters and Big Polluters have shown time and again that they care more about lining their pockets than the lives of wolves and survival of our planet. But Friend, is private profit really worth all of this bloodshed and destruction?
**Our wildlife should come before corporate profit. Rush your $27 donation now before wolves and vulnerable wildlife are driven to extinction and it’s too late for our planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Here’s what we’re up against: Powerful trophy hunting and Big Oil lobbies are fighting tooth and nail against protections for wolves. **_Now, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service is ignoring science-backed wolf recovery practices._** That means struggling wolf populations are being abandoned in pro-hunting states like Montana.
And losing wolves would have serious impacts on our planet. Wolves are a keystone species. They help balance out their ecosystems by keeping prey populations in check. Not to mention, scavengers rely on their kills to sustain them. Without wolves, other plant and animal species could suffer.
**With hunting season in full swing, it’s never been more important to stand up for wolves.** Friends of the Earth is fighting with everything we have to strengthen the Endangered Species Act. A vital piece of legislation, the ESA allows us to shield endangered species from violence. Even more, it gives us the power to block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming from destroying critical habitats for profit and polluting the communities that rely on them. That’s why we’ve collected thousands of comments from supporters just like you -- urging our elected leaders to put an end to these vicious attacks against the ESA.
Your membership gift will go a long way to further support our planet-saving work. But we’re up against some powerful foes. Private trophy-hunting interests and Big Polluters have seemingly bottomless resources to get their way. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. We are falling $1,293 short of our goal. But if just 1 in 12 people reading this makes a $27 membership contribution today, we can reach our $3,900 goal and make real change for wildlife and the planet. Will you stand with us today?
**Wolves, vulnerable species, and our planet are on the line. Donate $27 today and help us hit our $3,900 goal by midnight tonight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D269378&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:

It has been two decades since U.S. forces contacted Iraqi military commanders prior to the Second Gulf War in 2003 to encourage them not to fight. Some of the messaging was through covert back channels, some via old-fashioned leaflet drops. Either way, it was a highly successful ANALYSIS – As Joe Biden and the Democrats come under increasing pressure, both from their leftist pro-Hamas base, and internationally, they are steadily backtracking on their initial pro-Israel stance. I wrote about earlier the White House launched a ‘Strategy to Counter Islamophobia' just as anti-Jewish sentiment and threats are spiking. That was tone deaf enough. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

name: Chanel Prunier, Students for Life Action
subject: did you see this, Pro-Life Friend?
body:
Pro-Life Friend,

Our students are on the ground door knocking in key battleground states like Virginia and Ohio RIGHT NOW!

So, Kristan asked me to make sure you saw and signed your **[Statement of Support for our student activists who could use the extra encouragement for all the tireless work they’re putting in to save lives](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-y/).**

With so much on the line for the pro-life movement, our students are heading directly into the lion's den and need all the help and support they can get!

I’m including Kristan’s email below with all the details if you haven’t read it yet.

**[Once you’ve read through Kristan’s email, I hope you’ll consider making a generous contribution to help us hammer politicians into taking action](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-j/).**

Sincerely,

Chanel Prunier
Vice President of Political Affairs
Students for Life Action

_— Begin Forwarded Message —_

Dear Pro-Life Friend,

In three days, polls will close and votes will be tallied in the critical 2023 elections.

Planned Parenthood and their pals in the media have been claiming for months now that the outcome in Virginia and Ohio will prove once and for all that the Abortion Lobby has the momentum heading into 2024.

But Pro-Life Friend, we are fighting back.

Thanks to your support, we have deployed our dedicated student activists across the country to knock on doors and make phone calls in key battleground states in the lead up to Election Day.

And these student activists understand this is the most important weekend of this entire 2023 election year.

That’s why I’m coming to you today.

**[Pro-Life Friend, will you please click here to leave a note of encouragement for our student activists to let them know you support them and the tireless work they’re doing to save lives](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-i/)?**

**[And after you leave a note of encouragement, would you consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-d/)?**

Your support not only helps fuel our student activists during long days on their feet, but it also lets them know that there are good people out there that care.

Our students know they’re going to be heading into a lion’s den as they go door to door this next week.

They know they’re going to be targeted.

**Yet, they persevere.**

Thanks to your help, the _Students for Life Action_ team has:

**>>>** Visited 13+ campuses on the “Abortion Ballot” tour in Ohio;
**>>>** Planned 20 call nights with 70 volunteers mobilized to make the calls. _Students for Life Action_ has already made more calls in opposition to Ohio’s _Issue 1_ than anyone else;
**>>>** Trained nearly 300 pro-life activists, who have distributed tens of thousands of voter registration and absentee ballot request forms to pro-life voters on college campuses and trained dozens more pro-life activists using the tools they were taught by _Students for Life Action_ staff; and
**>>>** Activated our 25 Social Media Captains who have in turn reached over 50,000 people with the TRUTH about _Issue 1_.
**But for everything we’ve already done, the work over the next few days could be even more important.**

That’s why I’m counting on your support.

**[So, please click here to leave a note of encouragement for our student activists letting them know you support them and the important work they’re doing](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-h/).**

**[After you leave a note, please consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-k/).**

Pro-Life Friend, your words will be an incredible boost to our student activists and the encouragement they need to continue to persevere.

So, please take a moment to send them a **[note of encouragement](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-u/)** and, if possible, make a generous contribution that will help to buy them a few pizzas during what are sure to be some very long and tiring days.

Thank you for all you do for life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

**[>>> Send our Student Activists a note letting them know you support them and the important work they’re doing this weekend](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjtxjd-duchtdja-o/).**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672311%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MfryQ2tS9N5JFKQM1%2bP0Qw&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672311%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MfryQ2tS9N5JFKQM1%2bP0Qw&sysid=1)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672312%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWRKu3PqFW0L5SyHt5fYjA&sysid=1)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672313%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jeXsy3Cn1%2blIYPqwsutQag&sysid=1)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672314%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MKD4KpgLH2anbSlBqNEUfg&sysid=1)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672325%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BZI%2f%2fciIu4C%2ft9ktjWUF3g&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point Action
subject: How we're going to Chase the Vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Fellow American,
---
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._-8DgeoykzQ)
---
**[Fellow American, can I count on YOUR gift right now to help support this MASSIVE and GAME-CHANGING ballot-chasing initiative?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cxqHwRqCs-RPBzw)** For every dollar you donate, you'll help Turning Point Action put MORE boots on the ground, knock on MORE doors, and turn out MORE voters in the must-win precincts and states in the 2024 Election.
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-4aU8XCxbtgAyMr9EQ)
---
For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the ballot game. As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots from Conservative voters were cast and delivered. That's why, despite conservative majorities in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we didn't secure the victories we needed. But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. [**Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on grassroots patriots like YOU for support.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-PkCATQ)
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._1_3-tuUUg4nA)
---
| | Imagine the impact of: • THOUSANDS of patriotic voters reached and registered, • HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS of voters getting to their polling locations or casting their ballots by mail, and • getting out the vote to WIN BIG for True Conservative Principles in Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and beyond in 2024. **[Fellow American, your support can be the DECIDING FACTOR in how many voters that Turning Point Action is able to reach, register, and TURN OUT to vote in 2024 -- please, make your gift right now to help.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Thank you for standing with me and Turning Point Action. I hope you're proud of the work you're already accomplishing to help SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left, and I can't wait to see how much more we're able to do for America's future in the year to come.
---
For America, Charlie KirkFounderTurning Point Action
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._CcayZeDZpA)
---
[Support Turning Point Action ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I know God is not done with America yet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35013%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ys6OaXXMiQikIXMkSZjOCQ&sysid=1)
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35013%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ys6OaXXMiQikIXMkSZjOCQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35014%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kWEMhTq4%2fbFmMKXSTBlzCA&sysid=1)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35025%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZYRe69Cl8HttsZ%2b5D3R%2fnQ&sysid=1)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35026%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3aBJXBdpY7NqqaItqjJcQA&sysid=1)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35027%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pe1%2f4qoY6xiDKhSOZaJMlQ&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: What's next?
body:
Subscribers are helpful | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/subscribers?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

More than ever, I'm learning about the power of content and social media. Like you, I've met people I never thought I'd meet, engaged in critical dialogue with other members in the medical community, and forged lifelong relationships with passionate people across the country. I'm committed, more than ever, to continue to use my voice to champion issues like health freedom and parental rights. It's why [I started a podcast](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e904c6c773&e=9828080a05) and continue to put out videos about important subjects in those arenas.

To continue those critical conversations, I'm rolling out a subscriber service across social media. I'll be providing new opportunities to engage and new content on a weekly basis. To begin, I'm utilizing some of these social media subscriptions to go chapter-by-chapter in my book [_We've Been Played_](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=340d91edbd&e=9828080a05). There'll be a number of exclusive pieces of content I'll put out to subscribers. The small fee associated with each will go towards production cost of each new video.

I hope you'll take a look at what we're up to and consider being part of this community:
* [Subscribe to Dr. Scott Jensen on X/Twitte](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d70a1cea12&e=9828080a05)r
* [Subscribe to Dr. Scott Jensen on Facebook](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e4c2fe9dff&e=9828080a05)
* [Become a Member of Dr. Scott Jensen's YouTube Page](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=59a96d3a7e&e=9828080a05)

---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=44209c9d15&e=9828080a05)
---
| I will continue to post often publicly on social media about issues I encounter and news worth paying attention to. This subscriber program will offer deeper insight, event more content, and a new way to continue the fight. I hope you'll consider an option above!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024.

---

Friend -

It's Speaker Mike Johnson.

I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024.

**To do that, I asked my team to assemble a list of the top Republican patriots in the country. Congratulations, you were chosen! **

_**[Please see my Speaker's Survey below and consider leaving your feedback.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf2h6u1scc22fg7vij8v3hn407vqtn56i2pt5i38_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie0p70cjh2bs "Please see my Speaker’s Survey below and consider leaving your feedback. ")**_

| | |

**What issue do you believe House Republicans should prioritize the most?**

**Do you support the Parents' Bill of Rights?**
