name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: In desperate need of prayer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z95tnjhbcdqqivmtt2u4o1kten2jq1l7ebc5o8po_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie8o76clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8fbejphfd2tnk6o6feg24s6tkmbk3lna59pt41g_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie8o76clh2bs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z84h57m4vpgvtit8tf4mv2401jl1g1lfkq0q8q48_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie8o76clh2bs)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zopgtj5okju96khb7nemb2c0f5eq669dpuj6cfug_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie8o76clh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg8r3b8pqmsn48n2avs0cd8lgmu975d6ps3h3nk0_)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkp5v6v4ha2urrpasc8issg21u1mfo4egvcqlqro_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

# Biden's Silent War On Retirees [ACT NOW]
---
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

He's thrown $80 billion at the IRS to build an army of 87,000 new auditors. and shake down millions of Americans struggling to save up for retirement.

This is not the first time "Fair Share" Biden has targeted retirees.

In 1983, he voted to slap a 50% tax on Social Security.

Then he voted to increase it to 85% in 1994.

And now he's determined to ram through Congress a $4.7 TRILLION tax hike.

That includes punishing taxes on retirement investments and even Medicare.

As you can see, "Middle Class" Joe has been waging a silent war on retirees for decades.

But in a move that went largely unnoticed.

name: Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
subject: "On Message" From Michael B. Moore
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104585/images/Logo_white_rectangle.jpg]
On Message
from Michael B. Moore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Welcome to our campaign newsletter.
We're happy you're here.
We'll use this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st congressional district.
Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday.
See you on the trail.
Join our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
In the news
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South."
The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181780/-My-swing-district-has-its-date-before-the-Supreme-Court] .
Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace."
https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/ [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House."
According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims."
https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/ [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts."
On the picket line
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers]
Union of Southern Service Workers [https://ussw.org/]
Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [https://twitter.com/RaiseUptheSouth/status/1677737443145949184] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize.
As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions.
https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/ [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Holy City Sinner [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina.
He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [https://twitter.com/NancyMace/status/1451926458994151427?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1451926458994151427%7Ctwgr%5Eb80d1ca7caee292360b8edb17aecebf62c52def8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F7%2F25%2F2183281%2F-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike.
In the arena
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486]
Rep. Nancy Mace [https://twitter.com/RepNancyMace/status/1684928879235072000?s=20]
Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House.
It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families.
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans]
Here are the facts:
*
In
2019,
Nancy
Mace
voted
for
a
six-week
abortion
ban
[https://www.scstatehouse.gov/votehistory.php?KEY=16575]
in
the
South
Carolina
legislature.
*
In
2021,
she
voted
against
the
expansion
of
the
child
tax
credit
[https://mace.house.gov/media/press-releases/mace-so-called-american-rescue-plan-was-never-about-covid-19-relief]
in
the
American
Rescue
Plan.
*
In
January,
she
co-sponsored
H.R.
7
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/5/2179435/-My-opponent-is-co-sponsoring-another-extreme-bill]
,
which
would
make
health
coverage
that
includes
reproductive
care
ineligible
for
federal
funding.
*
In
July,
she
voted
for
an
NDAA
amendment
that
makes
it
harder
for
servicewomen
to
access
health
care
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181768/-Nancy-Mace-called-it-an-asshole-move-Then-she-voted-for-it]
—
a
policy
she
herself
called
an
"asshole
move."
Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise.
On social media
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore]
Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month?
And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@mbm_sc01] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/about/] and TikTok. [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
From the trail
https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/ [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/]
Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls.
https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/ [https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/]
At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [https://www.msnbc.com/the-reidout/reidout-blog/ron-desantis-florida-slavery-curriculum-rcna96052] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy.
https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/ [https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/]
Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [https://www.nps.gov/people/robert-smalls.htm] .
Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago.
On our team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started.
Join us in our fight to flip this swing district.
Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter] Volunteer [https://www.michaelbmoore.com/volunteer]
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] https://instagram.com/https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/ [https://instagram.com/https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/] https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]

Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
3022 South Morgans Point Road Suite 295
Mount Pleasant, SC 29466
United States

name: Maria Montero
subject: Your Vote Matters & Vote Republican.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
Vote Republican
| | | |
---
|
VOTE Republican
---
| | |
---|---
Tomorrow, Tuesday, November 7 is election day. This is a friendly reminder to get out to vote. Polls open at 7:00 a.m. and close at 8:00 p.m.

If you know of a voter in PA 7who does NOT have transportation to the polls, please call your county GOP office listed below for help OR let us know via [email](mailto:info@mariamontero.org).

We've heard of the stories where municipal candidates have lost by only ONE vote. In those cases, maybe friends or family stayed home and didn't vote because they thought their candidate was a shoo-win; in other cases, maybe didn't have the time nor didn't have the transportation to get to the polling place.

Remember your VOTE COUNTS, let's exercise our civic duty of voting!
---
| Statewide Judicial Candidates
---
|
---
| We have four statewide judicial candidates and all have strong conservative values and will not legislate from the bench. Please help us to elect them: Carolyn Carluccio (PA Supreme Court), Maria Battista (PA Superior Court), Harry Smail (PA Superior Court), and Megan Martin (PA Commonwealth Court).
---
|
---
| Counties in PA-7
---

clean_body: Vote Republican | | | | | VOTE Republican | | | ---|--- Tomorrow, Tuesday, November 7 is election day. This is a friendly reminder to get out to vote. Polls open at 7:00 a.m. and close at 8:00 p.m. If you know of a voter in PA 7who does NOT have transportation to the polls, please call your county GOP office listed below for help OR let us know via mailto:info@mariamontero.org. We've heard of the stories where municipal candidates have lost by only ONE vote. In those cases, maybe friends or family stayed home and didn't vote because they thought their candidate was a shoo-win; in other cases, maybe didn't have the time nor didn't have the transportation to get to the polling place. Remember your VOTE COUNTS, let's exercise our civic duty of voting! | Statewide Judicial Candidates | | We have four statewide judicial candidates and all have strong conservative values and will not legislate from the bench. Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zogetvuint8iegn06k1bcvh75quk6pd9n13th7fg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9iecor5cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarni7rsaa80v3crca97but7evii3anru7810cd0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9iecor5cph2bs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zenu427jlldkusgf8e55bss3gplrg8r5nt1o73v8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9iecor5cph2bs)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoo8rtpeo6so4109v08gjnr1dr6q2o3n3pba6do_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9iecor5cph2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1u6evf0aipgdsflf95ej45gtfkckc76eqf8cg1o_)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zve73t265eel9lpvcff96ofj7nv6c5vmi2coit3g_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z38a7g3rgea7rdb3pt82tbjcfimrvpf58fd0ka4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kthqeot7ch5u)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuunqhe0th6qh0lf5ehls5189hkcgaeh3ghscelo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfkahae9iasblmv8ncdf1a59pb8j0c9j68p30cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie9oj4s5ge1pj24no) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z34ecv7jrf1h9k5pcm2bq8oa49g1ghjgm1mj338g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfkahae9iasblmv8ncdf1a59pb8j0c9j68p30cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie9oj4s5ge1pj24no)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3knuvtlsvhimevpvhph661br8321rjjrsq5s820_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoipvd6fvn8tgd09oph54qd5g6nc630hpfpj2oso_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22qu372n5u78u6fmsa1288pqcrkn7ue72ua95q0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z60vjs5hksgpvtfn9lod7rbrqncn7rcunk3kph6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22e4iidqhq2t5fldad5uj6pgbfa5b0j5cgo5040_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm24t60p181jvnm36r9i126abg0am22r0b2lqjg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfkahae9iasblmv8ncdf1a59pb8j0c9j68p30cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie9oj4s5ge1pj24no)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zah4l8uatnlgil9gngsfgef3kp698dcculji49h0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh7ij0nvfo0sjrafr9r1bblp649brbf6pdvq1kq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ie2o70sph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnq58l74p5e5qrfkbm6ngl2kslk9g64pj4chg66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbnhqsflsqusq28ktl4ldq4cgknf8qfn3pplr40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfkahae9iasblmv8ncdf1a59pb8j0c9j68p30cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r3kthqep238h1e8he4933cjie4p71c3gecoh5u)

---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Biden's Silent War On Retirees
body:
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Biden's Silent War On Retirees [ACT NOW]
---
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

He's thrown $80 billion at the IRS to build an army of 87,000 new auditors. and shake down millions of Americans struggling to save up for retirement.

This is not the first time "Fair Share" Biden has targeted retirees.

In 1983, he voted to slap a 50% tax on Social Security.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: SAVE THE DATE: 11/14 National Stand with Israel Day
body:
| | |
---
If you believe that Israel has a right to exist; if you believe that the people of Israel have a right to defend themselves from terrorists who rape, murder, and kidnap, then please sign up to host a local event on [**National Stand with Israel Day on November 14th.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._4XcvkLwp2jcTCgnw) It is frightening to see how many people in America are siding with Hamas, the terrorists who killed over 1,400 civilians, butchered them, raped, murdered babies, and more on October 7th in a surprise attack. They claim that Israel deserved it or that they don’t have a right to defend themselves. It’s sick and it’s wrong. **We must show Israel and the world that Americans stand with Israel and that we fully support their right to exist and defend themselves in any way they deem necessary.** [Please sign up to organize a Stand with Israel event on November 14th.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._lgeLv9gigsEgS5M0Z5Kg) There is a national event in Washington, D.C. that say, so if you are able to attend in D.C., please do that. If you can’t go to D.C., organize an event at your state capitol. If you can’t do that, organize a simple sign waving event in your town at a busy intersection. Or please post the following graphic on social media so that others know to host an event as well.
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
We will have a how-to guide to help you organize your event, so be on the lookout this week for more information and resources for you. We wanted to get the save the date sign up out as quickly as possible, so the resources will come a little later.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMxMC05MGQwMGE2ZjNjNjk0NGVmOWZjMWI5YTliNTI5OTE4OSIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIzIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hbGlnbmFjdC5jb20vZ28vc3RhbmQtd2l0aC1pc3JhZWw_bWlkPTQ2NTUyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/p0MXJdKcmp3qi1kXyOMmRg)
---
| | Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Gw-Q4919Q)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: My friend request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend,
My engagement with you is important to me. For campaigns on a budget, like mine, we're constantly trying to find free and inexpensive ways to reach our voters. Will you please follow me? [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Lorinser-3.png]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I am very active on Facebook. Sure, I'm a Boomer 🙄, but I love connecting with voters digitally. We're on TikTok, X, Instagram, and more. Pretty much everything.
Follow Me. [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
Campaign visibility in the 21st century is nothing like it used to be. You won't hear any "Dr. Bob" jingles on the radio (although I do know some great songwriters!) but, every social account plays a strategic role in our outreach.
I always need funds to keep our infrastructure going, to pay my staff, to cover my travel expenses, and "keep the lights on". We have a great team dedicated to using proven tools to inform and engage voters. Thank you for chipping in. If you can keep contributing, please do so. This grassroots campaign needs every dollar. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Nothing is wasted, so it's absolutely crucial we use everything in our arsenal to introduce myself to constituents. On social, we advertise my upcoming events, share policies, blog, publish statements, and celebrate rural Michigan.
Friend, if you already follow me, please like, share, tag and invite your friends to our accounts sometime today so I know that you're in my corner. I follow it. I appreciate it. It's important in spreading our message of positive Democratic change, and it really helps.
We have exactly 12 months until the election verses my opponent, GOP extremist Jack Bergman, and in a district the size of Scotland, every share counts. Every "like" matters. Every comment keeps us exposed to your network.
Let's keep the momentum going.
I need your support. Digitally, financially, and at the polls. Thank you for accepting this friend request.
Fund our Outreach. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
v/r
Dr. Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Al Franken
subject: The hard way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc46050ec-48fe-4431-8a95-56d58c96a300/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Running for office is tough. You have to ask a bunch of people for money (like this), and then the other side gets together and says lots of mean things about you. Having a baby is tough, too. There’s lots of screaming and crying, poop gets everywhere, and you don’t get any sleep. Now that I think about it, it’s a lot like running for office... Peter, I’m writing because my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is doing BOTH. First, I laughed and told him he was crazy. When I realized he wasn’t joking, I said I’d help! [Josh is running for Congress in NY-19, and his race could decide the House majority. Will you join me and split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to help him win one of the most important races in the country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b27e53f-50df-46ac-81e4-2e48ea0630f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53c7bef2-c437-4df6-bf97-19bff10a1b17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98ae1cee-d7c7-48f9-a9a2-c476b2794e1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(The really tall guy is Josh.) Josh is used to doing things the hard way. He grew up in the district in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Now, Josh is running for Congress without taking any corporate PAC money. He knows it’s not the easy route, but it’s the right thing to do. But that means he’s relying on folks like you and me chipping in. And with his time spread thin between the campaign, the new baby and, ya know, still having time to breathe, he’s relying on us now more than ever. [So if you can, please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today. Josh’s race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country, and he’ll win it with our help.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8db5e51-bf22-49d4-996c-3ee6e81178e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfaa67790-6503-49df-97d0-686c372f6d5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. [If you read this far and haven’t donated already, what are you waiting for?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5f388d4-3bde-4627-a12d-6ed49ade059e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_op_alfrankenforjoshriley231027_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=a964b912-e73e-4b06-8538-f65477e7c057&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=a964b912-e73e-4b06-8538-f65477e7c057&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzEwLTRlMTgwYWYwZGI4MzQzMTY4ZGYxYjE1MTE4YTcwZWY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfU1BPNDQwMzUifQ/kHSCiv_INE88rN6W3FmH9Q)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzEwLTRlMTgwYWYwZGI4MzQzMTY4ZGYxYjE1MTE4YTcwZWY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfU1BPNDQwMzUifQ/rpgajRgP05QYyLPnk_AjrA)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzEwLTRlMTgwYWYwZGI4MzQzMTY4ZGYxYjE1MTE4YTcwZWY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfU1BPNDQwMzUifQ/xU_T-yCMMomn1ztZvgr39A)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzEwLTRlMTgwYWYwZGI4MzQzMTY4ZGYxYjE1MTE4YTcwZWY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfU1BPNDQwMzUifQ/auraGUt4ISgURshCSmOVcw)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzEwLTRlMTgwYWYwZGI4MzQzMTY4ZGYxYjE1MTE4YTcwZWY3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/RMwy_frFY7csKxCT9pzabQ) to unsubscribe.

If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you: From: Riley Gaines Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM Subject: Did you see my announcement? Dear Friend, I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center. I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women. The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms. When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things. For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them. To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you. The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through: Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths. A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country. A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action. Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America. Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come. Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWMuWJpiNP

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWMuWJpiNP

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover

94305

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QqYlCHRG0gkTRTn4Rqrllw&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672322%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=orriOhK5kKe%2bZwgRk5NzlA&sysid=1) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

clean_body: Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Rep. Peter Meijer just entered the Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=769%2E135344%2ENHn_Cp)

Friend --
BIG news today in the Michigan Senate race: As of this morning, former U.S. Representative Peter Meijer, Republican from Grand Rapids, has officially entered the race.
**Meijer, of the well-known Michigan-based Meijer Grocery Store family, self-funded his previous races for Congress, to the tune of $1.6 million and has the ability to self-fund even more in this Senate race.** **[CONTRIBUTE NOW →](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=2&akid=769%2E135344%2ENHn_Cp)**
This means that the Republican primary just got more crowded: Meijer is the third credible candidate to enter in the past 8 weeks, joining former Congressman Mike Rogers and former Detroit Chief of Police James Craig. It’s clear this three-way battle will pull the field to the most extreme elements in the GOP: We have already witnessed Rogers selling out his former colleagues at the FBI (in week two in the race) to earn Donald Trump and his supporters’ votes, and seen James Craig go on Steve Bannon’s podcast in the hope of currying Trump’s endorsement. We should expect Peter Meijer to similarly make healthy nods to the extreme base of the party to have a chance in the primary in August.
While many will remember Peter for his early vote to impeach Trump in 2020, the reality is that he spent the next two years making up for that impeachment vote by taking extreme and party-line positions well outside of the mainstream in Michigan. Here on Team Slotkin, we do our homework, and here’s what you should know about Peter Meijer’s record, and where he stands on the issues:
He has said publicly that he supports a federal ban on abortion and has campaigned on being “100% pro-life” -- even in cases of rape or incest. Meijer voted against legislation that would ensure women have better access to contraceptives.
He has stood against workers by vocally supporting right-to-work and other anti-union legislation. Meijer is from one of the wealthiest families in America, one of the 9 billionaire families in Michigan, so it is no surprise that he also supports tax cuts for the rich -- including publicly supporting the 2017 Trump tax law which was the largest giveaway to the ultra-wealthy and richest corporations in our country’s history.
**Not surprisingly, during his campaigns for Congress, he took over $100,000 from the DeVos family, likely because he supports their crusade to destroy public education in America -- and for his support for Trump’s tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. **
This is a big moment of inflection in the campaign. We have the full range of voices in the Republican Party -- so it’s time for our campaign to show we have what it takes to compete and win in Michigan, and it’s why we’re asking for your support to continue building the kind of campaign we’ll need to WIN. **[Will you make a donation now? Every contribution in these first 24 hours following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=3&akid=769%2E135344%2ENHn_Cp)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3eWQbG&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=22&akid=769%2E135344%2ENHn_Cp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-nov23.F34f-I&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=23&akid=769%2E135344%2ENHn_Cp)**
---

name: American Action News
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5akpue9vajmu861r0u0c5k6np282hdhb51l1o8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z64rq6lkspji1vjlhrvqsq8lptsu7rk5ur58ea18_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvicim498mrnb6aj55cc968u6snitbm2n252m7vg_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs) [No](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21futo896baburpkq2gt6j1805o4ju6un33hd90_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z09r0psj1mjst1lmpelo5vnev78ukl32s6l3gv8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkb4v01qorbt8o6vq43tme8cas4votjipl318dd8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9dqhiubbcm86pc5gtqjk2ra3qahfpb32de38k8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cjg6eor4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6745q8h9engq69eht264tvbn8k0oeiu0bv1dq8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s9ieeoj1chh2bs)_

name: Team Greta
subject: See you tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter,

All our hard work on this campaign comes down to what happens at the polls tomorrow. We're so grateful for all your support since Greta announced her campaign to bring true change to Mississippi as a dedicated, hard-working Attorney General.

If you haven't already, today's the day to make your plan to vote tomorrow. You can check your registration, find your polling place, and access more voting resources by clicking here: https://www.sos.ms.gov/elections-voting

After you head to the polls, join us for our Election Night Watch Party kicking off at 6:30pm! Check out more details below and click here to support Greta's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-election-watch-party?refcode=BEB_EM_EV_231106

See you at the polls,

Team Greta

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=BEB_EM_EV_231106_PT&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🎙️ Hilarious AI Mishaps and A Serious Look at Irresponsible Rhetoric
body:
Tune in Now to the No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=517c80c338&e=567664f14c)
We're thrilled to bring you the [**latest episode**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=217e18cb0e&e=567664f14c) of the No Doubt About It podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, where we take you on a rollercoaster ride through both humor and important discussions.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=22f6b3af9f&e=567664f14c)
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8b01655410&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, Krysty shares an AI-written bio of Mark that she stumbled upon on the internet, and you won't believe just how hilariously off base it is. From Mark's educational background to his net worth and even his height, the AI managed to get it all wrong, creating a laugh-out-loud moment you don't want to miss.
| [STREAM EPISODE 50 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c696db14ba&e=567664f14c)
---
But it's not all fun and games. We also delve into a recent editorial in the Albuquerque Journal where two affluent lawyers make infuriating claims, suggesting that cops are treating life like a video game. Mark takes these lawyers to task and calls them out for their irresponsible rhetoric, emphasizing how such attacks on the police are making New Mexico a more dangerous place. It's a serious topic that deserves thoughtful consideration.
| [STREAM EPISODE 50 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6cfebd9556&e=567664f14c)
---

On our website, you can [purchase exclusive merchandise](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=415ddf7d4a&e=567664f14c) and make [financial donations](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3a46270764&e=567664f14c) to help us continue delivering valuable content

Mark and Krysty Ronchetti

subject: They took my mom’s stove
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, As bad as things were a year ago, they've only gotten worse. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf Just watch this video to see what I mean: They’re trying to ban my mother’s stove, dishwasher, lawnmower…pretty much everything but the kitchen sink! https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO >> As ridiculous as all this seems, politicians in Washington have their priorities upside down, arguing which stoves Americans are cooking on while working families struggle to put food on the table. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf That’s why I officially launched my campaign for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country. As the son of hardworking immigrants, I know what it's like to struggle to make ends meet and feel like nobody's listening. Last year, we came just 2,000 votes short of defeating my liberal Democrat opponent, but I’m not giving up. There is far too much on the line to back down now. Washington is so broken. I'm running for Congress to get Washington focused on YOU and making life better for everyone, not keeping us hungry and in the dark. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf If you haven't yet, please watch and share my official announcement video. I look forward to working hard to earn your support in the coming months and having a proud American like yourself on my team. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO >> Sincerely, https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf George Logan P.S. Peter – I know times are hard in Biden’s economy, but if you are in the position to give, https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong! The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans. My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf I’m going to need your continued support to win. Thank you. – George https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e3035dbbd2e21fd2ee470f90e0cb2e7e77ee45a7482aa1eaf07bef808b279000994838214fc18d6fc299c3aed24de55f61cf Paid for George Logan For Congress 26 Catoonah Street Box 72 Ridgefield, CT, 06877 https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=ec9ed6464d29e30387cae03393d94b610133084f3c3a5177604cf8062b26b017e74be0cf643c4fcdb2af79627dae76c9aaa645725ec42870 Privacy Policy To unsubscribe from GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS, click here

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dawn=20Liphardt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: 🚨Call for Questions: Truth in Taxation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Please submit your questions for our panel speakers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12660721?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=62f47d6be8&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| _“Collecting more taxes than is absolutely necessary is legalized robbery.”_ -Calvin Coolidge

The increasing property assessments and notices of increasing tax levies across many Nebraska counties are weighing heavy on Nebraska residents and with good reason!

We pay sales tax on what we CHOOSE to buy.
We pay income tax ideally on a job we CHOOSE to work for.

But as taxpayers, we have NO CHOICE in the ASSESSMENT value of our property AND the MULTIPLIER of the tax levy from dozens of taxing authorities. Taxing of the citizens has reached epic proportions and we need solutions.

With the focus of our next NEGOP Roundtable Discussion revolving around continued tax reform, [**we want to invite you to submit questions for our panel hosts.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=387d2a8be0&e=25844e23a8)

Additionally, if you haven’t saved the date or purchased a ticket for this Roundtable event on Nov. 7th, please do so **[HERE:](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fbf6fa1833&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5b8e2ab673&e=25844e23a8)
---
| The voice of every Nebraska taxpayer is vital in the discussion of taxes. At the NEGOP, one of our goals is to provide opportunities to build the relationship with lawmakers who influence everyday living. No taxpayer should feel like they don't have a voice.

[**We look forward to seeing your submitted questions and dive into the Truth In Taxation on Nov. 7th!**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=bb7b789cb0&e=25844e23a8)
---

---
| Warm regards,

[Dawn Liphardt](mailto:admin@ne.gop)
Executive Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

[**P.S. If you’re unable to attend, but would like to support our efforts to bring about historic taxpayer reform, please consider a contribution today:**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=844d7fa0c5&e=25844e23a8)

Senate Democrats are defending 23 seats across the country next year, friend — and we can’t afford to lose any of them.
As New York was one of the ONLY states to see a **red wave** in 2022, it’s **_absolutely critical_** that we help Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand defend her seat so Democrats can defend their Senate majority.
But to win, we need to build a powerful, unified grassroots movement to show everyone that New York and the Senate should remain blue. **That's why it's absolutely critical that we get feedback from our most engaged supporters to make sure our strategy is air-tight.**

Trump Date: Mon, October 30, 2023 Subject: Pledge to cast your ballot:To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | Patriot, Our movement has NEVER been more popular than at this moment right now. Americans – in ALL political parties, of ALL ages, of ALL walks of life – see that the world is falling apart under Crooked Joe. They also remember perfectly well how great our country was doing when I was your President. That’s why we now hold an incredible 10-POINT LEAD over Biden. So, in a last-ditch effort to try and beat us, Crooked Joe and his Democrat henchmen have decided to try and REMOVE MY NAME from the BALLOT. A TRIAL is currently taking place in a top battleground state to try and do exactly that – REMOVE my name from the ballot and hand the election to Biden. If they can’t get the people to vote against me, then they will try to forcibly __stop you from voting for me. Our country needs YOU to show these tyrants that they cannot stop the American people! That’s why I’m asking YOU to pledge your support on this solemn day to show that you are 100% committed to voting to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN on the 2024 Ballot. Thank you, Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
