body:
It's been another exciting week on the campaign trail! Read on for everything you need to know about the Crouch Campaign!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

Before I delve into the details of this past week, let's cast our eyes ahead to tomorrow – a momentous election day for our beloved state.

I wholeheartedly encourage each and every one of you to seize this opportunity to make your voices heard at the polls and champion Republican leadership.

Find your polling location at indianavoters.in.gov (http://indianavoters.in.gov/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

** Volunteer Callout! Join us on Election Day
------------------------------------------------------------

To sign up as a volunteer or to learn more about our Election Day efforts, please reach out to our volunteer coordinator at jp@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:jp@crouchforindiana.com?subject=Election%20Day%20Volunteer%20Callout) .

** In the News: A Tax Foundation ranking of state business tax climates shows why more companies are fleeing the coasts. (https://www.wsj.com/articles/state-tax-rates-tax-foundation-business-da655aba?st=ct0jqzfzryo65ka&reflink=article_email_share&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

The Tax Foundation released its annual ranking of state business tax climates. Notably, the top-ranking states in the study, including Wyoming, South Dakota, and Alaska, all share a common approach—they don't impose individual income taxes.

As your Governor, I️ will eliminate Indiana's individual income tax, following the examples of these states. We have an opportunity to create a more prosperous state, where businesses thrive, job opportunities abound, and our state remains an attractive destination for residents and entrepreneurs alike.
https://www.wsj.com/articles/state-tax-rates-tax-foundation-business-da655aba?st=ct0jqzfzryo65ka&reflink=article_email_share&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://www.wsj.com/articles/state-tax-rates-tax-foundation-business-da655aba?st=ct0jqzfzryo65ka&reflink=article_email_share&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** In the News: Lt. Gov. Crouch states differences between her, other Governor candidates (https://www.journalgazette.net/local/local-government/political-notebook/political-notebook-lt-gov-crouch-states-differences-between-her-other-governor-candidates/article_7aa9df60-737e-11ee-a45d-d7767b930843.html?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_aoebud1upj&fbclid=IwAR2vlcQjrTPOdyRl2nx7oGJY_ZN7GigsJ66_FxqFFGbeEuRWP1Ct2bRGdaE&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

I’m the conservative candidate who will #AxeTheTax (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/axethetax?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZVi2S_ai-zKnokV1UMP1G_4pGTjAcO6bW9atP7P6j8BgN2l4P4_RjNx4sd4uBz9FxRRwggUwkk-RW2X2n_gO_zym0M79BHUhzKKK0lvpEWOFWqhnuDN3sRNnE9LaQTOlkkIaTeWr-jkPjDlDBPGdpRufR3yhPrKlESQR8rQHd5ekG8FbB5SdZqGb6iV4oc3OZ4&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who will prioritize mental health, and who has the experience to get things done. I'm not here to play it safe; I'm here to lead boldly.
Read The Article (https://www.journalgazette.net/local/local-government/political-notebook/political-notebook-lt-gov-crouch-states-differences-between-her-other-governor-candidates/article_7aa9df60-737e-11ee-a45d-d7767b930843.html?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_aoebud1upj&fbclid=IwAR2vlcQjrTPOdyRl2nx7oGJY_ZN7GigsJ66_FxqFFGbeEuRWP1Ct2bRGdaE&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** WATCH: Crouch talks policies on All Indiana Politics - UnPHILtered (https://www.wishtv.com/podcast-episode/ep-003-all-indiana-politics-unphiltered-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wishtv.com/podcast-episode/ep-003-all-indiana-politics-unphiltered-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://www.wishtv.com/podcast-episode/ep-003-all-indiana-politics-unphiltered-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** In the News: New IU study highlights billions in annual losses from untreated mental illness in Indiana (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/01/new-iu-study-highlights-billions-in-annual-losses-from-untreated-mental-illness-in-indiana/?fbclid=IwAR1BHAEslg8RXI63pTMJGL6myU-XcL9nUE6g5p67sQkd8iHseiG9HYNrMUU&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Addressing mental health isn't just about well-being; it's a matter of saving lives and livelihoods.

A recent study reveals that untreated mental illness in Indiana costs over $4 billion annually, taking a serious toll on individuals, our healthcare system, and the economy.

It's time we invest in mental health for a healthier and economically sound future.
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/01/new-iu-study-highlights-billions-in-annual-losses-from-untreated-mental-illness-in-indiana/?fbclid=IwAR1BHAEslg8RXI63pTMJGL6myU-XcL9nUE6g5p67sQkd8iHseiG9HYNrMUU&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/01/new-iu-study-highlights-billions-in-annual-losses-from-untreated-mental-illness-in-indiana/?fbclid=IwAR1BHAEslg8RXI63pTMJGL6myU-XcL9nUE6g5p67sQkd8iHseiG9HYNrMUU&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Meeting with Indy FOP President Rick Snyder
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ met with Indy FOP President Rick Snyder about enhancing public safety and supporting our dedicated law enforcement. We discussed strategies to address the revolving door crime policies that put our police, their families, and our communities at risk.

** Supporting GOP Leadership in Boone County
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Wednesday was a productive day as I met with the Republican Zionsville town council candidates and spoke at a fundraiser to support these candidates.

Strong, conservative local leaders are key to preserving our cherished Hoosier values and maintaining our state's status as a center for advancement and opportunity.

** Vanderburgh County Reagan Day and Election Rally
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Vanderburgh County Republican Party's Reagan Day and Election Rally was a fantastic opportunity for people to meet county, state, and federal candidates.

** Door-knocking to Support Evansville GOP Ticket
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I joined my friend Natalie Rascher, our Republican candidate for the Mayor of Evansville, as well as City Council candidates Joe Kratochvil and Maytes Rivera to knock on doors and meet Hoosiers ahead of the election. It was a privilege to support them and engage with the community we love and call home!

** Supporter Spotlight
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Appreciate the support of Peru Mayoral Candidate Don Sturch and City Council Candidate Bob Huber!

** Meeting with Evansville Business Leaders
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I also had the opportunity to meet with business leaders in Evansville to discuss my plan Axe The Tax and other vital economic issues. Their insights and perspectives are invaluable as we work together to build a brighter economic future for Indiana.

** Law Enforcement Leaders Endorse My Campaign
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I'm proud to have the endorsement of these outstanding Indiana Sheriffs who have served our communities with dedication and honor. Your trust and support mean the world.

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

The support, energy, and ideas that you, our incredible supporters, bring to this campaign are indispensable. I'm grateful for the privilege of connecting with so many Hoosiers who share our vision for a prosperous and secure Indiana.

Thank you for being a part of this journey, and together, we'll keep Indiana on a path to greatness.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=957c950781-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_03_12_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-957c950781-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Doug White
subject: The filthiest email we’ve ever received
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rural Americans United, not endorsed or approved by any candidate
body:
We've touched a nerve. Our messages are working!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=P7jGuhgK8H6W-gfOaWXYXSKddByQ9wUqE17kLVB2bf0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzk3T2tiNmVUTT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**

| | THIS NEWSLETTER CONTAINS STRONG, OBSCENE LANGUAGE THAT SOME READERS MAY FIND OFFENSIVE.
---
| | THIS NEWSLETTER CONTAINS STRONG, OBSCENE LANGUAGE THAT SOME READERS MAY FIND OFFENSIVE.
I OPENED ANOTHER LOATHSOME EMAIL this morning—this one from a maga-maniac who was foaming at the mouth after listening to one of Rural Americans United’s new radio ads.
As you may have heard, we just launched our $350,000, 14-month advertising campaign. From now through at least the end of next year, Central Washington will be flooded with 20,000 radio spots promoting traditional Democratic values. In an area that’s been smothered for years under a blanket of smarmy Republican propaganda, the ads are already inspiring enthusiasm, and more than that—hope. In the two weeks since the advertisements began running, 2,000 new subscribers have signed up for this newsletter; and hits on [RAU’s website](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=fPA27ybyYDbIjD19zskzx45h8iKybYvL0uWhIjAJ3jM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnLyIsInIiOiJlMTRiOTQzMC03MDg1LTQ5NzgtYmYyNS03OTRkM2Y0MGEwNTciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) have more than tripled!
But if RAU’s campaign to emphasize Democratic ideals (like public education, healthcare access, restoring aging infrastructure, job creation, immigration reform, and support for unions and veterans) is inspiring hope in Central Washington, it is also bringing fear and fury to MAGA worshippers who oppose those values. Here is the RAU radio ad that so enraged the wingnut who sent this morning’s unhinged email:
Tired of not getting paid what you’re worth? Tired of rich corporate CEOs hogging America’s wealth and leaving crumbs on the table for workers? Tired of Republicans trying to take money away from your kids’ education to support rich private schools? Sick and tired of Republicans failing to take action on immigration reforms that would protect our economy and the immigrants that support it? Help Democrats make America fair again. Go to [www.ruralamericansunited.org](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=EHi9yvxs5sYSU2KYJ29e-VAQhvTVWpezkoinNW5mFfc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmciLCJyIjoiZTE0Yjk0MzAtNzA4NS00OTc4LWJmMjUtNzk0ZDNmNDBhMDU3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) to learn more. Paid for by Rural Americans United, not endorsed or approved by any candidate.
The vicious message we received in reply is typical of the kind of over-the-top violent language and intimidation tactics Republicans have been using this political season in local election races across our region. It’s not enough to just tell you the email was particularly ugly; we present it uncensored; you’ve got to see it to believe it:
So your radio ad says that you guys would take care of immigration laws?!You dumb fuck liberal shit bags have already screwed that up look at your dumb fuck potato head puppet for a president that has the southern border wide fucking open! Maybe you should pull your head out of your loose drippy a****** and see the light of day and realize that Democrats are complete fuckstains that are destroying this country! Kiss my ball sack you worthless pieces of shit
This kind of violent language is not unique; it is standard operating procedure in the ever-escalating intimidation playbook being updated constantly by the head of the Republican crime family. It’s taking place nationally—remember Trump’s recent threat that U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley should be [executed for treason](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=KR1dbD1kH34mfKCvhmIuQr1ydCJMbiW5ejbbg2P1OLU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlYXRsYW50aWMuY29tL2lkZWFzL2FyY2hpdmUvMjAyMy8wOS90cnVtcC1taWxsZXktZXhlY3V0aW9uLWluY2l0ZW1lbnQtdmlvbGVuY2UvNjc1NDM1LyIsInIiOiJlMTRiOTQzMC03MDg1LTQ5NzgtYmYyNS03OTRkM2Y0MGEwNTciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ); and death threats against Republican congresspersons who refused to vote for a MAGA sociopath as their speaker. And it has been happening all too frequently in Central Washington, particularly this year.
For example:

* According to the [Cascade Advocate](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=Ute0p_cQ-VeoRT-QakeuEbrT37FMIUJawPLGbDSAUCY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubndwcm9ncmVzc2l2ZS5vcmcvd2VibG9nLzIwMjMvMDkvbWVtby10by13YXNoaW5ndG9uLXN0YXRlcy1yaWdodC13aW5nLWhhcmFzc21lbnQtaXMtbm90LWFjY291bnRhYmlsaXR5Lmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiZTE0Yjk0MzAtNzA4NS00OTc4LWJmMjUtNzk0ZDNmNDBhMDU3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0), Republican operatives used right-wing media to shower Yakima’s elected mayor with hundreds of threatening messages last month after she attempted to protect shoppers from harassment at a local Walmart. The intimidation against the mayor included doxing (revealing personal information about a person online) and sexual harassment. “In orchestrating this bombardment of an elected official’s personal mobile number with angrily-worded text messages, [Republicans] are seeking to intimidate an elected official so she doesn’t cross them in the future,” the Advocate wrote. “The goal is not to respectfully disagree (which can be done through official channels), it’s to make [the mayor] feel bad ... to inflict distress and emotional suffering.”

* A local nonpartisan city council member had one of her campaign signs stolen from her yard this month. A few days later, the sign appeared in her across-the-street neighbor’s yard—with FUCK YOU written on it in large letters. When the councilwoman asked the neighbors about the sign, they told her to “fuck off” because it was their “constitutional right.”

* After supporters and protesters demonstrated for and against family-friendly drag shows in the Tri-Cities this spring, the Emerald of Siam restaurant in Richland was [vandalized and the owners received death threats](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=svtz5l07S-LvTIDgroWCWBMe6-xMtM8_dHIzpMgfOyw.).

* In August, incumbent Pasco City Councilman Irving Brown Sr., the only Black councilman in Pasco and the only Black candidate running for the council, had a campaign sign defaced with racist messages. It wasn’t the first time the issue of race has been raised recently, the [Tri-Cities Herald](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/97Okb6eTM/c?w=M6GH6YyKYdJE6kZNp148hWSuTphl8DkMrOow-eS5atA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJpLWNpdHloZXJhbGQuY29tL25ld3MvbG9jYWwvYXJ0aWNsZTI3ODY2MzUyOS5odG1sI3N0b3J5bGluaz1jcHkiLCJyIjoiZTE0Yjk0MzAtNzA4NS00OTc4LWJmMjUtNzk0ZDNmNDBhMDU3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) reported. Late last year, a local newspaper publisher voiced frustration that the city council had “given away” a retiring council member's seat to “an African American.”

Republicans have been adding pages to their anti-democratic playbook for years. Ronald Reagan made it OK to favor the wealthy over the working class, Trump made it OK to lie, cheat, steal, bully, intimidate and abuse power to force his agenda on others.
Nowhere is the tactics of MAGA more evident than in rural America. MAGA knows their ideology is not shared with the majority of the American people. So they have perfected a strategy to force it on us. They have only two tactics: disinformation and intimidation. Both are highly effective, and no place is more vulnerable than rural America. Rural Americans United is beginning to shine a light on those despicable MAGA tactics: by providing accurate, honest information to the people of Central Washington, and by refusing to be intimidated by MAGA threats of violence. We are committed to restoring a culture of respectful, civil discourse to the politics of our region, and we will never, ever resort to violent words or actions.
—Doug White Founder, Rural Americans United

Rural Americans United is beginning to shine a light on those despicable MAGA tactics: by providing accurate, honest information to the people of Central Washington, and by refusing to be intimidated by MAGA threats of violence. We are committed to restoring a culture of respectful, civil discourse to the politics of our region, and we will never, ever resort to violent words or actions. —Doug White Founder, Rural Americans United | | | | | To keep the pressure on and continue our encouraging pro-Democratic ads we need your continued support. Please donate generously. | | | | | | | We have been up and down Central Washington. Helping as we can. | | | | | | | We have added KTRT to our list of stations! | | | | | | | Wooo Hooo! Union Strong! Unions forced automakers and Kaiser Permanente to correct years of unacceptable compensation. | | | | | | | | | | Shout out to and the Sunnyside Six.Ella is a non-profit that provides advocacy and leadership training for the Latina community. The "6" were well underway on their own, but with the skills shared by Ella they excelled. The results are a long way from completely in, but early counts show they are currently favored 2:1. | | | | | | | Get involved, there is less than a week left to the elections. These organizations will know what is going on in their area. Don't be shy. | | | | | | | Benton County Demorcrats, hosted a student listening session and Rural Americans United was invited. | | | | A group of 21 running start students participated in a listening session.They spoke and the adults listened. Many very telling and troubling bits of information came out. But we are getting a clearer picture on how we can reengage youth in the political process. All the pieces are coming together. | | | | | 2023 Central Washington Candidates (Updated October 30, 2023) | | Rural Americans United offered to publish candidate information provided by the local Democratic parties. This is not an endorsement and if you have questions about the local Democratic party's position and the selection process for these candidates, please contact them directly. | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoottmgdq0e2os1ogda9ktscru8raikm4gcc7p3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg64pr4cdh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ed5shgcapd9qp0fno3gtkp8cics36l1mu5sl7g_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg64pr4cdh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo0f8n12gv3o4gkc1rama0g5d41t6rh2evmagts0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg64pr4cdh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Trump Train News
---

Peter, I believe in service over self. As a leader, it is my responsibility to listen first to what you need. As Governor, I have always put the needs, jobs, and benefits of the people I serve over my own, and as President, I promise you I'll do exactly the same. **[Today, I'm reaching out to ask if you'd mind taking a minute to respond to my official Listening Survey:](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=70147851064143bb90a210129730def0&_e=JOrnXlEvEWgdMQb0DkZ6v51cbO5D9vMOrwf8ZP9u6grfy0YQrzc1fswcSGSTZaH2bgPMskQCVmOD53uafc5eRjo8BHbxmNdYsP4CyxXonWRwBSUs1nSsN07zcRGJwsct8Kxs3LRWXVIyE1QTkfaaLUHtjKUBnnLuwcvDPYNQWP8FR9uil9shNhic51JCMHRkDJ99vsC9GPZqbCS4uo08PoHWbzreekGnw_CMPMEjP-Ycwiqqxf0q8R5zmfBV1lOkCeuJqQ1t3iWC2Vi-_jqTDuDEsg1jl3gByhl0EeJMnmIe-RAvtCuuxWl1Y4SAaO4zO8k8QGWitY5FssQ5OjH3uIxMvwnrglE9jCZc3dmboixhpCpAJ33QYLUWcdIbG8317C2z-SYka9y3oek9OamMxqyVGZfb50NVoae9epVx_3eE8igApRlO3Znc8ysl9QqG "Today, I’m reaching out to ask if you’d mind taking a minute to respond to my official Listening Survey:")**

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=70147851064143bb90a210129730def0&_e=JOrnXlEvEWgdMQb0DkZ6v51cbO5D9vMOrwf8ZP9u6grfy0YQrzc1fswcSGSTZaH2bgPMskQCVmOD53uafc5eRjo8BHbxmNdYsP4CyxXonWRwBSUs1nSsN07zcRGJwsct8Kxs3LRWXVIyE1QTkfaaLUHtjKUBnnLuwcvDPYNQWP8FR9uil9shNhic51JCMHRkDJ99vsC9GPZqbCS4uo08PoHWbzreekGnw_CMPMEjP-Ycwiqqxf0q8R5zmfBV1lOkCeuJqQ1t3iWC2Vi-_jqTDjeZtPlRzWsOXgT57oIYodbjk27Jecl1zIAgsccojPoA9Xk3I4dXSjWi4oyaScmsGXU6Qzx-fNrQl3Y1u2IMJBUMNUij7HtNADDdcl8XWk4G5hsr-VhQ-DwtFAySsgFhm-b9Jnj8ypLwLarlkw6Fi6nePvqiIT_P0UfxJRTHD9WL)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

| | Patriot,

---
This is my last email to you before I take the witness stand for the sham trial in New York City where an extremely anti-Trump Attorney General is trying to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me and even my family.
---
Can you believe I have to once again spend yet _another_ day of the election cycle in the courthouse?
---
This is a level of Election Interference never before seen in our country.
---
**We are watching the ruling party weaponize the legal system to try and destroy its leading opponent by any means possible – whether that be removing my name from the ballot, financial ruin, or even imprisonment.**
---
**This is how dictatorships are born.**

---
_But even as I am currently making my way over to the Manhattan Courthouse to take the witness stand as an innocent man, I am still telling you not to lose hope!_

---
**Just yesterday, a new poll conducted by the**** _New York Times_****(how fitting) showed that we are crushing Crooked Joe in a landslide:**

---
**_New York Times_****: “Trump Leads Biden in Nearly Every Battleground State, New Poll Finds”**

---
But I honestly like this headline from _Axios_ even more...

---
**“NYT poll: Trump set to romp Biden”**

---
I think that sounds so much better, don’t you agree?

---
As you can see, my spirits are still up! No matter how much the Left tries to break me, they will never succeed, because I am more committed than __ever__ before to save America. _Are you?_

---
If you’re doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt person in the White House who is letting our country burn in order to try and imprison me, then please don’t even think about donating. But, if you can, I trust you know how high the stakes of this election are.

---

clean_body: Today, I take the witness stand in the SHAM trial in NYC.| | | | | Patriot, This is my last email to you before I take the witness stand for the sham trial in New York City where an extremely anti-Trump Attorney General is trying to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me and even my family. Can you believe I have to once again spend yet another day of the election cycle in the courthouse? This is a level of Election Interference never before seen in our country. We are watching the ruling party weaponize the legal system to try and destroy its leading opponent by any means possible – whether that be removing my name from the ballot, financial ruin, or even imprisonment. This is how dictatorships are born. But even as I am currently making my way over to the Manhattan Courthouse to take the witness stand as an innocent man, I am still telling you not to lose hope! Just yesterday, a new poll conducted by the New York Times(how fitting) showed that we are crushing Crooked Joe in a landslide: New York Times: “Trump Leads Biden in Nearly Every Battleground State, New Poll Finds” But I honestly like this headline from Axios even more... “NYT poll: Trump set to romp Biden” I think that sounds so much better, don’t you agree? As you can see, my spirits are still up! No matter how much the Left tries to break me, they will never succeed, because I am more committed than ever before to save America. Are you? If you’re doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt person in the White House who is letting our country burn in order to try and imprison me, then please don’t even think about donating. But, if you can, I trust you know how high the stakes of this election are. | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: | | | Peter, Hey there - it’s Samantha, from Hung Cao’s Senate campaign. I want to start by saying how grateful I am for your support of this race. We truly would not be able to build the momentum we have without you. As Hung’s finance director, it’s my job to go over the numbers every month and budget for our campaign. Every single contribution - whether it’s $1 or $100 - gets us closer to victory in 2024. When you pitch in, you’re being an active part of the fight to take back America from Joe Biden and the radical Left. I know you’re not the type to sit by idly while the Democrats make a mockery of our country, so I’m asking you today: This campaign would not exist without grassroots donors like you, Peter. Your support helps us meet voters throughout Virginia, get conservatives ready to get to the polls, and contact people who are still undecided about who to vote for in the 2024 U.S. Senate election. Every single dollar is an investment in a new relationship that could be the vote which decides this election. Your dollar could be the one that reaches a first-time Republican voter - but you’ll never know unless you act now. [**Will you help support our team as we work to turn out as many people in Pennsylvania to vote as possible before polls close on Tuesday by donating $5 or more now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72886127/436707218/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231106tomorrow_N_KT_90DO_8_G_TestB_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODY2MDhjLWJkN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=30up_Vws3ejepTX86VDtqwILX49mQvxjeyumcfViur4=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72886135/436707313/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231106tomorrow_N_KT_90DO_8_G_TestB_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ODY2MDhjLWJkN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=30up_Vws3ejepTX86VDtqwILX49mQvxjeyumcfViur4=)

_Polls are open from 7:00 a.m. - 8:00 p.m. ET on Tuesday, November 7th. _
**Here’s the game plan:** Our team will be out in all of our seven focused regions across PA, ensuring folks have what they need to make their voices heard. This includes:

📍Allegheny
📍Capital Region
📍Lancaster/Berks
📍Delaware/Chester
📍Montgomery/Bucks
📍Poconos/Lehigh Valley
📍Philly

**We have already knocked on more than 15,500 doors to ensure voters have what they need to vote. This is why we were founded: To expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. But we have no time to waste.**

**Don’t just take it from us. Here is NPP’s Regional Organizing Director for Chester/Delaware Counties, Dyneco Gibson:**

_“This young lady said she usually only votes in presidential elections. I explained to her how important this election and every election is. She was on her way to a party. I asked to take a picture and she asked if I could send it to her.”_

subject: Sign: Trump needs to pay his own legal fees, not the taxpayers!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Trump needs to pay his legal fees, not the taxpayers!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c0e108f-ae2f-49d1-aa88-6e2642f481f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8223bf69-1607-4fe9-b16c-dfaa8cc67c08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump’s lackeys continue to fight his battles for him in increasingly ridiculous ways! Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis [suggested](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86c3c1fe-23db-480a-a720-cdd418ea1111/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) using taxpayer dollars to pay Trump’s legal fees. Are you kidding me?! Patronis’ plan includes setting up a legal defense fund “for any Florida presidential candidate to use when they are targeted by politically motivated prosecutors.” The (many) charges against Trump are not “politically motivated.” He’s finally being held accountable for his crimes! Trump got himself into this mess and it’s not the taxpayers’ responsibility to bail him out. [Add your name: Tell Trump to pay his own legal fees and leave the taxpayers out of it! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30522d3a-82dd-43d3-b940-777f446bede6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcb8530q22la4oj6p9bqsoqjr1s621f59i12o5ig_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg62ob6c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztcktb5j1cbuqpin7prkpdntoumi6c33vpic0qf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg62ob6c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeuqcjkpt43to1hjeri9oflvj6h2lkortr4cvldg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg62ob6c3h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

1600 Daily

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72887903/436713342/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjNkMmRlZC1iZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Gbq6bWiF7k17YGEun6nmTFkpSQhbbIvmQv4EMdXrD8=&emci=4b485d0c-b77c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=f23d2ded-bf7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | We’ll keep this quick, team. Tomorrow, there are critical elections all across the country, and Georgia is home to a bunch of them.

We need to ensure that Democrats across the state are turning out to vote in the 2023 municipal elections, and that means two things:
1. We need your help reaching Georgia voters. name: Team DeSantis
subject: You won't want to miss this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
One big campaign night for the DeSantis Team. 7:00 PM ET. Will you be there?
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---

Friend,
Governor DeSantis is hosting the campaign rally of the year, with Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds stepping up to the stage right next to him.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---
**_Hundreds of Iowans will be showing up in Des Moines, Iowa, TONIGHT to hear about the comeback our nation is about to embark on when Ron DeSantis is leading America.**_[**_Will you be tuning in?_**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)_**_**
---
| | [Be a part of the night HERE](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---
Americans are standing up to support Ron DeSantis, and we are counting on you to keep driving our momentum forward.[**__**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017d9096b7b341fd0dac06df34be133a717219510725b438b3fcef7b511ebb61b16f6fa2bcad4318134f07569b0df7da378)We want to tell the Governor that our team stepped up right before he took the stage. **Can you help us show him how excited the team is?** **_**_**_[**_Chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can afford before Ron DeSantis takes the stage tonight with Kim Reynolds at our BIG rally in Des Moines!_**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)_**_**_**
---
| | | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e572001700e25d1c1fa149f4e95f168a29d43003d56ab7867117cc83fe69803b98fc12d600230c16499be8fb6dfe717309723112)
---
| | | [DONATE $15 NOW](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017a3cf07c1be69802f631918b59682223973e4de88556015dea3664bb262630b2b0f96a5dd4736249ebdf9aa238b94fcd7)
---
| | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---

Being on Team DeSantis means scoring an invite to all our top moments. And this is yours. **The entire nation will be talking about this rally by the time it's over.**

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017fdd9c2e798f09f4e0bfa9527a74da076d4cd54b34fca99b772eb7f2d9b12e298213d3292bc0cfccfe40e42f676b8ed5f)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017966207ea8fd685785b933f0fb7e07fcc42701f0066c5203df421e318d60601ac201233cd3165dbd5e933c33406341121 "here.")**
---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e57200171a0dc434c72e7f66a47456ceea1f00ba1515db4750e113bfdb7e424814d09a5d94c90fa5bf705872eb99ca16924cc56d)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c355a759e5720017df65e483eb6ed2b92c6987750630d6cc0cfd14571754321541cefc329640fb1657c395bac70e88cfa7640c0f69a80165)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315
[Update Profile](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf01283073743178971e5351778eac1e018f9864ab8ebf7d05779fce9e834309eeb972d6176f658a9b78ef40cf7f3ea0b8e3ccd66b4877e97370dc8a6de2) [Manage Subscriptions](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/subscription_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf0128307374135a06279d47327f58a07fdc061c3fbadeee526600351e177f564cd40ae70d446b2f416b830b95862963e1995f016daa923f8f4c207f1c0a) [Unsubscribe](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf0128307374135a06279d47327f58a07fdc061c3fbadeee526600351e17228100cd9b791db2ee08fe7cc905005a704d466243b4ca2f4ce8a21ee39783686e851e4700d029fa)

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Fwd: Election Eve Update - Shelby County Republican Party
body:
Hello Shelby County Patriots,

Tomorrow, Tuesday, November 7, 2023 is the big day we’ve been working toward for months now!

Life is literally on the line in Ohio tomorrow. If you haven’t already voted, please be sure to get out tomorrow and vote! And please go the extra mile to ensure friends, family, and acquaintances don’t forget to vote NO on Issues 1 & 2 either!

Although over 4,150 ballots have already been cast in Shelby County, representing about 13% of our registered voters, we still expect voting to be brisk tomorrow. Please be prepared for waits at different times throughout the day. If you’re not sure where your polling location is, you can look it up here: <https://lookup.boe.ohio.gov/vtrapp/shelby/pollfinder.aspx>

The groups trying to pass Issue 1 have set new lows in both the contents of the amendment and in their tactics to pass it. They want us to believe there is no way we can defeat it so some of us will not show up at the polls tomorrow. Please don’t allow that tactic to work on you or on anyone you know. Things have been trending in our direction as the truth about this amendment has been getting out. I believe we have a very real chance of defeating this disastrous amendment. The collaboration between groups around the state and the nation to defeat this amendment is unprecedented. We can do this together! Let’s sprint through the finish line!

Say NO to abortion extremism, loss of parental rights, transgender experimentation on our kids, and further erosion of the family! Vote NO on Issues 1 & 2!

May God Bless you, our state, and our nation!

Dan Cecil
Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party
(937) 206-2970
[cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: Election Day is TOMORROW
body:
Polls open at 6 AM! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e8d634703534/my-work-is-far-from-finished-6210096?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend- We’ve finally made it - **today is the final day of my campaign for re-election as your delegate! ** With the finish line now just HOURS away, now is by far the most important time to make sure we do everything we can to stay ahead of my Democrat opponent. I’m ready to continue prioritizing legislation that will cut taxes, create good-paying jobs, crack down on violent crime, and expand opportunities for veterans - but I need your help to continue this important work.

**If you haven’t voted already, remember that POLLS OPEN TOMORROW at your regular polling location. They’re open from 6:00AM - 7:00PM, and you can find your nearest location to vote here:**
---
| [Find Your Polling Location](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=af8d1da25c&e=48b883ea87 "Find Your Polling Location")
---
| I am incredibly humbled to witness the momentum our campaign has built up over the past few months, and truly grateful for all of the support we have received so far. But right now, if we let up even for a second, we risk giving up all of this incredible progress right at the last moment of the race. Help keep Virginia Beach RED, and make sure to vote tomorrow if you haven’t already! Every vote truly makes a difference in a race as tight as this one. **Make a plan to vote at your polling location today! ** Thank you!
---
| [Find Your Polling Location](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=89794d5973&e=48b883ea87 "Find Your Polling Location")

Make a plan to vote at your polling location today! Thank you! | "Find Your Polling Location" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I know God is not done with America yet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

|
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40328762cd3f4635a9d03ba979ddd572&_e=5KMIlfj9rrc0lLJDVr08cUh1L2v--Y3r-_8oBTUmEbNicjw1sjXoxHS27eTIqsbtRsGq39ZiJwUpZ_iIOEH46WGRQyxBQMDZkQn-vW3-vySMT3TaAQTdcQbif1MeVC2GI0g9XBj8ICeenJDgFH5bZ_Cyb2WiNLKIEy_d9fY914i-tqTno7iYjoZ8WVdfAMmDl7ooVRkPYalU5ghU9VbP-WMbmmk82bPNZ1nnAirP1fOvJK49eANlGY4kYfglFyVPaqaKVcLd6Gzm31XJd1-adcfdZ8rr0s2sxoIfHovPqmdjorCPBppoA83xsZ4u-cYN4ji9LzFuErC7Wjd-R8hlwDWlWZnO8E5lJ3FPbLnw-1yMmmRfnE6WL-GJWTOGuwYy)
---
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40328762cd3f4635a9d03ba979ddd572&_e=5KMIlfj9rrc0lLJDVr08cUh1L2v--Y3r-_8oBTUmEbNicjw1sjXoxHS27eTIqsbtRsGq39ZiJwUpZ_iIOEH46WGRQyxBQMDZkQn-vW3-vySMT3TaAQTdcQbif1MeVC2GI0g9XBj8ICeenJDgFH5bZ_Cyb2WiNLKIEy_d9fY914i-tqTno7iYjoZ8WVdfAMmDl7ooVRkPYalU5ghU9VbP-WMbmmk82bPNZ1nnAirP1fNaiKbV7nGdMpyCARvQ433Hj-mB8AzkvWU_75OLLdJZumxyFB05IsqzLru0LflGWAZdK8Rtqq-KGT_N5Z-9teNirZgse5AQRb1dDn5R5LoH26cdyJC2d2YI4eM7-lJBoLqXGWR4Xly8tmjc1TDP_ZLs)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40328762cd3f4635a9d03ba979ddd572&_e=5KMIlfj9rrc0lLJDVr08cUh1L2v--Y3r-_8oBTUmEbNicjw1sjXoxHS27eTIqsbtRsGq39ZiJwUpZ_iIOEH46WGRQyxBQMDZkQn-vW3-vySMT3TaAQTdcQbif1MeVC2GI0g9XBj8ICeenJDgFH5bZ_Cyb2WiNLKIEy_d9fY914i-tqTno7iYjoZ8WVdfAMmDl7ooVRkPYalU5ghU9VbP-WMbmmk82bPNZ1nnAirP1fMp0l4Xqi3Q_nHQR-izrdEv8WnNXSHhMALoeDVDPMwq2z0ksNRmKiUfjh50sPgfaYZ9m5uK3ODvuAU-nDTcHoWjBaNked-x4-LcYOlF8pv_N0rSGC5kFYe3pOj1BIhbjiuYNcmkl0kJcqvyaX1l89hZ)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. I know our country is in desperate need of prayer. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfsump36vb7po5s0cjg9ssb3efbuu28plh2ur598_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg66oj4cth2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjj6nvllcuvrvi9q9dsf4uq70riugp90djqc6ghg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg66oj4cth2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bmkv2ns2162u8vts2sqbrjk7hr4ao3u2odesf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg66oj4cth2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

GOP Presidential

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, On October 7th, Hamas terrorists committed the worst mass slaughter of Jews since the Holocaust. _They raped countless women. They beheaded children and babies. And they murdered over 1,000 Israeli citizens._ This terrorist attack is one of the most despicable displays of pure evil in my lifetime – and it infuriates me that Joe Biden and the Democrats paid for it. The truth is that Iran funded Hamas's horrific attack on Israel, and just weeks ago, the Biden administration unfroze $16 billion in Iranian assets. The corporate media desperately wants to hide this fact. But make no mistake – Joe Biden's weakness led to this attack, just like the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal and Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. As long as I serve in the U.S. Senate, _I will fight like hell to hold the Biden Democrats' feet to the fire_ for their appeasement of our enemies. **[Please make a generous donation to hold Joe Biden accountable for funding terrorists who want to destroy the United States and the State of Israel.](http://trk.tedcruz._nw)**
---
[**DONATE NOW TO HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE >>** ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
My potential Democrat opponent Colin Allred urged the Biden administration to send your tax dollars to Gaza, even though it was _marked as “High Risk” for falling into the hands of terrorists_. If you, like most Texans and Americans, oppose funding terrorists, **[please chip in $5, $10, $25, or more](http://trk.tedcruz._bEWbqAZWMIkc0nKRDyQYw)** to help me defeat him next year. The stakes have never been higher, and we need EVERY patriot in this fight. Thanks in advance for your support. For Liberty,

**Everything from increasing access to affordable housing, defending the right to choose, lowering health care costs, and protecting democracy itself will be on the line. **That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to win this election, flip the House blue, and elect a Congress that puts working families first, not the far-right special interests.
But I can only win this election with the help of dedicated Democrats like yourself.
[_**Will you chip in any amount to help my team and me reach the voters we need for victory? clean_body: Election Day is less than one year away, team. Look, I know that may sound like a long time, but with 2024 just around the corner, it’s critically important to get a head start on this battleground election. = | | = In less than one year, voters will go to the polls to determine our country’s path for the next four years. And with so much at stake, it’s more important than ever to support Democrats up and down the ballot. Everything from increasing access to affordable housing, defending the right to choose, lowering health care costs, and protecting democracy itself will be on the line. That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to win this election, flip the House blue, and elect a Congress that puts working families first, not the far-right special interests. But I can only win this election with the help of dedicated Democrats like yourself. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you for having my back in this important race — I’m truly grateful for your support. – Brittany | Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. body:
when everything could change

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72890030/436720552/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY2NmVmMS1jNDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R42Z_dWIbSdcHBZKqyYfbNpqL_675cKZ2PpD10IeREs=&emci=d729189d-bd7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=25666ef1-c47c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Well, Derek, happy Election Day eve. I’m sure many of you, like me, are feeling quite nervous. It’s a big day tomorrow. **Reminder: Republicans haven’t collectively controlled the House of Delegates, the Virginia Senate, and the governor’s office _for a decade_.** And we don’t even have to imagine what a GOP-controlled Virginia would be... Republicans have literally spelled it out for us. It all starts with an abortion ban and it doesn't stop there – attacks on voting rights, rolling back gun control, and anti-LGBTQ legislation are all on the docket. I don’t know about you, but I really don’t want to see that. We have to keep the General Assembly out of Republican hands tomorrow, Derek. __[**So I’m asking: Can you donate $5 tonight to help us reach our $14,000 fundraising goal before the polls close tomorrow so we can spend these final hours fighting to elect Democrats to all 140 seats in the legislature?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72890031/436720553/701577722?refcode=mw_em_231106_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY2NmVmMS1jNDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R42Z_dWIbSdcHBZKqyYfbNpqL_675cKZ2PpD10IeREs=)__ Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72890032/436720554/701577722?refcode=mw_em_231106_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY2NmVmMS1jNDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R42Z_dWIbSdcHBZKqyYfbNpqL_675cKZ2PpD10IeREs=)********

name: Membership Alerts [via Team Haley]
subject: Will you join Nikki’s team before she takes the stage?
body:
I’m running for President because we have a country to save!
{{md5_hash}}
| |
---
| | |
Friend, _are you ready to officially join Nikki’s team as we gear up for Nikki's third presidential debate? _

Nikki believes you would be the perfect addition to our team, and we're thrilled to offer you the chance to secure your official Ambassador's Circle membership card right now!

---
| | [ACCEPT MY MEMBERSHIP](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uTI8ULToSxOLqRYkEJugSA&sysid=1)
---

If you're a patriotic American eager to show your support for Nikki before she steps onto the debate stage, **[there's no reason to wait--join her Ambassador's Circle today!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aYFARwL91i8eMOOME5IZZg&sysid=1 "there's no reason to
wait—join her Ambassador's Circle today!")

[Our membership drive wraps up on November 8, and we want every freedom-loving American to take this opportunity to join us with a donation of ONLY $15 today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eVL01n2XK6UgtkX1aCE2BQ&sysid=1 "Our membership drive wraps
up on November 8, and we want every freedom-loving American to take this
opportunity to join us with a donation of ONLY $15 today.")

The best part is, by joining us, you'll also enjoy these exclusive benefits:**

🔘 Your very own personalized membership card
🔘 Access to exclusive news and updates
🔘 Special discounts on campaign merchandise
🔘 Exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpses from the campaign trail
🔘 AND SO MUCH MORE...

---
| | [ACCEPT MY MEMBERSHIP](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uTI8ULToSxOLqRYkEJugSA&sysid=1)
---

**[With a contribution of just $15 or more, you'll become a valued member of Nikki Haley's exclusive Ambassador’s Circle and play a pivotal role in winning the White House and strengthening our nation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35036%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ixrZ%2frlX3V1SLAUwhLnr6w&sysid=1 "With a contribution of
just $15 or more, you'll become a valued member of Nikki Haley's exclusive
Ambassador’s Circle and play a pivotal role in winning the White House and
strengthening our nation.")**

Thank you in advance for joining our team!

Team Haley

---
| | [ACCEPT MY MEMBERSHIP](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uTI8ULToSxOLqRYkEJugSA&sysid=1)

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35037%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9ldhozH4r8xdH4yv45yAZg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35038%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XmtUtzLfuO1c4ydkA374qg&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35039%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ICqMv%2fkCLoFn2us6makifQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35030%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqqGYjjUqsjb9zrmROAEZA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35031%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZsLF%2bGyka6tG4IQ6xEHHg&sysid=1 "DONATE")

You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35034%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Cfmtm5Tntf1U221lcHPYg&sysid=1). [Terms and conditions](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35033%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pvwisfm%2bb2O7dd5i6KYiKw&sysid=1).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35045%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pFaiuqXVy17WiCW8bVJ3Dg&sysid=1)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for video recordings relating to the death of the Obamas’ personal chef Tafari Campbell in July 2023, in the Edgartown Great Pond | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 6, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for video recordings relating to the death of the Obamas’ personal chef Tafari Campbell in July 2023, in the Edgartown Great Pond (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security (No. 1:23-cv-03194)). Judicial Watch recently uncovered the existence of a Secret Service video tied to the incident in response to a separate public records request. ---|--- | | | | | Shortly after the world began learning the details of the massacre of Israeli civilians on October 7, Hillary Clinton published a note of support on X for “everyone affected by the horrific attacks by Hamas” and expressing “strong support of our ally,” Israel. The former secretary of state had nothing to say about one of Hamas’s key allies, the energy-rich kingdom of Qatar, and not surprisingly: Qatar is not only an important friend of the U.S. in the region but also for many years was a generous patron of Bill and Hillary Clinton. ---|--- | | | | | In one of the most recent Afghanistan debacles, the Taliban has established fraudulent non-governmental organizations (NGO) to loot the hundreds of millions of dollars in humanitarian aid that the United States has sent Afghanistan since the 2021 military withdraw. NGOs are typically nonprofits with humanitarian missions that supposedly work to improve public or social welfare. ---|--- | | | | | The situation along the Mexican border is worse than ever with yet another record-breaking year for illegal immigration that ended fiscal 2023 with an appalling 2.48 million migrants, surpassing what was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. In September, the last month of the fiscal year, federal agents encountered a whopping 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an all-time high for a single month and a substantial increase over August when Customs and Border Protection (CBP) encountered 232,963 migrants. ---|--- | | | Hungarian Conservative This is a very schizophrenic situation: the Biden administration says all the right words and they even dispatched an aircraft carrier battle group, a huge navy force. But that’s largely a publicity stunt. That is not a real military threat to anyone. It’s just sort of a demonstration. But while they say things about protecting Israel, they’re frantically engaged in an effort to support Iran, who we know is trying to build a nuclear weapon. New York Post New photos show the “filth” and unsafe conditions in which an illegal Chinese-owned lab in California carried out risky research on mice genetically altered to carry COVID-19, according to records obtained by a conservative legal group. Townhall According to 1,719 pages of documents from the City of San Francisco, obtained by Judicial Watch, San Francisco will allocate tax dollars on a preferential basis for black and Latino transgender individuals through a program that offers financial assistance to transgender people. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

Trying to figure out what we can say to convince you to make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today.
Let’s try this. Recognize these names?

Alex Jones

name: Andrew Wynne [Fair Courts America]
subject: BREAKING: Amy Coney Barrett under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Their chants reveal an even darker goal...

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpqi7n9tcsq9cqnjshlq54iiktaoqqgcivgi7deg_)
---
Fellow Patriot, You would think that a group of young law students at the University of Minnesota would be excited to attend a speech by a sitting Supreme Court Justice...

But you’d be wrong.

Because when Justice Amy Coney Barrett took the stage to speak, police had to drag out protestors with the intent on disrupting her speech.

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zevovcd5vcn8o8rcieqrcsba7f1ade0n5b3pvjp8_)
---
What were they shouting? A whole bunch of leftist slogans and promises to “shut this s--- down!" _ _ But here’s the most revealing thing they said: _"Not the court, not the state, people must decide their fate!"__ _ Fellow Patriot, it’s disheartening that the attendees at a law school lecture reject the Court’s legitimacy entirely. _ _ But that tracks how we see the woke mob treating an independent judiciary: as an obstacle to be destroyed._ _ **Just look at how the radical left treated the Supreme Court when they overturned**** _Roe v. Wade..._**
* ** _Mobs in front of the Supreme Court..._**
* ** _Protests at the homes of Supreme Court Justices..._**
* **_Calls for impeachment..._**
* _**_Even death threats._**___

**_Our justice system is under attack. We must fight back!_****
---
**[Fair Courts America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3cm0uqnljij0blgtfjfap3m6ajcfiovpcv0qa7o_)** was founded to protect the freedom and fairness of our judicial system. **That means keeping the radicals away from our country's courts.** We are tracking the woke mob’s activity and are ready to fight for our courts at every level of government — but we can’t do it without you. **_Donate to the Court Defense Fund to support our efforts!_**
---

---

---
[**DONATE $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ujqvksievfa5fs1rss5dqr32mgggdr44o2n21g_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61o32clh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zetkv5nvp21l157bso7m8ii8mqtckd2smr3hn8v8_)

name: Jay Jones
subject: Have you made your plan to vote tomorrow?
body:
Friend,
Tomorrow is Election Day so I'm writing to make sure you've made your plan to vote.
Polls are open from 6:00am-7:00pm, and you can click here [https://iwillvote.com] to confirm your polling location and make sure you have an acceptable form of identification.
Glenn Youngkin, Jason Miyares, and Republicans up and down the ticket will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks and restrict a woman's right to choose and push their far-right agenda in our public schools. Meanwhile, Democrats are defending the rights of every day Virginians and making sure no one is left behind. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jay_jones_q4?refcode=20231106]
Control of the Senate and House of Delegates is going to come down to the wire so please consider a contribution of $25 or more to help fund our efforts to get out every last vote tomorrow! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jay_jones_q4?refcode=20231106]
See you at the polls!
- Jay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jay_jones_q4?refcode=20231106]
