name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Tomorrow Virginia will determine the fate of abortion access in the South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend -
This is important. Tomorrow, the voters of Virginia will determine the fate of abortion access in the South at the polls.
Tomorrow’s election is critical.
If Republicans win control of the State Senate and the House of Delegates, Virginia’s extremist governor, Glenn Youngkin, will have the power to target abortion access — that includes a total and complete abortion ban.
Democrats are working around the clock to protect reproductive freedom in Virginia, the last safe haven for abortion access in the South. But extremist Republicans are not backing down.
Virginia Republicans have continued to introduce abortion ban after abortion ban all year. Up until now, Democrats have been protecting reproductive freedom with their narrow majority in the Senate. But Republicans are laser-focused on winning total control. And if they win the trifecta, nothing will stand in their way of banning abortion.
We cannot leave any stone unturned in this final stretch. Reproductive healthcare access for millions is on the line.
So with less than 48 hours until the polls close, it’s time to do everything we can to ensure Democrats can make it to the polls tomorrow in Virginia and vote blue up and down the ballot.
[**Can you please split a $5 contribution between the Virginia Democrats and The Long Run to get Democrats to the polls and vote blue tomorrow? This is our final chance to ensure Southern Americans continue to have access to safe abortion care.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=1&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.nhtdqO&amount=5&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=20&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.qxLCgi&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=21&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.VvwwR5&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=22&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.EL0O58&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=23&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.ob4oOr&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=24&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231106-1-t2&t=25&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
This is an election we cannot afford to lose. Thank you in advance for your contribution.
Mandela Barnes

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=4982_196590_N8GlWJ&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4982%2E196590%2EN8GlWJ)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Informed citizenship
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qkwoToHceIB6Pn3poLZybNEzWPE_6l2L2xDY4a8zgZwokr3nDhpQOZveanNhWkXAdaFrQK1eNvcsmQ1ugi375d7_5k3z-M-6UPlXi72yXYCKuWSrZw8_nynSjJzo1CTtYDLYAEVcAdg0yokDoZNhld0w%3D%3D)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qkPnV7sD2kTL1Kcykg_D0AVgeSm5yO6_wBZbJ_koICQSSplWqqhAR0rhjgZwHvqXlAz-qFwxBWoG6udReM6e-wFhzg1fHe_rY9JaixKKF7C9O9xbNbuP5YG1u0zQWoVjqrws8ktE0xTfPPLTTS6nP8yw%3D%3D)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qkLOLEDeot7tE6lXY-v7fM-8VTux1YSoLv4hhIQ3F1gbn2-2gf7ljsuw1tNj7VIwjbuQLptfS_srNH13M_3J_N_yk2hCRQ7FOrIW6i6JruQP32Zlm1tWiDuu5bOoSWYmm2i7w80FpWpiJoNmRzvPByjA%3D%3D) [No](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qkIRdRDZXn-kJvZWEi0yndzY3zT4nCl-KtVj2yR7avtWZDJP30e0yZsNdYEK4JexWMXK6GjlHXVGEGGsbjCvh8d7KwwF2Vkerh5iUTFD10Tyo9mFUCE06GkJ6LV3rEJwO96kGNAMIZJDDnnsj7nWwNEw%3D%3D) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qkErdd4XCpOJbTzDd7Bf9SejqY3RztpRQd_NFklun9jGviKgQCtpUjnKjLbFjRl0X-Vn6WcGQ9CtVt1gOLhT7aFb8JkNr42XrUX4hrRDERQ2o7KP-ULAkXb4PGBtIQnUGmRV39jVFbHx-PdVm106U0_Q%3D%3D) We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7603862d32c4494489b5936d8399e739&_e=SsM0uWjcTGIgwJXxjbbin8GjkvNDuLHF-jDfn9Eg-Sck1FDqX7sKLwk7q_sJda7EUfXnYzRQI28wvwEpBDlrKGB9Fk6q9YiSNjT6DAGM8qMgjXoz19FqxEXuV1r5vqZx4b0Gps0c9KYv-nNAYR06vmWm8gFKDae18FrL6SCuQA49vKiMh-eVAnAK3itSlxl6LyC0mdI_UOFDsckCZQnrceBlF72SErSNVuMkiYj74VWpSCe8ruDnz3U4rFS0F7qk1jbSH_kb_rMaDhKGoGpwblkLBSgCUMMvFhuByPGjFzkcp9HpT7_pPnvyqBA5ur2QxGGXGANnf7Z37Ac5xnMhfibwFnXLVsTbQNkfiTsZzLr96GCez8dSGl4BVgEGZTAVWrU_isCZ6UsAHRchPqHq4w%3D%3D) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I need your input before I take the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Together, we can take America First to the next level.

|
Fellow American - the third Presidential Debate is just days away.

Before Wednesday night, I want to hear from you:

|
1. _**Are you registered to vote in the 2024 Republican Presidential Primary?**_

**[✅ YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81pqgodj41tr2kv2l33b3cegu0263k1o1040fbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**
**[❌ NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8vttq4tqq1fbuh4holb3t0eprd0gbces0us8seg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**

2. _**Will you be watching the third Presidential Debate?**_

**[✅ YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrm6jkdsboget7b5mceq9kf5npjglpr7lhps5rbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**
**[❌ NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0g7td0q7sqace7jomkde0uatgsgqo7p5u8gvq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**
**[❓ UNDECIDED](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81hnm8gma1ic9nhpunhjf4fcpggjsqvjvmtb3r8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**

3. _**What question or topic do you want to see the candidates and myself debate?**_

| [** SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbqbjr55acigm9cdteml9ljkuqcdlehdka6dm8u8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)
---

The truth is, right now I am the only presidential candidate with a plan for the issues facing America today. From reviving our national identity to unleashing our economy and declaring economic independence from communist China, to preventing World War III, my vision is focused on national revival, not a national divorce. **Together, we can take America First to the next level.**

**[Let me know if you will be tuning into the debate to see for yourself, Fellow American, and what issues you'll be looking forward to most!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fk75obs0so8irmvsrmbh6lc6n5pah93jacbtc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvocc1joeqc4iaa8gmrj3j0peust7eulkm3m98tg_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** BEGIN PRE-DEBATE POLL ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gf449dij222q1fsn4rqhcsdbfrm84e0fh1lsi8_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5066vt72qnekoteqsbf19pm09bqcm2cpv4v3no_rp22sh2s8i66p74spg61p70c3h2bs)

Laura Loomer interviewed political commentator and filmmaker Dinesh D'Souza about his latest film, _Police State_. In collaboration with radio host Dan Bongino, _Police State_ exposes the dark truth behind the defaming, de-platforming, and political persecution of conservatives, namely Trump supporters, in Biden's America.
**WATCH LAURA LOOMER 'S INTERVIEW OF DINESH D'SOUZA ON RUMBLE HERE:**
**[https://rumble.com/v3rgph1-emmer-defeated-speaker-race-loomered-dinesh-dsouza-dishes-on-police-state.html](https://substack.com/redirect/e3dd1e63-e008-4865-9418-130feefaec0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ec4a87b-2bc1-4e46-9f4e-eb8ce7b2c33c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Loomer and D'Souza have both been persecuted for their outspoken political opinions, leading to de-platforming on social media, de-banking from Chase Bank, and, in D'Souza's case, a felony charge. The discussion focused on the dangers of dehumanizing people for their political views.
"The terms of de-platforming and the concept of de-platforming was developed...as a counter-terrorism tactic," Loomer said. "De-platforming originally was created by the FBI and federal law enforcement agencies as a way to counter online recruitment for Islamic terrorist organizations. De-banking was done, similarly, to freeze the bank accounts of Islamic terrorists across the world and in America, from terror financing."
"But now we see the same tactics being weaponized in conjunction with social media," Loomer pointed out. "We learned from the tech hearings they're working on private cloud server technology to censor and silence conservatives. Were you able, in this film, to interview any tech executives as well or anybody within the social media companies? Because we know that there's this sinister relationship between big tech and the DOJ [Department of Justice] in how they target Trump supporters."
"We certainly have whistleblowers from Google, from YouTube, from Facebook...in the movie telling shocking things about the government collusion, but also about the arrogance of these digital platforms," D'Souza responded, highlighting that it's not just the government that's in on the persecution. "One of the themes that Google has been stressing to its employees is that they're not just a search engine. They're not just a facilitator of people finding out information. In fact, they see their task as one of - and I kid you not - programming human beings. They believe that human beings are sort of programmable, and the way you program a human being is you control the flow of information."
"This rhetoric is not only exaggerated, but it's dangerous," D'Souza said of Trump supporters being portrayed as "cult members." "It is a dehumanization that is often a prelude to incarceration."
_Police State_ is available for purchase now via [Rumble](https://substack.com/redirect/a512300c-5246-45b1-bced-9288e6caf032?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [SalemNow](https://substack.com/redirect/69a97cc0-1f12-4b8b-b2e1-8466ed940018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [EpochTV](https://substack.com/redirect/9476b397-f515-468f-b526-6f077ad8212e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [DVD](https://substack.com/redirect/93e5642b-32c5-4caf-a0ef-6031d2c79964?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Visit [policestatefilm.net](https://substack.com/redirect/2d6c06ba-1270-48bc-b914-238e16ab4467?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to learn more and purchase the film.

In collaboration with radio host Dan Bongino, Police State exposes the dark truth behind the defaming, de-platforming, and political persecution of conservatives, namely Trump supporters, in Biden's America. WATCH LAURA LOOMER 'S INTERVIEW OF DINESH D'SOUZA ON RUMBLE HERE: | | ---|---|--- Loomer and D'Souza have both been persecuted for their outspoken political opinions, leading to de-platforming on social media, de-banking from Chase Bank, and, in D'Souza's case, a felony charge. The discussion focused on the dangers of dehumanizing people for their political views. "The terms of de-platforming and the concept of de-platforming was developed...as a counter-terrorism tactic," Loomer said. "De-platforming originally was created by the FBI and federal law enforcement agencies as a way to counter online recruitment for Islamic terrorist organizations. De-banking was done, similarly, to freeze the bank accounts of Islamic terrorists across the world and in America, from terror financing." "But now we see the same tactics being weaponized in conjunction with social media," Loomer pointed out. "We learned from the tech hearings they're working on private cloud server technology to censor and silence conservatives. Were you able, in this film, to interview any tech executives as well or anybody within the social media companies? Because we know that there's this sinister relationship between big tech and the DOJ [Department of Justice] in how they target Trump supporters." "We certainly have whistleblowers from Google, from YouTube, from Facebook...in the movie telling shocking things about the government collusion, but also about the arrogance of these digital platforms," D'Souza responded, highlighting that it's not just the government that's in on the persecution. "One of the themes that Google has been stressing to its employees is that they're not just a search engine. They're not just a facilitator of people finding out information. In fact, they see their task as one of - and I kid you not - programming human beings. They believe that human beings are sort of programmable, and the way you program a human being is you control the flow of information." "This rhetoric is not only exaggerated, but it's dangerous," D'Souza said of Trump supporters being portrayed as "cult members." "It is a dehumanization that is often a prelude to incarceration." Police State is available for purchase now via , , , and . Visit to learn more and purchase the film. Watch Laura's full interview with Dinesh D'Souza: Donate to support Laura Loomer 's investigative journalism here: | | ---|---|--- Join the Loomer Community To read more articles like this, sign up and join my community today You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Laura Loomer Laura Loomer, PO Box 1038, Lady Lake, FL 32159 ? ?

subject: Climate can't wait - neither can we
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress

| | |

clean_body: | | | You probably don’t need us to tell you, but Congress isn’t working for the people or a livable planet. Our climate crisis is bearing down on us, but as the clock ticks and our options narrow, Derek’s opponent Rep. Jay Obernolte voted to eliminate critical funding for renewable energy and conservation. Derek Marshall’s climate leadership and his servant’s heart will be a game changer in Congress! But just like with the climate crisis, time is of the essence. We have to make our fundraising goals to win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. In Congress, Derek won’t put climate justice on the back burner - there’s no time! He will put people and the planet over profits. He doesn’t take fossil fuel money or money from greedy corporations. He’s come this far because of the generous support of pro-climate champs like you! We can’t let up! name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day! Make Your Plan to Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this special edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Make Your Plan To Vote in Tomorrow's Election!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/11.6.jpg]
Are you ready to head to the polls tomorrow to cast your vote in the judicial and municipal election? Making a vote plan ahead of time by asking yourself a few simple questions is an important yet easy step!
Question 1: What time will I go vote?
Polls are open from 7AM-8PM but remember that election day is on a Tuesday so think about what you have going on this upcoming Tuesday (work, school, etc.) and plan to vote in a time window that you're free.
Question 2: Where do I vote?
Just because you know where you've voted in the past, doesn't mean that your polling location hasn't changed since the last election. Click here [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx?&emci=d3d9c5f0-597a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] to double check where your polling location is so you head to the right place to cast your ballot.
Question 3: Do I need ID?
In Pennsylvania, you only need to show ID if it's your first time voting or your first time voting at a new precinct. For a full list of acceptable IDs, click here [https://www.vote.pa.gov/Register-to-Vote/Pages/Voter-ID-for-First-Time-Voters.aspx?&emci=d3d9c5f0-597a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] .
Question 4: Who am I voting for?
It's important that we have justices who will protect our voting rights, protect our right to an abortion, and ensure our schools are funded -- and that's why the New Pennsylvania Project is encouraging everyone to vote for Judge Dan McCaffery for PA Supreme Court! If you're not sure who else is on your ballot, check out this sample ballot locator [https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/sample-ballots/] from affiliated organization the New PA Project Education Fund.
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/2_2.png]
Bonus Question 5: Who is coming with me to vote?
Everyone could use a little reminder to make their voting plan and cast their ballot tomorrow. Ask yourself -- who are three people in my network I can contact today to remind them that election day is tomorrow? Voting is more fun when you bring a friend!
Voter Protection Hotlines
ANY QUESTIONS OR ISSUES VOTING? Contact one of the voter assistance hotlines below with any questions about things like: envelopes included with your ballot, where to bring your ballot, if you have a negative experience at the drop box or polling place, or anything else you want to ask or report about your voting experience.
*
Voter
Protection
Hotline:
1-866-OUR-VOTE
*
DOS
PA
Voter
Hotline:
1-877-VOTESPA

*
Spanish/English
Hotline:
1-888-VE-Y-VOTA

*
Asian
Languages
Hotline:
1-888-API-VOTE

*
Arabic/English
Hotline:
1-844-YALLA-US
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPP%20Social%20copy.jpg]
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.

Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

clean_body: It’s important. | I want to tell you about one of my favorite numbers: $26. That’s the average grassroots contribution made to emails like this one. | = See, this is what separates us from bought-and-paid-for politicians like my opponent, Anthony D'Esposito. I won't take a penny of corporate PAC money, and I am proud of that. Grassroots donors like you are the backbone of this campaign, and with your support — we can flip this key battleground district blue, take back the House for Democrats, and stop the extreme MAGA agenda in Washington.= Let me be clear: Your support isn’t just about dollars. It’s about protecting reproductive rights, defending our democracy, lowering the cost of child care, passing common-sense gun safety laws, and so much more. I know we have what it takes to do it. But we still have a long road ahead of us, and the only way we can take on the GOP machine and their corporate interests is if we start building up our grassroots war chest now. = = = Thanks so much for your support, Kevin Thomas Democrat for Congress, NY-04 = | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b42143847264f4e989f35e4523ca82e&_e=IpEwzfSR1Z7hPg4MUPcx7k_4DlR46eE8fAkV1PrN5319qlbOBRjwtijKPkqO_-RHbGeaRFkylGT85tFbVIGjhXWzyf1PXfteEmOKpeReM06ZhdYR1B5L4VX4BWagA9oBdohLX0wngplAakJr9lvJ5RFY9ZX-6t8z9HA4nF4LA2Cmr3mjVvZC1kk5OOHLfP2a1kqA9BcWP1c1PW_WGvsBmyOwrRpxotqvC3GTmiNW0ftFABgJ57veJCCd0UotFgEaDN-B0jc7thfl11xSCg8IYcLjIkAvNQWNhBEXq7ssWpGgZgA8Zr2kMcxOOdMndwT3BxqEOVHQ-ycOaSqvDisTN4kzn_QO2x_-h59pnaHzivowVBc_4fCN12-oSesfYme0)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b42143847264f4e989f35e4523ca82e&_e=IpEwzfSR1Z7hPg4MUPcx7k_4DlR46eE8fAkV1PrN5319qlbOBRjwtijKPkqO_-RHbGeaRFkylGT85tFbVIGjhXWzyf1PXfteEmOKpeReM06ZhdYR1B5L4VX4BWagA9oBdohLX0wngplAakJr9lvJ5RFY9ZX-6t8z9HA4nF4LA2Cmr3mjVvZC1kk5OOHLfP2a1kqA9BcWP1c1PW_WGvsBmyOwrRpxotqvC3GTmiNW0fsKnPoePZohhRohMaeeXs9SB9JnjznHU8BrBtOllJ892PW0GtqFzOqVbfYApn-FAUGznuDKs09mrwTReHBpJ6xIrKL_0STbj35ijqnvYxir1jRUb-2Bz1zftF423fb8TBuLr5C-btzItiIFmDVdSJY2)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b42143847264f4e989f35e4523ca82e&_e=IpEwzfSR1Z7hPg4MUPcx7k_4DlR46eE8fAkV1PrN5319qlbOBRjwtijKPkqO_-RHbGeaRFkylGT85tFbVIGjhXWzyf1PXfteEmOKpeReM06ZhdYR1B5L4VX4BWagA9oBdohLX0wngplAakJr9lvJ5RFY9ZX-6t8z9HA4nF4LA2Cmr3mjVvZC1kk5OOHLfP2a1kqA9BcWP1c1PW_WGvsBmyOwrRpxotqvC3GTmiNW0fsFLsUozvZhW4dz3mqLDjwiUgQf-A_JhPiSDHYMiRozmPMibFISlrms_5LHuCrNcq8kivvUV1kv7WZ9waghHvWwMNieXqCGQtK_XczG8YReMwRk91E6M3pz3c0PQD6-kHOABdqbe89X8TUh9dg2ys1K)

Mike Johnson

name: Your America
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EcNO2%2f8HuUXmMJ1cPWqoVw&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LUPu1AEiOPVlK0%2fAvIs3Ng&sysid=1)**_

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z94blfLu31%2bMcruMVXEAZw&sysid=1) [No](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0XFxHd7Q1o7LTcuVMvRl0A&sysid=1) [Not Sure / Don't Know](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P%2bZJzkB5wjBhyv%2fzXm02DQ&sysid=1)
We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35152%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CDi%2fwr%2buPzNakpDxdrqZvw&sysid=1) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9560%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=JpCnEvqzwbOo%2fSb9ZbSsbQ&sysid=1)

subject: 450 Republicans from across WA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b7a448b9cd&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| At the end of October, the Washington State Republican Party hosted it's **46th Annual Dinner**. It was a**jam-packed program** from our Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, our gubernatorial candidates Semi Bird and Dave Reichert, with a special address from Utah Congressman Burgess Owens, and special award presentations for **great conservative activists like Glen Morgan**.

Not only was it a fun event, but it was an important one. **450 Republicans** gathering from across the state to build momentum and unity for local elections now, and statewide elections in 2024.

**Thank you** to everyone who was able to join us and help sponsor this annual event. For those who pledged support during the event's **'Raise The Paddle** ', and for those of you reading this now, we still have an **important task to complete. **

30 days ago we set a goal to **raise $26,000** to establish **200 conservative ballot box centers** across Washington for the 2024 statewide elections. We want to create more **accessibility** for conservatives to vote, we want to create more **trust** in the voting process, and we want to restore the community traditions and **excitement** of being able to vote in-person!

Thanks to supporters throughout the last month, and supporters at our 46th Annual Dinner,**we only have $12,400 left** to hit our goal! We're definitely on track to hit our goal before the end of the year - in fact we just sent $1,000 up to Whatcom county for more ballot boxes - **but we cannot let up.**

If you already pledged support for more conservative ballot box centers, or would like to support this effort, please click on the red button below and **fulfill your contribution today**!
---
| [Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=086e5aa8dd&e=6a281f566d "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>")
---
| Each **secure ballot box can cost $150**. These conservative ballot box centers also come with a team of grassroots conservative volunteers ready to help. Additional tools to help people register to vote and track their ballots are available as well.

We are thankful for the dozens of **individuals who pledged $250** at our Annual Dinner to sponsor these centers - but we need to get across the finish line with all 200 centers before 2024.**If we want to win again** then we need to build the infrastructure as soon as possible!
---
| | [Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4607a4a627&e=6a281f566d "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>")
---
| **Ballot harvesting is legal in Washington State. **Democrats have already been doing it in the shadows to win elections for the last decade.

Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. We will do it as aggressively as possible. We will conduct our efforts legally and with integrity. And in doing so, **we will start winning again!**

Please support our efforts today to bring this important change to the way our Party operates campaigns. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party

P.S. Thank you again to everyone who joined us last Friday for a great evening!
[](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9a8c0d3c5e&e=6a281f566d)

clean_body: Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. | | | | | | At the end of October, the Washington State Republican Party hosted it's 46th Annual Dinner. It was ajam-packed program from our Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, our gubernatorial candidates Semi Bird and Dave Reichert, with a special address from Utah Congressman Burgess Owens, and special award presentations for great conservative activists like Glen Morgan. Not only was it a fun event, but it was an important one. 450 Republicans gathering from across the state to build momentum and unity for local elections now, and statewide elections in 2024. Thank you to everyone who was able to join us and help sponsor this annual event. For those who pledged support during the event's 'Raise The Paddle ', and for those of you reading this now, we still have an important task to complete. 30 days ago we set a goal to raise $26,000 to establish 200 conservative ballot box centers across Washington for the 2024 statewide elections. We want to create more accessibility for conservatives to vote, we want to create more trust in the voting process, and we want to restore the community traditions and excitement of being able to vote in-person! Thanks to supporters throughout the last month, and supporters at our 46th Annual Dinner,we only have $12,400 left to hit our goal! We're definitely on track to hit our goal before the end of the year - in fact we just sent $1,000 up to Whatcom county for more ballot boxes - but we cannot let up. If you already pledged support for more conservative ballot box centers, or would like to support this effort, please click on the red button below and fulfill your contribution today! | "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>" | Each secure ballot box can cost $150. These conservative ballot box centers also come with a team of grassroots conservative volunteers ready to help. Additional tools to help people register to vote and track their ballots are available as well. We are thankful for the dozens of individuals who pledged $250 at our Annual Dinner to sponsor these centers - but we need to get across the finish line with all 200 centers before 2024.If we want to win again then we need to build the infrastructure as soon as possible! | | "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>" | Ballot harvesting is legal in Washington State. Democrats have already been doing it in the shadows to win elections for the last decade. Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. We will do it as aggressively as possible. We will conduct our efforts legally and with integrity. And in doing so, we will start winning again! Please support our efforts today to bring this important change to the way our Party operates campaigns. Thank you! Sincerely, Jim Walsh Chairman Washington State Republican Party P.S. Thank you again to everyone who joined us last Friday for a great evening! | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9812de0cde1/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6679610?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
# In The News....
Last week, John made appearances on multiple television shows to discuss politics in Washington DC while continuing to share his expert analysis regarding the Israel-Hamas war and tensions in the Middle East. John utilized his decades of experience as a leader in the U.S. Air Force, a father, a small business owner, and a mentor for sound leadership all around the world to speak on top issues including foreign aid, national security, the economy, and school choice.
Watch his interviews below:
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a2d7620d93&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert joined [Fox News](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a7317985ee&e=1b1fb1ad9f) this weekend to discuss Israel’s offensive strategy, stating: **“We’ve seen in the last 36 hours a very slow and methodical ground assault from Israel and they’re constantly mindful of their three primary objectives which is to remove Hamas from power and a threat to Israel, to recover those hostages, and then to deter other threats in the region. And certainly juggling all those objectives has led the Israelis to the decision that they will methodically undertake a ground assault instead of maybe the larger-scale faster assault that we expected.”**
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=9c13824cf4&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
John joined[ Wilkow](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2412571144&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss tensions rising in the Middle East, sharing the following about Hamas: **“From the very beginning since Hamas took control of Gaza in 2007, they have been brutal authoritarian rulers and they have left Palestinians in squalor.”**
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0edb63e35d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
John joined Kevin McCullough on [Salem News Channel](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e5261cb958&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss U.S. global affairs.

|
---
# On the Trail...
Last week, John had a great time on the campaign trail, meeting voters and sharing his message of leadership, not politics. Here are some of the great places he’s been!
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=bbf8580a1a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---

# Thoughts...
On Saturday, October 28th, John Teichert shared a video for National First Responder’s Day, thanking the men and women who keep our communities safe. Watch the full video [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=f7d86766e4&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4de9ed5dea&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Thursday, November 2nd, John signed a pledge to impose term limits in Congress. Read the full statement [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ec6ce067d6&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=533c79429b&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddf51a0dea9d62f2c81812fb0eb9872a7456347aa1a5c7710e6b4ccbf8fe79186eb9094a212ce96132b7962b363ec0f20c6933db4b2a431b731c8b9d37d0be
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddf51a0dea9d62b1d73ebca040077f3f6938124f6ea593a49ab1f4110c89b22f371d079de7f81603137173b100d9644789bb5a369b2b8f3a3681cfa0e5bf7f
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddf51a0dea9d62b55a883848cb1e6f08c48df2d7fcef6f1536623d3f5a3e9d8eb8f139d389cb2a62d357e2794b3f4a995da22396f7238b4613a0e5a5902426

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddf51a0dea9d62b55a883848cb1e6f08c48df2d7fcef6f1536623d3f5a3e9d8eb8f139d389cb2a62d357e2794b3f4a995da22396f7238b4613a0e5a5902426

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. | | | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=645cb5a0fe934a01af4b1e8a5cebfe08&_e=7MhzQ2bpMlHsCH0vUhBfG48BhgnOW7L4yuKwIa8ecaca9U3IeyXKcwfvQl_26tP0gpChfOWXDXq_cmpqqROOuewhlX3kEeZK-mvAYeV3MkxkvkcCleo00OhRYlRL9SN-K16VkdyBdJUX0nxo1UyGYIE6VGlFxoG1W1dMpmP7z6BPWQ_DefGmEr2CUB7p04wdGTDFLWnPbgD7IiEZ_edz3EDRykSCqe1ciE_TYDthgSBnDGGtBbnKRIf43wSOdqQM2U13oxFOouFzYzmGcleSS6tAEjKOE1faN0Usfpaikfx31-AVuYmqW3z4Xv-BPTaJ)

**SPECIAL ELECTION EVE**

November 6th, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio **Happy Monday!**
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Tuesday is Election Day. Have a plan to support your local Republican candidates and join Matt in VOTING NO on Issue 1 & Issue 2.

2. Matt Dolan earns national headlines for taking on Big Tech censorship and supporting Israel.

3. Matt Dolan continues to distinguish himself as the strongest Republican candidate against Sherrod Brown in 2024.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
|
---
Tuesday is Election Day. Have a plan to support your local Republican candidates and join Matt in VOTING NO on Issue 1 & Issue 2.
* With the November 7 Election now upon us, Matt has spent the last week rallying with the faith community and stumping with local Republican candidates.

* A major part of Matt’s effort has been walking door to door with local school board candidate literature and reminding voters about the extreme nature of Issue 1.

* “Issue 1 is too extreme for our state and doesn’t align with Ohio values,” Dolan said. “In the final week before November 7th, it is important that we are not only talking to those who agree with us, but to have uncomfortable conversations to make sure they know that Issue 1 would codify late-term abortion into state law.”

---
| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=645cb5a0fe934a01af4b1e8a5cebfe08&_e=7MhzQ2bpMlHsCH0vUhBfG48BhgnOW7L4yuKwIa8ecaca9U3IeyXKcwfvQl_26tP0gpChfOWXDXq_cmpqqROOuewhlX3kEeZK-mvAYeV3MkxkvkcCleo00OhRYlRL9SN-K16VkdyBdJUX0nxo1UyGYD1drLBA1JMIAYZUppSuxVQY72LXRVcylotz_u3uU8dIkri-fDOrZlUAyZnp_A5INWMqW7VJHBQsop6Ourd9-kVTr-TLEghtiUQLFVCVyOKwmiM7i6tynbU_t0LqPX1IgOxdter5pJ0zxtZbpQNhRXuB9UOjxGx5bBXvMrH1bjkC)
---

* Last week, Matt Dolan unequivocally stood with the Israeli people in a [Columbus Dispatch op-ed,](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=645cb5a0fe934a01af4b1e8a5cebfe08&_e=7MhzQ2bpMlHsCH0vUhBfG-hS1hLbMBs_uBIeXp38Me0jbGEgwX_Ty9Gku0QDqPlHfHdYx6JyGLKLbHeLXl-hQlEajy-eQP2Y3WT7J5sH3nWlp88Z1J0iDrMiF5wbp1tdz5zWCdDj0h7x6FcFTgs6IXURqoxUH2z8eC0AhWHryUJciwyiHwGKmxQGBQLY6MYIMq0ZWmfIb7aLIvJhdJ5f94v2WHOYu-oWmurjcjsxT4vW4dOHEkBQTooVpkfSaYc55rT8-zInjKvL2c67cDHObyTz-uDpWG4UgP_lzNHGB3ptYquRQz3pXBZv0kHC2BvCGTfXv6puq8VxDGuE63x8KXZVvz_Pnqpu260LUZf8DBQ%3D) declaring “America must have Israel’s back.” This stood as a stark contrast to Republican Bernie Moreno who has said that America should no longer support Israel with additional funding.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3f2c4ca9ebf4dbb91fea2bef2153ac5&_e=UA2IWWJu3Fg9hQk357INdFTo7V61AF6ynnK5QvP-eA9JYwf7NzmdoAcUsGTKZqySBNThWkkaau5WqKtvZDaXQvMF3u1Q3FyjZQ_83MzZ9Wt4E5y3ndrfhy9OcKlzeiS5TeNSfRo4vhKlkkQs6w63RQsDydo9KccCw5_T9uAYeFhZkBlv7h5fGfqEPU6I_9mpBJeBepkJCYwkHQFEX90xcFiAd3v-zJ_4855sGAvpx-Ujfc8PeaG77cFhnpFiQjmvNqol-62KmSQRiVcznRc64eKRebI0VDutSswgZC8Ejv_msuHR47rogRSWbHgpmp2_CUOAY17iG5d0qbkHVG8U9Cg5wZX9hR_rbZU_2i4rkKbI0nIiIiwil01pFK0pPwpA)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Governor Greg Abbott of Texas just placed a wire fence at the border — not the border between the US and Mexico, but the border between New Mexico and Texas.

**[Will you join me in DEMANDING that Greg Abbott immediately remove his unconstitutional border wall between New Mexico and Texas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72900916/436737821/-475924423?source=SBD_GV_EM_PT_110623_1_1_Petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjMTI2ZS1jZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoAz4cHEUsGXBClOPYQxn49Hzg5glccaq1c_OHvV5q4=&emci=7575e867-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=64cc126e-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)[ Sign my petition now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72900917/436737822/-475924423?source=SBD_GV_EM_PT_110623_1_1_Petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjMTI2ZS1jZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoAz4cHEUsGXBClOPYQxn49Hzg5glccaq1c_OHvV5q4=&emci=7575e867-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=64cc126e-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)** | | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72900918/436737823/-475924423?source=SBD_GV_EM_PT_110623_1_1_Petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjMTI2ZS1jZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoAz4cHEUsGXBClOPYQxn49Hzg5glccaq1c_OHvV5q4=&emci=7575e867-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=64cc126e-ce7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)

As an elected official representing the state of New Mexico, this is concerning.

But even more concerning is Governor Abbott's prioritizing political stunts instead of actually addressing the challenges at our border.

Greg Abbott’s wall is unconstitutional, but above all, **_it is un-American._**

As the son of immigrants and the first in my family to become an American citizen, I’m committed to addressing the pressing challenges faced by border communities, migrants and border security personnel.

body:
We need less talk and more action! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/92943503b2cd/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12660520?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Thierry is running to be the Democratic nominee for the U.S. Senate because he knows that something has to change.
Thierry is a lifelong public servant. He’s never served in public office.
And yet, he’s introduced the same number of bills to raise the minimum wage as Colin Allred and Roland Gutierrez.
How many bills have they each introduced? _ZERO!_
**The difference? Colin and Roland have both spent years serving as elected officials.**

[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=d0a9b97383&e=b8ba94fd9b)
_**We need to raise the minimum wage and give working families a shot at a brighter future.**_
That’s why Thierry has committed to introduce a bill EVERY session he’s in the Senate to raise the minimum wage, until we get it done.
Because working families deserve better.
Thierry won’t wait. And here on Team Tchenko, we don’t understand what Colin and Roland have been waiting for.
**Let’s get this done y’all!**
[**Kick in $20.24 or more today and support this grassroots campaign so that Thierry can go to Washington and fight for all of us.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=9b24f40221&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thank you!
Team Tchenko

All that is to say, you’re helping us build the strongest possible campaign. And in a race like ours that’s sure to be close, your support really makes all the difference. We’re so grateful you’re part of this grassroots team. Biden-Harris Dems

We’re coming up on the holiday season, Peter, and that is historically a tough fundraising moment for campaigns like ours, who rely on small dollar donations from folks like you.
And I understand how the holidays can be a tough time financially when there isn’t a lot to spare — I’ve been there too.
I know it feels like the election is a long way away and the holidays are right here, but the truth is, Election Day is coming on faster than you think. We’re already only 4 months from the primary, and anything could happen between now and then.
**[And the fact that our average donation is just $20 means that we need a movement of folks behind us all chipping in $20 whenever they can. Friend -

It's Speaker Mike Johnson.

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Calling for Ceasefire, Pramila Jayapal & Barbara Lee on M4A, Tomorrow's Election Guide, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Election Day 2023 Tuesday! | The Fight for Medicare for All |
Barbara Lee, Pramila Jayapal & Ro Khanna | CalCare w/ Ash Kalra | End
Medical Debt & Lower Drug Prices | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11202?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

As atrocities are carried out in the Middle East and far right voices grow
louder in Congress, it’s clear why progressives must unify now to grow our
ranks and work for global peace and prosperity.

On Tuesday, we must defeat rightwing extremists at the ballot box and save
abortion rights in states like Ohio and Virginia. And, we must start
working now for 2024 to take back the House and elect progressives like
Barbara Lee — the only candidate for the U.S. Senate in California to call
for a ceasefire in Israel/Palestine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1012&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]Check out this latest LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace
Candidate in this race compared to her opponents Katie Porter and Adam
Schiff.

Our Revolution stands with U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee, Cori Bush, Summer Lee
and our other progressive allies in Congress who are calling for an end to
the violence.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

The 2023 General Election is on Tuesday, and Our Revolution is mobilizing
voters to the polls to elect progressive champions in cities and states
nationwide!

Meet our candidates below, and be sure to get out to vote to help build
local power and build progressive majorities that can make a direct impact
in people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12398?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]Chip in to make sure we have the resources to pull off a massive voter
turnout effort ahead of Tuesday. Every donation of $5 or $10 helps power
critical groundwork, phone banks, texting, door knocks and more in these
important down-ballot elections!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution has been blazing a path for progressive cities in 2023,
from winning a progressive majority with Board President Megan Green in
St. Louis and helping elect Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago. Now we have
a chance to bolster progressive power in Pittsburgh with Sara Innamorato!

We backed Sara as she beat big money back in May to win the primary and on
Tuesday, she’ll be on the ballot to become the next Allegheny County
Executive!

If she wins, Sara will be part of a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh
that includes Mayor Ed Gainey and U.S. Rep Summer Lee, whom she ran
alongside successfully for PA House back in 2018 with Our Revolution’s
support.

As County Exec, Sara will lead the second-largest county in Pennsylvania
and have the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide
housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]PITCH IN TO HELP MAKE PITTSBURGH OUR NEXT PROGRESSIVE CITY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

With Our Revolution’s slate of progressives, Democrats could win back
power in Virginia — and maintain the last bastion of abortion rights in
the South.

Nadarius Clark, Rozia Henson, Adele McClure, and Joshua Cole are all vying
for key seats in the Virginia State House, while Jennifer Carroll Foy,
Stella Pekarsky, and Lashrecse Aird could win races that block a
Republican takeover of the State Senate. This is critical since Gov. Glenn
Youngkin said he would sign any abortion ban the Virginia legislature
sends to his desk.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

We aren’t overlooking any race where a progressive can pick up power to
use for the people. That’s why we’re backing Steve Descano for Fairfax
County Commonwealth Attorney and Parisa Dehghani-Tafti for Arlington
County Commonwealth Attorney.

Our Revolution is going all out with our local chapters and activists on
the ground to overcome insidious Republican power-taking and to turn out
enough voters to defend our rights.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12232?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and we have a chance to shut down this
new rightwing playbook to attack our rights. Our Revolution has been
organizing for months to make sure Issue 1 passes, and we preserve
reproductive rights in the Buckeye State and beyond.

After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of
deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion
laws. But the resistance has been real.

Thanks to grassroots funding, armies of volunteers, and organizations like
Our Revolution, we have a real shot at enshrining a woman’s right to
abortion access in the Ohio constitution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12232?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]We have just a few days left to make sure Ohio and Virginia voters
know what’s at stake and get to the polls on Tuesday. Please donate now to
bring home a critical win for abortion rights!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1022&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution Twin Cities has a powerhouse slate of progressives in
Minnesota — and we are working to get out the vote to make sure each of
these champions wins re-election!

These candidates include Minneapolis City Council members Jeremiah Ellison
(Ward 5), Elliot Payne (Ward 1), and Robin Wonsley (Ward 2). And, in St.
Paul, we are backing City Council members Mitra Jalali (Ward 4) and Nelsie
Yang (Ward 6).

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Also in Minnesota, Our Revolution members weighed in and we are endorsing
an exciting slate of progressive champions to win a majority on the city
council in Duluth!

We’re organizing to elect these three amazing women: Miranda Pacheco and
Jenna Yeakle for City Council At-Large and Wendy Durrwachter for City
Council District 1.

These candidates have a real shot at winning and building a strong
progressive bloc of local power, and we can’t let an opportunity like this
pass us by!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

As corporations broaden their dark money fundraising networks into city
council and school board races, we need working-class champions ready to
confront them head-on, everywhere. That’s why we’re endorsing this slate
of progressive candidates in Washington!

Our slate includes Leah Perkel for Vancouver City Council, Charles Adkins
for Everett School Board (Position 5), Tammy Morales for Seattle City
Council (District 2), Teresa Mosqueda for King County Council (District
8), Jorge Baron King for King County Council (District 4).

Leah Perkel is an Our Revolution member and a former Bernie delegate. She
has firsthand experience with medical debt resulting from our lousy
private health insurance system, and she wants to be an agent of change to
help create healthier people and communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]We have just a few days to get out the vote in each of these
elections. Pitch in now to fund our voter turnout operation and support
our volunteer network!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution stands with Izola Shaw in her run for Rockville City
Council At-Large and Martin Mitchell who is vying for Mayor of the City of
Laurel.

OR Member Izola Shaw was chair of the Montgomery County Racial Equity and
Social Justice Advisory Committee, helped found the County’s Racial Equity
Network (MORE), and helped pass the Racial Equity and Social Justice Act.

She has worked with the County Executive on public works, policing, rent
stabilization, and environmental protection through the Rockville City
Academy.

Laurel City Councilmember Martin Mitchell was a 2020 Bernie delegate and a
founding member of Maryland for Bernie Sanders. He has been a leader in
the fight for rent stabilization, marijuana decriminalization, and
collective bargaining for municipal employees.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution is endorsing the Ithaca Solidarity Slate in New York!

Jorge DeFendini (Ward 4) and Phoebe Brown (Ward 2) are both seeking
re-election to the Ithaca Common Council, and Kayla Matos is a challenger
who would grow our progressive bloc on the council.

These are the races that determine the direction of cities and help us
build progressive power at the local level, where we can directly improve
people’s lives.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Jared Evans is running for re-election to a third term on the Indianapolis
City Council — and Our Revolution is proud to have his back!

Jared has been a strong progressive ally in Indianapolis, fighting for
higher wages, good jobs, and more for the blue-collar neighborhoods he
serves in District 17.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1029&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Juan Marcano is the proud son of Puerto Rican migrants and has been a
voice for working-class people representing Ward 4 on the Aurora, Colorado
City Council since 2019.

Now, Our Revolution is proud to endorse Juan to lead the city in a
progressive direction as Mayor. We know he will champion education,
affordable housing, and economic and social justice at the helm.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12232?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1030&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ]Donate today to support our massive GOTV efforts coast to coast ahead
of Tuesday’s big elections!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10665?t=1031&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution is endorsing Sheila Jackson Lee for Houston Mayor, who’s
running against John Whitmire — a Democratic defector who sides with
radical Republicans on voter suppression and racist policing policies.

U.S. Rep. Jackson Lee is a long-time member of the Congressional
Progressive Caucus, and she’s a fighter for Medicare for All, the Raise
the Wage Act, and the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.

As the next Mayor, she’s committed to promoting policies to expand
healthcare, create good jobs, increase affordable housing, promote safe
and reliable public transportation, and protect the city from climate
disasters.

She’s also been endorsed by SEIU Texas, the Communications Workers of
America, and other key Our Revolution allies.

“Sheila is taking on far-right groups, corporate lobbyists, and
establishment politicians — including billionaire Trump donors, the NRA,
Republican anti-abortion zealots, and knee-jerk backers of Gov. Abbott’s
autocratic political agenda,” Our Revolution Board Member and former TX
Agriculture Commissioner Jim Hightower said.

“The fat cats are against her — but we are pushing hard for her, and there
are many more of us than them. The key is turning out our voters, and we
know how to do that!” Hightower added.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Greater Worcester Our Revolution is supporting Robert Billota for City
Council (District 2) in Worcester, MA.

Robert is running for this seat because he believes Worcester should be a
place where everyone can build a prosperous future. He has served on the
Worcester Human Rights Commission and is a member of the Worcester
Affordable Housing Coalition.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12346?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231106_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1033&akid=4877%2E5885482%2EiGqekN ][IMG]

Our Revolution Ohio is proudly endorsing Andrej Rotter for Upper Arlington
City Council to give back to the community he says has given him so much.

Andrej and his family were political refugees from Czechoslovakia, and he
is a retired scientist, teacher, and mentor. He is committed to
environmental sustainability, fighting climate change, and economic
security.

Other progressives on the ballot in Ohio include:

* Michael Hardy for Cleveland City Council
* Adrienne Hood for Columbus City Council
* Jan-Michele Lemon Kearney for Cincinnati City Council
