clean_body: Nikki believes you would be the perfect addition to our team | | | | | Friend, are you ready to officially join Nikki 's team as we gear up for Nikki's third presidential debate? Nikki believes you would be the perfect addition to our team, and we're thrilled to offer you the chance to secure your official Ambassador's Circle membership card right now! | | If you're a patriotic American eager to show your support for Nikki before she steps onto the debate stage, - "there's no reason to wait—join her Ambassador's Circle today!" "Our membership drive wraps up on November 8, and we want every freedom-loving American to take this opportunity to join us with a donation of ONLY $15 today." The best part is, by joining us, you'll also enjoy these exclusive benefits: 🔘 Your very own personalized membership card 🔘 Access to exclusive news and updates 🔘 Special discounts on campaign merchandise 🔘 Exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpses from the campaign trail 🔘 AND SO MUCH MORE... | | "With a contribution of just $15 or more, you'll become a valued member of Nikki Haley's exclusive Ambassador’s Circle and play a pivotal role in winning the White House and strengthening our nation." Thank you in advance for joining our team! Team Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Big week in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues we’re working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

ELECTION DAY TOMORROW

Tomorrow is Election Day, so please make a plan to vote! Every ballot in
Texas will have 14 constitutional amendments to vote on. Depending on
where you live, your ballot may also include important local races for
mayor, school board, and more.

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59247?source=ema20231106-234480&t=1001&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT ]Learn what’s on your ballot and find your polling place.
* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59665?t=1002&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT ]Read about the constitutional amendments on the ballot.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

VICTORY AGAINST VOUCHERS

Tomorrow is the end of the special legislative session in Texas — and it
comes with a big victory. We’ve once again defeated Governor Abbott’s
billionaire-backed voucher scam that would defund public schools to
subsidize private education for the wealthy.

But Abbott has vowed to call another special session as early as this week
to continue trying to strong-arm anti-voucher House members into changing
their votes. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/call/call-your-texas-representative/?source=ema20231106-234480&t=1003&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT ]Please urge your Texas House representative to stand up to
him and continue to reject his voucher scam.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

GOP IN DISARRAY

The Texas GOP is still scrambling to save face after recent reports
exposed its deep ties to prominent white supremacists like Nick Fuentes,
forcing top Republicans to explain themselves to voters who are now seeing
just how extreme they really are.

And in Congress, House Republicans are struggling to answer for their
selection of Mike Johnson as their new Speaker — a guy who wants to turn
the U.S. into a Christian theocracy and has promoted a nationwide abortion
ban. Approval ratings for Republicans in Congress have now reached their
lowest point since the GOP took control of the House.

This is our moment to capitalize on the GOP’s dysfunction — so we’re
running digital ads to ensure disaffected voters know there is a better
path forward in 2024. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59656?refcode=ema20231106-234480&t=1004&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT ]Will you pitch in what you can today to help us
keep these ads on the air?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59656?refcode=ema20231106-234480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT ]Contribute $3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=234480%2E444211%2EKynfuT

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Jon Hamm
subject: Courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Why I'm supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri's U.S. Senate seat
#
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Hamm, born-and-raised Missourian.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Missouri.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) But first, please give me a moment to explain what my home state is up against in this election and why I’m supporting Lucas.**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)**
Most of my family is from a town called Ste. Genevieve. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.
While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**
Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in out-of-touch culture wars and selling us his book all about “manhood” — telling the whole world that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him.
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can give speeches or write a book about.
Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.
Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
**So Peter, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it.[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38872?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)
---
**Lucas has been working hard to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map in 2024.** From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, national organizations, and local leaders — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle.
He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family members all across the state.
**It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate.[So Peter, will you join me in supporting Lucas’ campaign by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38871?refcode=em20231106-4137&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Jon Hamm

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231106-4137-footer&t=13&refcode2=4137_614464_947kbu&akid=4137%2E614464%2E947kbu)**

While President Trump is in the Manhattan courthouse today, taking the witness stand to defend himself (and his family) from the “corporate death penalty,” he requested that our team give you an update.
---
_CBS_ – who is certainly no friend of President Trump – released a poll yesterday showing that a **MAJORITY** of the entire country would vote for President Trump over Crooked Joe Biden.
---
Not only is President Trump winning, he’s DOMINATING Biden.
---
In fact, the poll shows that President Trump has a 10% lead with INDEPENDENT voters.

---
While these witch hunts are certainly a sign of dark times in our country’s history, it’s reassuring to know that the __PEOPLE__ of our country can see right through them.

---
_The poll also found that the number of Americans who think our nation is doing badly has hit an all-time high for the year._

---
_And that’s _exactly_ why President Trump is so determined to finish the job of Making America Great Again – and why he’s willing to endure all of these many, many witch hunts to ensure we prevail.
_
---
The fate of our country hangs in the balance in 2024. We either win or we lose our glorious nation forever.

---

subject: Jamie Raskin STUNNED House Republicans with this statement:
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
WOW
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20376%2E4449941%2EEy_JHR)
---
**_Jamie Raskin just STUNNED House Republicans in his closing remarks:_** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231106_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20376%2E4449941%2EEy_JHR) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TO SAVE PRESIDENT BIDEN: ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE WITH JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231106_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20376%2E4449941%2EEy_JHR)
---
* * *
Listen, even Republicans’ own witnesses admitted there’s no evidence that President Biden committed a crime! **WOW!**
**IF** we expose the sham impeachment inquiry for what it is – _a partisan witch hunt with no basis in reality_ – then we can stop it in its tracks!

**BUT IF** we sit back and do nothing, Republicans will continue to lie and tarnish President Biden’s reputation – **_ensuring another Trump Presidency._**
[**_So we need to know that you agree with Rep. Jamie Raskin: Add your name if you agree with Raskin that MAGA Republicans’ impeachment inquiry is about NOTHING »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231106_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20376%2E4449941%2EEy_JHR)
[25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TO SAVE PRESIDENT BIDEN: ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE WITH JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231106_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20376%2E4449941%2EEy_JHR)
---
We won’t sit back and let Republicans bury President Biden with their lies!

Thank you for speaking out,

– Fight for Reform

Can you chip in to help us make sure we can remind as many Democrats as possible about the election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72906721/436759738/405560545?refcode=2311106Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDBkOTBmMS1kZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxCllPlUUop9UaugTRgOEljcbswhNCbs5Lq2D5LxZeA=)** Tomorrow is our chance to elect dynamic candidates who are advocates for their communities. body:
| I hate sending emails like this.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1478%2E35263%2E2cfwQu)

body:

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Taking Back Our Elections 11/8 in Lexington
body:
You Are Invited
| | | |
---
---
| Friends,
Join me in Lexington Massachusetts this Wednesday evening November 8th at 7:00 pm as we hear from Dr. Douglas Frank on the topic of taking back our elections. Across the board, voters express a lack of confidence in our election system, and this must change. Learn from Dr. Douglas Frank exactly what "we the people" can do to make a difference. You don't want to miss this informative presentation.
I will also be sharing on action item " Cleaning Up Your Local Voter Rolls" in your own city or town, as well as letting everyone know how they can get involved in the statewide ballot referendum to "Make Voter ID a Reality in Massachusetts". There is limited seating, so please RSVP to [RickStoppe@Gmail.com](mailto:RickStoppe@Gmail.com) or text (508)333-8555.
This event is free and by invitation only, however you may take friends and neighbors with you as your guests. Hope to see you there! Keep standing up for what is right! Never Quit!
Thank You, Caroline Colarusso

---
| [RSVP NOW](mailto:RickStoppe@Gmail.com)
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

name: Yesli Vega
subject: Why You Must Vote Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: paid for by the data center industry
body:
The Future of Prince William County Depends On It
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
In 10 hours, the polls for Prince William's most important election in at least a generation will be open.
If you've already voted - thank you. Please send a text to 10 friends or family members to follow your lead before 7pm tomorrow evening.
The issues facing our county and the need for change have been well documented.
To me, there are four core issues facing our citizens that cannot continue on with the status quo. Public Safety. Our Cost-of-Living. Land Use Policy. And a Quality Education for Our Children.
Public Safety

* Increase Woefully Understaffed Police Department: We are 300 officers short of our own level-of-service standards needed to keep you and your family safe. We need to hire and retain more officers to deter and respond to crime. This is a moral imperative with our violent crime rate up 70% in the last four years and homicides at an all-time high.

* Elect a Commonwealth Attorney Who Will Actually Prosecute Crime: As violent crime is up 70%, prosecutions for felonies in PWC are down 70% in Amy Ashworth's office. This is indefensible and has been putting the lives of our residents at risk. Full stop.

* Support For Those Who Serve: As a law enforcement officer, I know what it's like not knowing if you'll come home to your kids when strapping on the bullet proof vest. The very least we can do is offer moral support and incentives to those brave enough and willing to do the job. We must adequately compensate our brave men and women of law enforcement and stop playing allies with the Defund the Police crowd. [Just last week, one of the leading Defund the Police organizations in the country endorsed not only my opponent, but Ms. Deshundra Jefferson and Josh King, the candidate for Sheriff, as well](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HDVJXMhaKCUEFi1XtGGwwKPPDD8w4wjF4zbCouI21A1vcAMiD_vx2OKInaby1JxhosBdHKviqZj0MVEF2Zb5sk9mjBgKtOMblDxa5y-uV0_ksBp_XEnL1Ab64bwLvceVRWAAGB4YSQCCwpGnd5HPA3LWKyHBVKtw0RPPVqO5gd8=&c=wqwFWLPO4Aeaa1_AFplioaTPPbLqFzIK5X39xx9qL4Ygo_Bl72884g==&ch=_PlsNigKlet6mnJtullXbqNxgGswvA2n7nxEfZ2cU1KYtrsOyGcgyA==). This wasn't an accident. They were endorsed for a reason and are going to be expected to deliver.

* Helping Those With Mental Illness: We must help those who can't help themselves. I supported our Crisis Receiving Center and was proud to recently allocate some of my district proffer funds to go towards the Horticulture Therapy Program at Shenandoah Park for those dealing with mental health issues.

We can return Prince William to the safe community we all know and love.
Other Candidates to Reverse the Crime Wave and Then Keep Us Safe: Matt Lowery for Commonwealth Attorney; Sheriff Glen Hill; Jeanine Lawson for Chair; Karla Justice for Occoquan.
Lowering Your Taxes and Cost of Living

* Lower Residential Taxes (Homes): The average family in Prince William has seen their residential tax bill go up by an average of $2,200 the last four years. This is absolutely crazy in the midst of the economic fallout from COVID and inflation. We must and will provide you actual tax relief on your most treasured asset with a citizen-first majority.

* Lower Personal Property Taxes (Vehicles): Many of you were shocked to see the tax bill on your vehicles this fall. The current majority increased the rate of assessment by 25% even as they knew the value of used vehicles were going up. You need a majority with vision to anticipate these things and act in your interest accordingly.

* Repeal The Meals Tax (Food): This regressive new tax passed in the midst of COVID and record inflation has crushed families and small business owners. One of the candidates for Chair, Ms. Jefferson, even said she wants to tax your food and meals to pay for 'Section 8 Housing' throughout the County.

* INCREASE Tax Rate on Data Centers: As a result of the cozy relationship of the current Board with the data center industry, the richest companies in the world currently have to pay less than half of what they do in taxes than neighboring jurisdictions like Loudoun, Fairfax and Fauquier. By placing you over data centers, we can even have enough revenue to cut you a break.

* Fiscally Responsible Spending: Overall spending has increased by over a billion dollars in the last four years. And the Board Majority just put you and your family on the hook for another $2 Billion. This comes out of your pocket.

We must be good stewards of your money. All of this spending, and a 70% increase in violent crime does not merit a 70% personal increase in pay on the backs of our taxpayers, as Supervisor Boddye, the spendthrift politician running to replace me in Marshall and Purcell, voted for.
Other Candidates to Reduce Your Cost of Living: Jeanine Lawson for Chair and Karla Justice for Occoquan.
Land Use Policy and Environmental Protection

* Data Centers: There are some that are, but I'm not 100% opposed to every data center in the County. But they MUST be placed in the right areas and pay their fair share to reduce your tax burden. Next to schools, National Parks, and residential neighborhoods are unacceptable. The current Board Majority is bought and paid for by the data center industry. This isn't even debatable.

* Residential Overdevelopment: [An unelected organization in Washington, DC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HDVJXMhaKCUEFi1XtGGwwKPPDD8w4wjF4zbCouI21A1vcAMiD_vx2OKInaby1JxhPIcL5nA88AP0mSarsEA6PgiZWXQ3n24ZS5LSM_0ulF9ZFI8U5FZL5Yx_AnBuXeoQTcxKN3XsYLI=&c=wqwFWLPO4Aeaa1_AFplioaTPPbLqFzIK5X39xx9qL4Ygo_Bl72884g==&ch=_PlsNigKlet6mnJtullXbqNxgGswvA2n7nxEfZ2cU1KYtrsOyGcgyA==) says you must accept a massive increase of new homes being built in the county. And the current ruling majority in the county here is happy to let MWCOG make that decision for you. Of course we need to let the market lower the cost, but the impacts on traffic, our schools, roads, and local environment must come first. Our job is to represent those of you that are here today.

* Protecting The Occoquan: I initiated the creation of the Occoquan Overlay District to protect and improve our drinking supply. By opposing overdevelopment and data centers in the wrong places, we can make this a reality.

Other Candidates to Support for Prudent Land-Use Policy and Environmental Protection: Jeanine Lawson for Chair and Karla Justice for Occoquan.
Quality Education:

* Accountability: While the Board of Supervisors distributes a lump-sum for the school budget, your elected officials on the Board have absolutely NO SAY in how the money is being spent. With college preparedness in PWCS falling and test scores plummeting, your elected body must have greater discretion over how your tax dollars are spent to ensure you and our children are getting the highest quality education possible.

* Back to Basics: The current elected School Board and administrative leadership seems more concerned with pushing politics in the classroom than equipping our children with the basics needed to succeed. The Board must use our leverage to ensure reading, writing, science, arithmetic and history is back in - and extreme political ideologies are out.

As the mother of two students still in PWCS, ensuring for a quality education for all of our students is of greatest importance to me.
Coles District Candidate and Parent Fighting for a Quality Education: Stephen Spiker.
Our County has faced lots of challenges the last four years. Unfortunately, the majority of those tasked with serving you haven't gotten it right. Tomorrow, we can begin to change that. Our future and our children deserve nothing less. We can right this ship.
But the power is now in your hands.
Ever since I first put on the uniform with the Alexandria Police Department in 2011, my calling has been to serve my community. I have been overwhelmingly humbled by your trust and support for the last four years, and ask for your support tomorrow to help us once again make Prince William County the best place in the Commonwealth of Virginia to live, work and raise a family.
For Prince William,
Yesli Vega Prince William County Supervisor Coles District Servant
P.S. The polls open at 6am tomorrow! [Please click here to find your polling location](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HDVJXMhaKCUEFi1XtGGwwKPPDD8w4wjF4zbCouI21A1vcAMiD_vx2OKInaby1JxhgvFbzhJ_vN2PU7FZUzybwSXfKEr-Anbr6xBRycONu8LaClUrtoeah2Dp9S-f-BaktXyClyI94I1ZetEZtk4VqA==&c=wqwFWLPO4Aeaa1_AFplioaTPPbLqFzIK5X39xx9qL4Ygo_Bl72884g==&ch=_PlsNigKlet6mnJtullXbqNxgGswvA2n7nxEfZ2cU1KYtrsOyGcgyA==) and grab 10 of your friends to go out with you and make your voice count in our democracy.
---
| |
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HDVJXMhaKCUEFi1XtGGwwKPPDD8w4wjF4zbCouI21A1vcAMiD_vx2NIgZT3jTNfgXJq738VHKjm8A1tmOy8Dn2NuP8447UrR2DLjcPxVEXXy846YwhdiIiO0PUR9iADFNq34v87zx52K6fRez9zl0MZ_QNoWN-7eIVw_I1IG51lmWiDB3T-2nkOz1vGmWXyD&c=wqwFWLPO4Aeaa1_AFplioaTPPbLqFzIK5X39xx9qL4Ygo_Bl72884g==&ch=_PlsNigKlet6mnJtullXbqNxgGswvA2n7nxEfZ2cU1KYtrsOyGcgyA==)
---
| | [FACEBOOK PAGE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HDVJXMhaKCUEFi1XtGGwwKPPDD8w4wjF4zbCouI21A1vcAMiD_vx2NIgZT3jTNfgotJHcjEoaGcE9M5XTWtii23IbREk9exVFI-pt0ksN94DqoyXBUnXE1OTfk93WgMXfMg-8BVZragrVRRW5wrc4Q==&c=wqwFWLPO4Aeaa1_AFplioaTPPbLqFzIK5X39xx9qL4Ygo_Bl72884g==&ch=_PlsNigKlet6mnJtullXbqNxgGswvA2n7nxEfZ2cU1KYtrsOyGcgyA==)
---

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: I haven't heard from you in awhile
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee

What are your top priorities right now?

name: Tamie Wilson for US
subject: Supreme Court decision re: OSU abuse litigation
body:
| |

Finally, Jim Jordan will be held to account for his role in allowing the abuse of hundreds of young people at OSU | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzgyMzk0Njg4NDczOSxcInJcIjoxMDQxMjQ3NDExNjQ0NjgxNDF9IiwicyI6IjZjNDNjM2MyNWZlYWQ4MGQifQ)

---
|
---
Friend,
Earlier this year, the U.S. Supreme Court rejected Ohio State University’s attempts to dismiss claims of sexual abuse brought by dozens of victims against an OSU athletic department doctor.

|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzgyMzk1ODQxOTA4MixcInJcIjoxMDQxMjQ3NDExNjQ0NjgxNDF9IiwicyI6IjE2MzEwNmI4NjIyNmYxZTkifQ)
---
|
---
This is a big win for justice and accountability, and here’s why:
**At the center of this case is my opponent, Rep. Jim Jordan, and his actions as assistant coach of the wrestling team.**
While serving as an assistant wrestling coach at OSU, Jim Jordan turned a blind eye to reports of sexual misconduct by the team's doctor, Richard Strauss. Under Jordan’s protection, Strauss’ abuse was allowed to carry on unimpeded. Strauss ultimately victimized hundreds of students; some of them have come forward as members of Jordan’s wrestling team—many of whom he recruited by promising these young men’s parents he would “take care of them.”
Despite Jordan’s stonewalling, dozens of survivors have come forward with their stories and have sworn under oath that they told Jordan about the abuse. The survivors described Jordan responding dismissively to their reports and then taking no action.
**With this result, we hope that Jim Jordan will finally be held accountable for his role in the scheme of abuse that ruined so many young lives for so long.**
Jim Jordan has no business serving in Congress. The voters of my district deserve to have someone representing them that they can trust. Someone with a record of values, morals, and leadership.
[I need your help to prosecute Jordan’s reprehensible record—both his personal failings and his extremist positions in Congress. Can I count on you to stand with me and make a donation of $25 or whatever you can spare against Jim Jordan as the walls start to close in on his track record of abuse and corruption?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzgyMzk2MjYxMzM4NyxcInJcIjoxMDQxMjQ3NDExNjQ0NjgxNDF9IiwicyI6ImNhZThkYmZjYWEyNjQyM2MifQ)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I grew up right next to a Trump golf course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72907981/436764405/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MjJjNy1kZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToIK1KI_hDO1-SGr-V3HpOTFy7DIldf3aBddrsdTyVk=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72907982/436764406/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MjJjNy1kZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToIK1KI_hDO1-SGr-V3HpOTFy7DIldf3aBddrsdTyVk=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72907983/436764407/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MjJjNy1kZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToIK1KI_hDO1-SGr-V3HpOTFy7DIldf3aBddrsdTyVk=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward tonight's $10,000 August goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and reclaim our House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72907984/436764408/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MjJjNy1kZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToIK1KI_hDO1-SGr-V3HpOTFy7DIldf3aBddrsdTyVk=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72907991/436764415/-1359812268?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20231106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWQ0MjJjNy1kZjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToIK1KI_hDO1-SGr-V3HpOTFy7DIldf3aBddrsdTyVk=)

Thank you,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Ella Emhoff, the 24-year-old stepdaughter of Vice President Kamala Harris, has publicly supported a fundraising campaign for Gaza’s children. **** In just one year, the 2024 election will officially be behind us. **How we spend the next 364 days will determine whether or not we put an end to the chaos of the current GOP House majority.**

While my Democratic colleagues and I are eager to pass a budget, support our allies abroad, and get back to addressing the needs and challenges of hard working Americans, my colleagues across the aisle have spent much of the past year fighting amongst themselves.

_The contrast is stark, and sadly, right now, only Democrats are serious about legislating, about governing. We must retake the majority to return to practical, solutions-oriented governance that puts people first._

**With less than a year until Election Day 2024, we’re strengthening our robust grassroots team to fight back against the heavy spending we’ll see in the Philadelphia suburbs. With that in mind, we’ve set a goal to bring in as many $24 donations as possible before Wednesday –[will you kick us off with the first $24?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72908307/436765630/-2127077206?amount=24&refcode=11062023_md_oneyearout_fr_1&refcode2=93e2bc2a-e17c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UyYmMyYS1lMTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-VFFKjVT6QfbwcxAuTvMGhFLmvWQWKEP3vQnNZdMW8=)** | | [ **CHIP IN $24** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72908308/436765631/-2127077206?amount=24&refcode=11062023_md_oneyearout_fr_1&refcode2=93e2bc2a-e17c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UyYmMyYS1lMTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-VFFKjVT6QfbwcxAuTvMGhFLmvWQWKEP3vQnNZdMW8=)

We know that most Americans aren’t interested in the far-right extremism being pushed by many of my colleagues across the aisle, and in 364 days we’ll have the opportunity to make that crystal clear when we retake the House majority.

body:
I just approved this ad to run in the FIRST TWO STATES! [WATCH]
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORRpYiH3zYrQmlgcL20vYUFGmUzNaSjS3X5N8XhaSnge-9Gd5jbJxHCveeHd4ZwI38ygCYfGMAp_b913d9-nka6g_1R9WDVu1eVPjCAPJ9xv_W55UGo6Wx0MNQ-R6cAecq7IXuOskBhKxuvQK4BKtsUCaEIICj7LjwiEoo0wmoqAcOUgiuy5TQeFQBZOhaw40z_MJavlNq_JTs6D_zssW5cVOsxv6W87w-Ih0ZHFd024LNTmlBXxyF2b9Y24gLOVt_TpRyHbbkF0srpWvtphgpZ0QGx-RGtAi-u3jkEg9gWiaPW47niJ62yOTw7KsLXKdtccjk4Ohsn8zZOFu6JiaHV6eXMqWMKTM5CK60YqDPaSRf1t_wQ9-_Rvn7AR8vkQOauwm7_fGtWno_7zSOtOoDa_m1RCjl_gUAAP__fkuNmA)

Friend,
I first decided to run for President because I couldn’t stand to see weak and incompetent “leaders” destroy our country through endless wars any longer.

body:
My team and I keep arguing about it, so I need you to chime in| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=1a7b39c0b67241578fbf4fe49858947e&_e=Sj8w4FCb3_q9bvHSrRHaIfgbD6gGwIxN8xY5clfh3UuoETbdWDNvE34jIasV6YQOos1K6yS00LyOIlBlgBFzXqQXZaE3hTotbPSGOI0mwpVNr4lXh6cxJQDh_XJHPi3LZyNe38wiCwFAclJPw3wVsrhz_2awnRZjveWJYnWO9mrTn3PKT-GBnpO4D4aKtnGunAwOOTWjxsV-wIaVdLIRd1G_bJ_3G1APZbNqqLIUJfp5h-ovv8Lq6bwu5Pnvv8z3UbeGF7UT9UnfuIA-diWYxw%3D%3D)

| | My team has put me to work during debate prep...

Getting ready to take the stage is never easy but I have never been one who's afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work!

Now, I need your input. Which debate topic do you think will be the focus of this debate?
---
[**What Topic Should I Prepare For?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=1a7b39c0b67241578fbf4fe49858947e&_e=Sj8w4FCb3_q9bvHSrRHaIfgbD6gGwIxN8xY5clfh3UuoETbdWDNvE34jIasV6YQOos1K6yS00LyOIlBlgBFzXqQXZaE3hTotbPSGOI0mwpVNr4lXh6cxJQDh_XJHPi3Lk99HX5UBGMEaiitwLVMf2z2IdTg5EODhzQr0WB-8lSp2ZuJ8YF4olVZi9YQRSCK0Oe3_H6H0W9YijRKi_HLQ8Re4X2KKTpO1defAAAOwlzQ3VwqKinf2GHtmciVApduCdmmTN5B6ZV8EN-x-BhpgfA%3D%3D)

I need to be prepared for anything that may come up, so your opinion is very important to me. [Take my survey now and let me know what you think I need to be most prepared for.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=1a7b39c0b67241578fbf4fe49858947e&_e=Sj8w4FCb3_q9bvHSrRHaIfgbD6gGwIxN8xY5clfh3UuoETbdWDNvE34jIasV6YQOos1K6yS00LyOIlBlgBFzXqQXZaE3hTotbPSGOI0mwpVNr4lXh6cxJQDh_XJHPi3L36CJCFjW7xF0F0Sze9njxYyXBTfJIFI-Dz_TIFPxmrohcijM1w_vHWrp_dyw81oCwwJ2j1_gxqQHyoJAYat3xAm-BOs28Td3muUtUp0j_A6dLy9iZFmhtLrQAb9zS5h6at2THuRdnjWSzw2z2tkmyQ%3D%3D) No matter what, I will always tell the truth and I will never stop holding Trump accountable. Thank you, **Chris Christie**

clean_body: My team and I keep arguing about it, so I need you to chime in| | | | | My team has put me to work during debate prep... Getting ready to take the stage is never easy but I have never been one who's afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work! Now, I need your input. Which debate topic do you think will be the focus of this debate? I need to be prepared for anything that may come up, so your opinion is very important to me. No matter what, I will always tell the truth and I will never stop holding Trump accountable. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Now AIPAC is attacking Summer Lee and Jamaal Bowman.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First, they came for Rashida. Now, AIPAC and their super PAC United
Democracy Project are running attack ads on Facebook against Summer Lee
and Jamaal Bowman.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231106-jb-sl.i5K-tl&refcode=em20231106-31715&t=1001&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Screenshots of attack ads against Jamaal Bowman and Summer Lee

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231106-jb-sl.i5K-tl&refcode=em20231106-31715&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Will you rush a split contribution of $3 or more right
now to support Summer, Jamaal, and Justice Democrats and help us fight
back?

Summer and Jamaal were already on AIPAC’s target list in 2024: for months,
we’ve learned they’re building up their war chest and recruiting potential
candidates to challenge these Democratic incumbents at the ballot box next
November.

Now that they are some of the only members of Congress to demand a
ceasefire in Gaza and safe return of hostages, AIPAC is rapidly ramping up
their attacks in an effort to kick them out of the House next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231106-jb-sl.i5K-tl&refcode=em20231106-31715&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Justice Democrats stands with Summer and Jamaal, and we will do
everything in our power to re-elect them. Will you split a grassroots
donation between us and their campaigns right now to support us in this
urgent moment?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231106-jb-sl.i5K-tl&refcode=em20231106-31715&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Contribute $3

Through your contributions, we’re going to fight like hell to defend
Summer, Jamaal, and the rest of the Squad from being ousted by this
corporate- and GOP-fueled, anti-Palestinian group.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231106-31715-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31715_1203867_hT4aN_&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31715%2E1203867%2EhT4aN_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: The only thing standing between us and a BIG WIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniel Cameron for Kentucky
body:
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/7b5ffeea474e338d3947229f28c3afba/40933/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933)

---
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/7b5ffeea474e338d3947229f28c3afba/b2fbf854d41b0ea3c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---

subject: Border Alert (via Team Waltz)
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,

Right now, I’m calling you into my strategy huddle.

We’re building the groundwork for our strategy to defend our House majority next year, and I want your advice.

You’re a top grassroots patriot on the ground, so I’m trusting you with this, Friend.

Fellow Conservative, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. **Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans._If you are, I’m asking for you to send us _just_ $5 right now_.**
---

clean_body: | You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need.| | | Fellow Conservative, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. Texans know me; Americans know me. It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans.If you are, I’m asking for you to send us just $5 right now. By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. For Freedom, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: BobCasey.com
subject: This is a big campaign milestone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
There's no time to waste.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1073%2E552475%2EtwWn2f)
Peter, there’s no time to waste.
We are now less than one year out from Election Day, and the stakes in Pennsylvania’s Senate race couldn’t be any higher.
On one side, we have Bob Casey: a lifelong Pennsylvanian who spends every day in the Senate fighting to lower costs for our families, build a stronger economy that works for everyone, and make sure our seniors have the benefits they’ve earned.
On the other side, there’s David McCormick, Bob’s mega-millionaire GOP opponent _who doesn’t even live in Pennsylvania._
**With Senate control on the line, we can’t afford to play it safe.** The GOP is gearing up to spend a historic amount of money in Pennsylvania to defeat Bob and flip this seat, so we set a 72-hour goal to raise $30,000 and fight back.
We even made you a personal link to make your own contribution toward this goal. **Will you make your first contribution to support Bob Casey now?**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-1?refcode=em20231106-1-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231106-1?refcode=em20231106-1&refcode2=1073_552475_twWn2f&akid=1073%2E552475%2EtwWn2f)**
Winning this race won’t be easy. But with all of us working together, we can protect this seat and our Senate majority.
-- Bob Casey for Senate

This administration has left Tucson communities to shoulder the burden of this devastating crisis.
| [](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=881e634978994329bc5a83ed2cf84517&_e=qhiOmA1uYmy79hBWqcYgDbY7CIy-pGypaN6oXH1rOKJsQk8d7jPTiTw8lz5sHpZR7vLfsKxhKD2Aq06pVrRQGi37EBHdkQ07FAvoa5bVpWNixsS_EPCW7zmbdSrDDxoWeU02yZ71UNSo_zJbLBJM1KNY0Dgmzzs5mdJXTu5izQwkfiR4thLlOhSo-b3mmP7XWug-rmBJrnKTjbVJE_HaCztIqpYh2STSH-xm44TgNmeookk78M8vqVF_MhrhxxLnKN9VPYgo2wHlev1GQKUiTrB62oHZi97Gsvmtc1eEorOLoPR7mOGuzWYmnxGy1kEXNWFrMspoETUTrDEpwj90k60N04XjJ4GCaJyLwSXzqcWeCJT52GK7kUFtYzKRzDCcsUSAa5kpZGldOEf0_YxHtDE0fOIrGgjh2k00dpXg2XPLf3GTr-je7sKi3worjUuntYJQCQr5pNvzNYnWBXS_ig%3D%3D)

Peter,
---
For **THREE** consecutive months, the Tucson Sector has been the busiest of the nine southern border sectors – _seeing 51,000 migrants crossing in September, a 2,000 increase from August._
---
As the Biden Administration’s policies fail to address the real issues in Tucson, these trends are unlikely to change.
---
**Border crossings in the Tucson Sector are largely driven by Mexican and Central American arrivals.**
---
_Yet the Biden Administration has issued policies aimed at Venezuelan arrivals even though border agents encountered 18,000 people from Mexico as opposed to 227 Venezuelans just last month alone._
---
_**Unless this administration implements policies addressing Mexican and Guatemalan migration, Tucson will likely see an increase in crossings.**_
---
**Our border is in crisis as DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and the Biden Administration’s policies and agenda fail.**
---
I won’t stop fighting against the Left’s agenda to SECURE OUR BORDER and protect our communities, but I need your help.
---

As the Biden Administration’s policies fail to address the real issues in Tucson, these trends are unlikely to change. Border crossings in the Tucson Sector are largely driven by Mexican and Central American arrivals. Yet the Biden Administration has issued policies aimed at Venezuelan arrivals even though border agents encountered 18,000 people from Mexico as opposed to 227 Venezuelans just last month alone. Unless this administration implements policies addressing Mexican and Guatemalan migration, Tucson will likely see an increase in crossings. Our border is in crisis as DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and the Biden Administration’s policies and agenda fail. clean_body: Democrats’ Senate majority is at stake | | | Peter – Yesterday marked one year out from Election Day 2024 – and we all know that the race to the White House will run through Arizona. Democrats’ Senate majority is also at stake and Arizona may be THE deciding race. MAGA extremist and election denier Kari Lake will be the Republican nominee–and Donald Trump endorsed her right out of the gate. That means MILLIONS of MAGA dollars are going to pour into Lake's coffers. We need all the help we can get to keep this election-denying, abortion-banning extremist as far from office as possible. And Kyrsten Sinema running as a third-party spoiler will only make the race even more complicated. Hi friend,
Tomorrow, we stand at a major crossroads with the opportunity to collectively shape the future of our Commonwealth. The stakes of this election are high, but so is our resolve to ensure Virginia moves forward on a path of progress, inclusivity, and hope.
This Tuesday is about supporting leaders who will fight tooth and nail to support public schools, safeguard reproductive rights, and ensure our Commonwealth reflects every family's aspirations. Your vote for Lashrecse is a vote for a Commonwealth that cares for every one of us.
So, friend, if you're not sure where to vote, no problem. Find your closest polling place here >> [https://iwillvote.com/]
GET READY TO VOTE [https://iwillvote.com/]
Let's continue our progress. The stakes are high, but our will is higher.
See you at the polls!
Team Lashrecse

body:

| Election Day is here! Polls will be open 6:00AM - 8:00PM

| This Election Day, Vote for Fighters Who Will Stand up for Your Constitutional Rights. Common Sense, Common People!
The only votes that will not count are those that are not cast. This year, all of the New Jersey Legislators' seats are up. Speak to your neighbors, friends, and family to make sure they get out to vote as well.
We appreciate your support! Team Durr

**Election Day is _tomorrow_ , team!**
When you head to the polls tomorrow, your vote will help ensure that Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court represents the needs of our generation. With abortion access on the line, **Pennsylvania has never needed your vote more.**
And before the big day, we’re here to give you all the information you need to cast your vote proudly.
✅ **First things first: Do you know where your polling place is?**
[If not, we’ve got you covered! Check your polling location right here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72911692/436777650/648776255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTBkYTJhYy1lYTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R4Qrvz6h_r9t5s3qvOcpd85viiQMWYN0ao0Or72_XLY=&emci=0882bea2-d679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e50da2ac-ea7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
✅ Second, here’s a reminder of voting times that you’ll want to keep in mind for tomorrow. In Pennsylvania, **polls open at 7 a.m. and close at 8 p.m. ET. **
✅ Third – if this is your first time voting at your polling location, be sure to bring your ID! **[Check what forms of ID are accepted here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72911695/436777658/-111918261?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTBkYTJhYy1lYTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R4Qrvz6h_r9t5s3qvOcpd85viiQMWYN0ao0Or72_XLY=&emci=0882bea2-d679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e50da2ac-ea7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)**
Got all that down? Then you’re ready to vote! We can’t wait for you to make your voice heard.
See you at the polls,
NextGen Pennsylvania

clean_body: Do you know where you’re voting tomorrow? | | | Pennsylvania’s election is tomorrow. Do you know where your polling place is? | | | Election Day is tomorrow , team! When you head to the polls tomorrow, your vote will help ensure that Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court represents the needs of our generation. With abortion access on the line, Pennsylvania has never needed your vote more. And before the big day, we’re here to give you all the information you need to cast your vote proudly. ✅ First things first: Do you know where your polling place is? ✅ Second, here’s a reminder of voting times that you’ll want to keep in mind for tomorrow. In Pennsylvania, polls open at 7 a.m. and close at 8 p.m. ET. ✅ Third – if this is your first time voting at your polling location, be sure to bring your ID! Got all that down? Then you’re ready to vote! We can’t wait for you to make your voice heard. See you at the polls, NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Tomorrow, voters in Ohio and Virginia will go to the ballot box and decide whether or not women will have abortion rights.

In both states, supporters of reproductive freedom are being bombarded by extremist anti-choice groups with well-funded and deceptive misinformation designed to confuse voters.

Virginia is the last bastion for reproductive rights in the South, and in Ohio, voters need to vote the opposite way on the question than they did in August in order to save abortion rights — so getting out the vote is more important than ever!

That’s why Our Revolution is doing everything in our power to turn out the vote in these critical final days ahead of Tuesday. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us get out the vote? name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: Election Day is Tuesday, November 7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
Make sure to vote! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=a13ccd0348&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

These last six years in office have been the dream of a lifetime. Serving the communities that raised me is something I cherish. Now, on the eve of an election to serve the final two years of my Council term, I want to say _thank you_.

I know that we've had some difficult moments and we have fought tirelessly against tough foes together, but there have also been many, many more instances when we've celebrated huge wins for our community. I know that we will continue to add to our record, adding to the dozens of bills we've passed that protect families, workers, small businesses, and the environment. And in partnership, we'll keep collaborating on cleaner and safer communities, strengthening our public transit, investing in our green spaces and expanding access to health care and education.

Thank you for the opportunity to keep working hard to do right for the future of this community - for your family and mine.
---
| Thank you,

Carlina
---
| | |
---
| _Polls are open on Tuesday, November 7 from 6 am to 9 pm. Please[ check your poll site](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=da96fb9731&e=2de202398d) and vote._

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Disgraceful
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

We wish we were kidding, but this is a real headline from NBC News:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=1&akid=6843%2E3935704%2EfKCZjL)
Yes, you read that right. If you buy a roof from one of Florida’s roofing companies, you’ll get a firearm to go with it.
This is the disgraceful reality of Ron DeSantis’ Florida—a state that has seen far too many gun violence tragedies due to its lax gun laws.
We launched our GIFFORDS Florida program last year—our first state-based initiative to help elect more gun safety champions in Florida. With enough support, we know that Floridians can fight back against the dangerous gun laws being enacted by Ron DeSantis, Marco Rubio, Rick Scott, and other extremist elected officials.

clean_body: We wish we were kidding, but this is a real headline from NBC News: Yes, you read that right. If you buy a roof from one of Florida’s roofing companies, you’ll get a firearm to go with it. This is the disgraceful reality of Ron DeSantis’ Florida—a state that has seen far too many gun violence tragedies due to its lax gun laws. We launched our GIFFORDS Florida program last year—our first state-based initiative to help elect more gun safety champions in Florida. With enough support, we know that Floridians can fight back against the dangerous gun laws being enacted by Ron DeSantis, Marco Rubio, Rick Scott, and other extremist elected officials. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | \- The GIFFORDS Team ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: Stand up for gun safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
The United States has suffered 597 mass shootings so far this year.
#
Peter,
**The United States has suffered 597 mass shootings so far this year.**
The unfortunate reality is that millions of Americans live in fear of being gunned down while getting groceries, going to work, or having a simple outing with their families. We see too many innocent lives being cut short at the hands of inadequate gun safety legislation.
**[Add your name to my petition right now to stop the cycle of gun violence and stand up for gun safety.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72912962/436781997/1165550320?refcode=dd_em_231106_1_a&ms=dd_em_231106_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQwN2NjNy1lZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWurHHJbTXVFFL1niZzUbVumSbOX-ff2ryuU1KRmQ5k=&emci=6691a934-e07c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd07cc7-ee7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Illinois is no stranger to this crisis. Just two weeks ago, a man senselessly injured 15 people after open firing at a Halloween party in Chicago. Highland Park is still recovering from the July 4th mass shooting last year.
It’s tragedies like these that plague our nation. As your Senator, I will **never** be complacent when the lives of our friends, family members, and neighbors are at risk every day due to gun violence.
**When is enough _enough_?**
Congress has the ability to take meaningful action to prevent such tragedies from happening. We made progress last year with the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , but more work is ahead. By mandating universal background checks and banning the sale, transfer, and importation of weapons of war, we could save countless lives and make our communities safer.
****[Will you sign my petition? Your voice is crucial in demanding that Congress take action on gun safety legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72912964/436781999/1165550320?refcode=dd_em_231106_1_a&ms=dd_em_231106_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQwN2NjNy1lZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWurHHJbTXVFFL1niZzUbVumSbOX-ff2ryuU1KRmQ5k=&emci=6691a934-e07c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8fd07cc7-ee7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
My best,
Dick Durbin

subject: Matt wants to hear from you, Peter:

subject: These final hours (Virginia)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
What we’re able to do in these final hours could make all the difference.
#
Derek,
We’ve told you a few times about our candidates in Virginia, Veterans and National Security professionals.
We’ve told you just how close the power divide in Virginia is, with a handful of seats determining control of both the Senate and the House of Delegates.
We’ve told you about how this year’s elections in Virginia are a test case for the GOP and their strategy going into 2024.
And we’ve told you that down the home stretch, we are spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to win — to flip the House of Delegates and hold the Senate, and send the GOP running with their tails between their legs.
So, with the election tomorrow, we’re reaching out one final time about Virginia. What we’re able to do in these final hours could make all the difference. We need you with us — for Virginia and all the races to come.
[**Make a donation to VoteVets today and support our work up and down the ballot, from coast-to-coast. VoteVets supports candidates who can win. We run ads that can flip seats. And with success in Virginia tomorrow, we’ll run full steam into 2024.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231106-1-30&t=1&akid=18996%2E3013755%2EO_wx4A)**

body:
The Blue Dogs are on a mission to defeat extremism in Congress. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913047/436782292/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913048/436782293/155191372?&refcode=E4838-20231106-SanfordBishop-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=) Peter, Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee told me to “retire or lose.” That’s right. Outside interest groups and dark-money organizations were so confident that they were going to defeat me, that they issued an ultimatum. _**Retire or lose.**_ **Well, I chose neither. And the reason I’m still in Congress serving the people of Middle and Southwest Georgia is because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter. **Your contributions and your effort pushed our campaign to victory, despite the odds. The Blue Dog Democrats are made of people who are deeply rooted in their districts, who understand how to bring their constituents' voices to Congress, and who are determined to do right by the people who elected them. [**Will you help us build another winning coalition, no matter what the special interest groups throw at us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913049/436782294/155191372?&refcode=E4838-20231106-SanfordBishop-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=) Peter — we have a plan to restore order to the House by electing more candidates who will put their constituents over party politics. But a crucial part of that plan is for members like me and other Blue Dogs in competitive districts to successfully defend against extremist challengers. I know that special interests will try again to defeat us in Georgia’s 2nd District, and in close races all across the country, which is why it’s so important that we’re prepared. [**So I’m asking you to pitch in with a contribution, Peter — help us take back the Speaker’s gavel and get the people’s House once again working for the people →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913050/436782295/155191372?&refcode=E4838-20231106-SanfordBishop-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913051/436782296/155191372?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4838-20231106-SanfordBishop-EG-Surrogate&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913052/436782297/155191372?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4838-20231106-SanfordBishop-EG-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMDk3ZjQ1LWVmN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lwid3lOL0LS0gRmpwDjiqTwwD4Mn4EFKp1cOwA17QYA=)

clean_body: The Blue Dogs are on a mission to defeat extremism in Congress. | = | = Peter, Last year, the National Republican Congressional Committee told me to “retire or lose.” That’s right. Outside interest groups and dark-money organizations were so confident that they were going to defeat me, that they issued an ultimatum. Retire or lose. Well, I chose neither. And the reason I’m still in Congress serving the people of Middle and Southwest Georgia is because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter. Your contributions and your effort pushed our campaign to victory, despite the odds. The Blue Dog Democrats are made of people who are deeply rooted in their districts, who understand how to bring their constituents' voices to Congress, and who are determined to do right by the people who elected them. = Peter — we have a plan to restore order to the House by electing more candidates who will put their constituents over party politics. But a crucial part of that plan is for members like me and other Blue Dogs in competitive districts to successfully defend against extremist challengers. I know that special interests will try again to defeat us in Georgia’s 2nd District, and in close races all across the country, which is why it’s so important that we’re prepared. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for all your support. Peter, You would think that a group of young law students at the University of Minnesota would be excited to attend a speech by a sitting Supreme Court Justice...

But you’d be wrong.

Because when Justice Amy Coney Barrett took the stage to speak, police had to drag out protestors with the intent on disrupting her speech.

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b66b8d8fecdc4b0d93128887e1f551ef&_e=RI-La7HtMYvo1NsL_sHMcr5FU2j1MvgK1WgIUuTN5UOPCjT1YU8EAFp_MkRgQh4M16Bmm1lNqlzLxRNz-FoPqLz5SVQLgrn3mjP7KflmGSRO9M1XlsSIM4K9x1GyywPoctREtunKj8iNnEdkGE-iClX4X-jtFiJL09X17934TGPoqUWkikE_FUPlGL7ytV2CxVfvv86a9brq5TG9k_VYZisDzpu1Btw93zmGDO9bHEQd-leA6G2FvELpFpGznqfLUHVL9reMNiWfTUN9hiALYWns57xp2Sg3Qjm1AcZTMfI2fYZb05GF1on4-q44OqoMxQm_80pT-Pmido3OsYnhU_3ET3CD4Ldn6IA8GtsSK13mva9m7Bhf-G0fY63kx6FT)
---
What were they shouting? A whole bunch of leftist slogans and promises to “shut this s--- down!" _ _ But here’s the most revealing thing they said: _"Not the court, not the state, people must decide their fate!"__ _ Peter, it’s disheartening that the attendees at a law school lecture reject the Court’s legitimacy entirely. _ _ But that tracks how we see the woke mob treating an independent judiciary: as an obstacle to be destroyed._ _ **Just look at how the radical left treated the Supreme Court when they overturned**** _Roe v. Wade..._**
* ** _Mobs in front of the Supreme Court..._**
* ** _Protests at the homes of Supreme Court Justices..._**
* **_Calls for impeachment..._**
* _**_Even death threats._**___

**_Our justice system is under attack. We must fight back!_**

body:
| | | Fellow American, you never want to mess around with strong, determined women. Especially us women from Florida. My friend and colleague, Kat Cammack, who represents Florida’s 3rd Congressional District, is a true FIGHTER in Washington. We’re proud to be Floridians and we always get the job done. But you know what the Left hates more than anything? **Republican women who WIN.** They’ve pledged to spend MILLIONS against us, and you can bet we won’t go down without a fight. **[Can you stand with us during this challenge? My friend and colleague, Kat Cammack, who represents Florida’s 3rd Congressional District, is a true FIGHTER in Washington. We’re proud to be Floridians and we always get the job done. But you know what the Left hates more than anything? Republican women who WIN. They’ve pledged to spend MILLIONS against us, and you can bet we won’t go down without a fight. There is NO ROOM for woke policies in Florida, and it’s time to show the Left we mean business. While the men continue to argue, leave it up to us women to get the job DONE for the American people. We can’t do this alone. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Together, we can take America First to the next level. | Fellow American - the third Presidential Debate is just days away. Before Wednesday night, I want to hear from you: | 1. Are you registered to vote in the 2024 Republican Presidential Primary? 2. Will you be watching the third Presidential Debate? 3. What question or topic do you want to see the candidates and myself debate? | The truth is, right now I am the only presidential candidate with a plan for the issues facing America today. From reviving our national identity to unleashing our economy and declaring economic independence from communist China, to preventing World War III, my vision is focused on national revival, not a national divorce. Together, we can take America First to the next level. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | ---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brandon Presley
subject: this race is winnable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-bp-split?amount=20?source=em231106-zm-bp-split&refcode2=568_8507_n9C6bf&akid=568%2E8507%2En9C6bf)
**Folks, it’s been one heck of a ride, and I can hardly believe we're less than 24 hours from Election Day. Let me tell you where my race stands and how you can help power my campaign to the finish line.**

A recent poll shows my race VIRTUALLY TIED 45% to 46%. And the political experts at _Cook Political Report_ just upgraded our chances of flipping Mississippi blue! They know what we know: Tate Reeves is beatable.

[_The thing is, I can’t beat him by myself. I need the support of this grassroots team. So please, will you split $20 between Zak Malamed and my campaign? Any amount makes a major difference._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-bp-split?amount=20?source=em231106-zm-bp-split&refcode2=568_8507_n9C6bf&akid=568%2E8507%2En9C6bf)

[DONATE NOW ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-bp-split?amount=20?amount=20&refcode=em20231106-bp-split-el&refcode2=568_8507_n9C6bf&akid=568%2E8507%2En9C6bf)
---

Folks, The truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real change in every corner of the state. And I am all in to make real change happen.

But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight.

\- They know the polls are tied.
\- They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the country.
\- They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership and lies.
\- But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over our campaign.

**It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way.**

[_Mississippi can’t afford four more years of corrupt leadership. So, I’m asking you to step up, Team. Please, will you split a donation between Zak Malamed and my campaign to keep our fundraising on track? We cannot afford to fall short or show any weakness during this crucial moment._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-bp-split?amount=20?source=em231106-zm-bp-split&refcode2=568_8507_n9C6bf&akid=568%2E8507%2En9C6bf)
