clean_body: Folks, it’s been one heck of a ride, and I can hardly believe we're less than 24 hours from Election Day. Let me tell you where my race stands and how you can help power my campaign to the finish line. A recent poll shows my race VIRTUALLY TIED 45% to 46%. And the political experts at Cook Political Report just upgraded our chances of flipping Mississippi blue! They know what we know: Tate Reeves is beatable. Folks, The truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real change in every corner of the state. And I am all in to make real change happen. But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight. \- They know the polls are tied. \- They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the country. \- They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership and lies. \- But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over our campaign. It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way. With immense gratitude, Brandon Presley Paid for by Zak for Congress not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate’s committee. Approved by Brandon Presley.

clean_body: [] Friends- Tomorrow is the day we’ve been waiting for: election day! There are a few things to remember for tomorrow if you haven’t voted yet. Check your registration status here: [] Virginia has same day voter registration that allows you to cast a provisional ballot if you were not able to register on or before October 16th, find details here [] . Ask for a provisional ballot at your polling location. If you are voting by mail: In order for your mail ballot to be counted it must be postmarked by or on election day, November 7th If you are voting in-person on election day: November 7th is election day Polls open at 6am and close at 7pm If you are in line before 7pm your polling place MUST allow you to vote * Find your polling place here: IWillVote.com [] Happy voting! subject: The situation:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Here’s the situation: Republicans are scaling up their attacks in the leadup to the election.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4390%2E5257348%2Ezkl7B_)
Derek —
With the March primary election less than 4 months away, we wanted to update you on our work to elect Adam as California’s next U.S. Senator:
_**Here’s the situation:**_ Republicans are scaling up their attacks in the leadup to the election. Later this week, GOP presidential candidates will take the debate stage trying to out-Trump each other. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is rallying his base in Florida. They'll once again show that the only thing they’re united in is sabotaging our Democratic progress.
_**Here’s the solution:**_ Adam is working to build a 58-county plan to boost voter turnout across California and flip the House blue. He is also working to defend and expand our Senate majority and re-elect President Biden.
The way we’re going to win this election is by getting our message out to voters before Republicans do and defining this race — simple as that, Derek. That means hiring more organizers, getting more yard signs, sharing more ads, and more.
**[Will you pitch in $5 to help elect Adam?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=nov2023_abs_em.SJ7CRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4390%2E5257348%2Ezkl7B_)**

body:
We’re looking back to our first-ever wins to energize our fight for progress. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913975/436785217/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUyYjQ4YS1mMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6gYPy2ya6oazUApLLFCH-bzM158-1s2BVI6b6mnbxM=&emci=1100a12d-cf7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=0de2b48a-f07c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Friend, This week isn't just any ordinary one - it's our time to celebrate the incredible journey we've been on for the last seven years. That's right, **seven whole years since we scored our first ballot measure victories!** [KEEP OUR WIN STREAK GOING!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913976/436785224/-1744159550?refcode=E4835-20231106-FirstWinsAnniversary-SB-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUyYjQ4YS1mMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6gYPy2ya6oazUApLLFCH-bzM158-1s2BVI6b6mnbxM=) Think back all the way to 2016. That was the year we kicked things off with a bang, securing those landmark wins for minimum wage hikes in Colorado, D.C., and Maine and nailing down paid sick leave and wage victories in Arizona and Washington. **Fast forward to today, and we've racked up over 30 wins across the nation.** Talk about hitting the ground running and keeping the pace! Much like our past victories in Michigan and Vermont last year, this upcoming election has the potential to be a pivotal turning point for reproductive rights nationwide. We firmly believe that the most effective way to safeguard our rights is by empowering voters to express their views through the ballot box. It's all about spreading our message far and wide. With a hefty slate of ballot campaigns waiting in the wings, now's the moment to pool our energy, passion, and resources. We're setting our sights on more Medicaid expansion, higher minimum wages, comprehensive paid leave, and protecting the right to choose. Yep, 2024 is poised to be a whirlwind of progressive action, and we're just getting started! [**So, friend, in the leadup to more electoral victories (and celebrating the progress we’ve made so far) can we count on you to keep our movement going with a $10 or more donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913977/436785225/293016571?refcode=E4835-20231106-FirstWinsAnniversary-SL-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUyYjQ4YS1mMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6gYPy2ya6oazUApLLFCH-bzM158-1s2BVI6b6mnbxM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913978/436785226/-1969390245?express_lane=true&refcode=E4835-20231106-FirstWinsAnniversary-EG-Other&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUyYjQ4YS1mMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6gYPy2ya6oazUApLLFCH-bzM158-1s2BVI6b6mnbxM=)** | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72913979/436785228/-1969390245?express_lane=true&refcode=E4835-20231106-FirstWinsAnniversary-EG-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUyYjQ4YS1mMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6gYPy2ya6oazUApLLFCH-bzM158-1s2BVI6b6mnbxM=)**

clean_body: We’re looking back to our first-ever wins to energize our fight for progress. | | Friend, This week isn't just any ordinary one - it's our time to celebrate the incredible journey we've been on for the last seven years. That's right, seven whole years since we scored our first ballot measure victories! = Think back all the way to 2016. That was the year we kicked things off with a bang, securing those landmark wins for minimum wage hikes in Colorado, D.C., and Maine and nailing down paid sick leave and wage victories in Arizona and Washington. Fast forward to today, and we've racked up over 30 wins across the nation. Talk about hitting the ground running and keeping the pace! Much like our past victories in Michigan and Vermont last year, this upcoming election has the potential to be a pivotal turning point for reproductive rights nationwide. We firmly believe that the most effective way to safeguard our rights is by empowering voters to express their views through the ballot box. It's all about spreading our message far and wide. With a hefty slate of ballot campaigns waiting in the wings, now's the moment to pool our energy, passion, and resources. We're setting our sights on more Medicaid expansion, higher minimum wages, comprehensive paid leave, and protecting the right to choose. Yep, 2024 is poised to be a whirlwind of progressive action, and we're just getting started! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for helping us continue this critical work, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. **Everyone is taking notice.**

I want to make a big splash on Wednesday night in Miami – but we also need to raise as much money as possible between now and before I take the debate stage.

[**Before the day is over, I want to secure an additional 500 donations to Team Vivek to show the D.C. Establishment the strength of our movement. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The field is smaller, my opponents' attacks have been on the uptick, and the pressure is on. | | Fellow American, In less than 48 hours, I'll take the stage for the third GOP presidential primary debate. The field is smaller, my opponents' attacks have been on the uptick, and the pressure is on. Here is a quick message from me before the debate: When I launched this campaign in late February, we were polling at 0.0%. Now we’re squarely in the upper echelon in the national polls AND have the strongest grassroots base out of any candidate on the stage – 130,000 unique small-dollar donors and an army of grassroots volunteers. Everyone is taking notice. I want to make a big splash on Wednesday night in Miami – but we also need to raise as much money as possible between now and before I take the debate stage. Whether you can give $1, $10, or $100 today – that doesn't matter to me. It's the fact that you're in this fight with me. I am not counting on Super PACs to fund this campaign – I am counting on you. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72914555/436787110/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmJhNDAwOS1mMzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKg1qT2DTxBRagb7kkucnB_zqbcIjPrOnvSfglXd8OM=&emci=5378fb44-c07c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=f6ba4009-f37c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Before you head to bed for the night and get ready to make your voice heard tomorrow at the polls, I wanted to take a moment to chat a little bit about what Virginia would look like under Republican control. But first, I have to ask: __[**Will you consider donating $5 to help us hit our Election Day fundraising goal of $14,000?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72914556/436787111/701577722?refcode=mw_em_231106_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmJhNDAwOS1mMzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKg1qT2DTxBRagb7kkucnB_zqbcIjPrOnvSfglXd8OM=)__ Now, here’s what Virginia might look like if the GOP win control of both chambers tomorrow:
* Thanks to Democrats in the Virginia Senate, we’ve stopped Republicans in the House of Delegates from passing some really dangerous gun laws. If they win? _They’ll be able to pass their proposed concealed handgun legislation – legislation that is the most lenient we’ve seen in years._
* Republicans' vision for access to voting includes elimination of ballot drop boxes, slashing the number of early voting sites, and rolling back access to mail-in ballots. Democrats have blocked these attempts so far, but _if Republicans win both chambers this fall, they will have full control to make these measures law._
* _The GOP would like to give out big corporate tax cuts to the wealthiest few in Virginia_ , rather than lower costs for our everyday families.
* Medicaid expansion? Not on the GOP’s watch. _They plan to cut back Medicaid for hundreds of thousands of Virginians._
* And last but certainly not least: _Republicans plan to enact an abortion ban – joining the rest of the South in restricting a woman’s right to choose._

These policies will only hurt Virginians and take our state backwards. __[**This is our last chance to give Democrats in the Commonwealth the support they need to win both chambers. clean_body: ... a GOP-controlled General Assembly | | | Derek, Before you head to bed for the night and get ready to make your voice heard tomorrow at the polls, I wanted to take a moment to chat a little bit about what Virginia would look like under Republican control. But first, I have to ask: = Now, here’s what Virginia might look like if the GOP win control of both chambers tomorrow: Thanks to Democrats in the Virginia Senate, we’ve stopped Republicans in the House of Delegates from passing some really dangerous gun laws. If they win? They’ll be able to pass their proposed concealed handgun legislation – legislation that is the most lenient we’ve seen in years. Republicans' vision for access to voting includes elimination of ballot drop boxes, slashing the number of early voting sites, and rolling back access to mail-in ballots. Democrats have blocked these attempts so far, but if Republicans win both chambers this fall, they will have full control to make these measures law. The GOP would like to give out big corporate tax cuts to the wealthiest few in Virginia , rather than lower costs for our everyday families. Medicaid expansion? Not on the GOP’s watch. They plan to cut back Medicaid for hundreds of thousands of Virginians. And last but certainly not least: Republicans plan to enact an abortion ban – joining the rest of the South in restricting a woman’s right to choose. These policies will only hurt Virginians and take our state backwards. = Thank you, Mark ****=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Peter,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. name: Team Bennet
subject: Michael’s work to protect unaccompanied migrant children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110623_ChildrensCourt_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110623_ChildrensCourt_act]
Friend — Our current immigration system is broken. As he has in the past, Michael will work across the aisle to find commonsense solutions that move us forward.
That’s what he is doing with his new bipartisan, bicameral bill, the Immigration Court Efficiency and Children’s Court Act.
This bill would create an alternative to the current court system for unaccompanied migrant children. It would ensure these vulnerable children are treated with the dignity, respect, and care they deserve.
Unaccompanied minors are often put in front of judges alone in immigration courts. Their cases are legally more complex than those of adults, which has led to a backlog of more than 62,000 cases.
The Children’s Courts Act would ensure that judges are specially trained to handle these challenging cases, that children understand the process and proceedings, and that legal services are easily accessible.
This bill is supported by Democrats and Republicans in the House and the Senate. But it also needs the support of folks back home.
Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of the Immigration Court Efficiency and Children’s Court Act now? This bill is a step forward to fix our broken immigration system. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_110323_childrenscourt_act]

body:
As I depart the courthouse, I hope you’ll read the letter I wrote for you.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ee6481deac7946a8a755dc856ebbf672&_e=0ZBHaG0CO68etY0JIB4jElWT8OcfL40E3a2WDo3d3bsKVn_IJI0ri_ESl6s1-qPbv-7GN8tkOE-2m_0L_1Izw7j9Hcfp4zBfKLi6fMOeOfRpi7lhQuI3ZRCuZSKF5_l69jvmN2PVu_w2NF1QU_P_3GnweizG04qKk2SxA8alXSt6DkH9USJGiu_ZA3N_5GTPOQQaOzSFAdFBmPKceUhmzUXlUgQEGJ5sBR1_FnosDqXnMOobDuVxa2_XkzxxcPJPRJiIVXqhyFs29jV0VfzfD2sWfgnpVsnqsurAVVE8fLi9hDiwLVh796N1IiXctkHjqG0SN8eP2QKQccJjxbd5snhGwYYCB1nEciQmpttdBZ4CXwJW-t-_1PPhZAtIoll-dvgWu7MDoUGV-4jOgFGosgvcPYDSGXiWEiNnzdWk9TRrArlRSo_YLZxCdX9tZSVmIg9YZK1V29x3EHRxQ9K1qEX375MgmGDvXpgCwqQoTdR5tkX-zezlml_3YkQmHT5q)
---
| | Patriot,

---
After just testifying, I certainly have a lot to say, but it all comes from the heart.
---
Never in a million years did I think this is what would become of the country that I’ve loved so dearly my entire life.
---
America has descended into utter tyranny.
---
Right before our very eyes, our once beautiful Republic is being transformed into a Marxist tin-pot dictatorship where Crooked Joe’s _regime_ has weaponized the legal system against not only a former president (your favorite, I might add),******_but against the very citizens he swore an oath to protect._**
---
And today, it saddens me to say that there is truly nothing _less_ American than what you just witnessed...
---
_I was forced to take the stand in a SHAM TRIAL to defend my livelihood, my incredible business, and my family from what is being called the _“corporate death penalty.”_ _
---
Make no mistake this has nothing to do with justice, fairness, or the rule of law. _In fact, the Radical Democrats can’t even identify a “victim” in this fabricated “case” against me_.
---
**This is nothing more than Crooked Joe’s latest act of ELECTION INTERFERENCE!**
---
And the _ONLY_ REASON I was forced into the courtroom and onto the witness stand today, is because it meant I was consequently forced _OFF_ the campaign trail at a time when we are WINNING like never before:
---
[**“Trump Leads in 5 Critical States as Voters Blast Biden, Times/Siena Poll Finds”**](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ee6481deac7946a8a755dc856ebbf672&_e=0ZBHaG0CO68etY0JIB4jElWT8OcfL40E3a2WDo3d3bsKVn_IJI0ri_ESl6s1-qPbv-7GN8tkOE-2m_0L_1Izw7j9Hcfp4zBfKLi6fMOeOfRpi7lhQuI3ZRCuZSKF5_l69jvmN2PVu_w2NF1QU_P_3GnweizG04qKk2SxA8alXSt6DkH9USJGiu_ZA3N_5GTPOQQaOzSFAdFBmPKceUhmzUXlUgQEGJ5sBR1_FnosDqXnMOobDuVxa2_XkzxxcPJPRJiIVXqhyFs29jV0VfzfD2sWfgnpVsnqsurAVVE8fLi9hDiwLVh796N1IiXctkHjqG0SN8eP2QKQccJjxbd5ssUKu4cCYfJiMoty1hllX-61q_um2diuLtAT5bDH2nSefQNIUI59o06zGwZoFrn8OlyXWT_lq5C8BBiT_Tdy6ezFVW_jTyAQskVbzJBfCF3_iv6dOpdhREoFD-wxlKZlv3TAwO9kIP55jpDlPbjNC53L2aa09XANfQ1O8r7KDRaC) [_Voters in battleground states said they trusted Donald J. Trump over President Biden on the economy, foreign policy and immigration_](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ee6481deac7946a8a755dc856ebbf672&_e=0ZBHaG0CO68etY0JIB4jElWT8OcfL40E3a2WDo3d3bsKVn_IJI0ri_ESl6s1-qPbv-7GN8tkOE-2m_0L_1Izw7j9Hcfp4zBfKLi6fMOeOfRpi7lhQuI3ZRCuZSKF5_l69jvmN2PVu_w2NF1QU_P_3GnweizG04qKk2SxA8alXSt6DkH9USJGiu_ZA3N_5GTPOQQaOzSFAdFBmPKceUhmzUXlUgQEGJ5sBR1_FnosDqXnMOobDuVxa2_XkzxxcPJPRJiIVXqhyFs29jV0VfzfD2sWfgnpVsnqsurAVVE8fLi9hDiwLVh796N1IiXctkHjqG0SN8eP2QKQccJjxbd5sjLWiwW2yvLMsjjJnANHtqJomik1QpRY6LxwC0cCIGkaBtMd2uWi00QKHArJuaQAH0HAHjimUPavCrTzApgSIBonMuX3-uVl3DsLDiFIj42-r-V4yHGPi2pGIjolRMqpDiypwsGH3GEridYt7ENzoAe0O7jE8kP543rfImGRTc6s)
[[Source: _New York Times_] ](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ee6481deac7946a8a755dc856ebbf672&_e=0ZBHaG0CO68etY0JIB4jElWT8OcfL40E3a2WDo3d3bsKVn_IJI0ri_ESl6s1-qPbv-7GN8tkOE-2m_0L_1Izw7j9Hcfp4zBfKLi6fMOeOfRpi7lhQuI3ZRCuZSKF5_l69jvmN2PVu_w2NF1QU_P_3GnweizG04qKk2SxA8alXSt6DkH9USJGiu_ZA3N_5GTPOQQaOzSFAdFBmPKceUhmzUXlUgQEGJ5sBR1_FnosDqXnMOobDuVxa2_XkzxxcPJPRJiIVXqhyFs29jV0VfzfD2sWfgnpVsnqsurAVVE8fLi9hDiwLVh796N1IiXctkHjqG0SN8eP2QKQccJjxbd5sgjBd3Vms-92j2LN9As6jqJytq4xmdVXTV_AAc7rEXzD0PgM1AXG1PrfoKRqfqEsyU30Y34PeN61ZdcPl0UdDzwolE1qO7t0BHXXouzFC444I9UUYwnDRLskhDifxCYykD2rsIOQZX7WclPNJIUcIAb_8HKa08B9VIfl4mGxkea6)

clean_body: As I depart the courthouse, I hope you’ll read the letter I wrote for you.| | | | | Patriot, After just testifying, I certainly have a lot to say, but it all comes from the heart. Never in a million years did I think this is what would become of the country that I’ve loved so dearly my entire life. America has descended into utter tyranny. Right before our very eyes, our once beautiful Republic is being transformed into a Marxist tin-pot dictatorship where Crooked Joe’s regime has weaponized the legal system against not only a former president (your favorite, I might add),****but against the very citizens he swore an oath to protect. And today, it saddens me to say that there is truly nothing less American than what you just witnessed... I was forced to take the stand in a SHAM TRIAL to defend my livelihood, my incredible business, and my family from what is being called the “corporate death penalty.” Make no mistake this has nothing to do with justice, fairness, or the rule of law. In fact, the Radical Democrats can’t even identify a “victim” in this fabricated “case” against me. This is nothing more than Crooked Joe’s latest act of ELECTION INTERFERENCE! And the ONLY REASON I was forced into the courtroom and onto the witness stand today, is because it meant I was consequently forced OFF the campaign trail at a time when we are WINNING like never before: [[Source: New York Times] ]() If you ever wondered what TRUE desperation looks like for Crooked Joe and the Democrats, this is it. And I hope that above all else, my testimony today served as a reminder for patriots like YOU that I will NEVER ,EVER __SURRENDER our country to their tyranny. If you’re struggling right now due to the tyrannical Crook currently occupying the White House, then please don’t donate. I mean it! I want you to take care of your family and yourself first. But if you can contribute, God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Team Gallego
subject: We need you to pay attention to this:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
A promise of reprisals from Trump against his political enemies on the first day of his second term.
#

Peter, take a look at this:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231106-2-f&t=1&akid=1415%2E734936%2EPJW3ki)
That’s the promise of a Trump presidency. A dictatorship on day one.
We try not to pay too much attention to polls this far out. Some days you’re up, some days you’re down.
What we do pay attention to is things like that tweet: a promise of reprisals from Trump against his political enemies on the first day of his second term.
And from the people who support him most — people like Kari Lake — we pay attention to things like this.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231106-2-f&t=2&akid=1415%2E734936%2EPJW3ki)
We pay attention to things like this.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231106-2-f&t=3&akid=1415%2E734936%2EPJW3ki)
We take them at their word.
At any other time, victory for Ruben Gallego in Arizona would be vitally important simply because it is essential to holding control in the Senate. But it’s so much bigger than that now.
So we need you to chip in $10.
$10 to win in Arizona and protect our democracy.
$10 to defeat Kari Lake and keep a dangerous “MAGA Queen” out of the Senate.
And $10 because if we can beat Kari Lake in Arizona, we can beat her hero Donald Trump, too.
It might not seem like your $10 can do all that, but it isn’t just you. By the time you read this, a ton of people have already put in their $10. We need you to join them.
So please, Peter: [**Make that $10 donation today. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. To win, we need as many of our strongest supporters with us as we can possibly get.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231106-2-f&t=4&akid=1415%2E734936%2EPJW3ki)
[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231106-2-f&t=5&akid=1415%2E734936%2EPJW3ki)
Thank you.
Team Gallego

Is human cognition an emerging domain of warfare?

# [Havana Syndrome, Neurostrike, and Brain Warfare](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138607822&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjA3ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTkzMTE2NzUsImV4cCI6MTcwMTkwMzY3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CI09DYUeLn6yIfQ8cg4gdS0N7suq_xjMlLfYRlLyxCM)
### Is human cognition an emerging domain of warfare?
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/redirect/2bff5ef0-680d-4e64-8154-a188af77e8d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Nov 6

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bff5ef0-680d-4e64-8154-a188af77e8d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138607822&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjA3ODIyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5OTMxMTY3NSwiZXhwIjoxNzAxOTAzNjc1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nKgUVi4rHC4p-t8SUf_tza95GXdF6Rw8elyroCDfhKE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138607822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjA3ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTkzMTE2NzUsImV4cCI6MTcwMTkwMzY3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CI09DYUeLn6yIfQ8cg4gdS0N7suq_xjMlLfYRlLyxCM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138607822&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NjA3ODIyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTkzMTE2NzUsImV4cCI6MTcwMTkwMzY3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CI09DYUeLn6yIfQ8cg4gdS0N7suq_xjMlLfYRlLyxCM)
---
| | [](https://substack..1_R-qSpq0kMrThxDfUOpDOdSjLi5eh3ar3ggvzgHPFM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/havana-syndrome-neurostrike-and-brain?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/de8ede5a-4342-470e-888c-d14c85016483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 2016, American personnel and their families stationed at the US Embassy in Havana, Cuba reported the rapid onset of unusual and concerning symptoms. More than 1000 individuals complained of loud noise, suffered from ear pain, and felt intense pressure on their head. Other symptoms included feeling dizzy, visual problems, and cognitive 'fog." Given the geography of the first reports, the "illnesses" quickly became known as "Havana Syndrome." Many worried it was the emergence of a new energy weapon targeting the brain; others dismissed such theories while noting the enormous stress placed on embassy personnel.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24da8818-1867-4b8d-8d41-90bdaf54a04e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Soure: [https://www.health.com/condition/rare-disorders/what-is-havana-syndrome](https://substack.com/redirect/98697a0d-fb2e-4c34-a21e-e50845df127c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Interestingly, it was later reported that diplomatic personnel at the Canadian Embassy in Havana suffered similar symptoms](https://substack.com/redirect/25ebbbfe-00b1-43e0-9149-f98427bc7137?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But reports were not constrained to Cuba. [The mysterious "disease" also reared its head in Guangzhou, China and led to the evacuation of dozens of US diplomats](https://substack.com/redirect/25dfe9da-71b5-4be0-a02d-150fbad293cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and _[The New Yorker](https://substack.com/redirect/1ab1af48-fd3b-42fb-be46-9e47b375ccd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ described Vienna, Austria as the "new Havana Syndrome hot spot" when approximately two dozen American diplomats complained of rapid onset symptoms](https://substack.com/redirect/1ab1af48-fd3b-42fb-be46-9e47b375ccd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And in March 2023, the _Wall Street Journal_ noted
> _[Diplomats and intelligence personnel in Russia, Poland, Georgia, Serbia, Vietnam, India, Colombia, France, Switzerland and Taiwan have also reportedly been affected. A number of U.S. officials stationed in Washington claim to have been affected, including one who was reportedly struck while near the White House.](https://substack.com/redirect/dfbd941d-9fab-4bcb-9031-11e852079a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/dfbd941d-9fab-4bcb-9031-11e852079a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..uRbZ4vYdNIOEiOsLYyw2PJnS23yP-x19PuSSENZZFKE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138607822)
The US Department of State was so concerned about these reports that it asked the National Academies of Sciences, Engineering and Medicine to explore possible causes of these symptoms. A committee was formed and "[considered the possibilities of directed, pulsed radio frequency energy, chemical exposures, infectious diseases such as Zika, and psychological issues."](https://substack.com/redirect/7017fce5-9082-460b-b6a2-9608757ed8fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The National Academies issued their findings in a December 2020 report that concluded "pulsed radio frequency energy appears to be the most plausible mechanism" to explain what happened, even if the committee "could not rule out other possible mechanisms."](https://substack.com/redirect/4fbe8b5d-a442-49a6-8475-9c675b91201d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [A later report, however, released by the US Central Intelligence Agency found that "A majority of the 1,000 cases reported to the government can be explained by environmental causes, undiagnosed medical conditions or stress, rather than a ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdca4377-065c-43c7-ab6e-68733fa279b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[sustained global campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/fdca4377-065c-43c7-ab6e-68733fa279b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ by a foreign power," according to the ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdca4377-065c-43c7-ab6e-68733fa279b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/fdca4377-065c-43c7-ab6e-68733fa279b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ (emphasis added). What if it was a test of a new weapon, rather than a "sustained global campaign"?
With significant confusion and uncertainty around the analysis, it's hard to definitively conclude anything. Nevertheless, I'm skeptical that government reports would ever publicly acknowledge that America's been the target or successful brain-altering attacks. What do you think?
| | POLL
---
What do you think is the cause of the unexplained health anomalies known as "Havana Syndrome"?
| [Pulsed energy attacks](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.3-KGQIMnR5S-lI6emgTvImIeo53ZcPaw5QL4mxCKacI?)
---
[Other medical conditions](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.lpdxc1NXXd0Pr_Cs8Xr010kirWCVT3sUV73pOm4sTEs?)
[Other environmental issues](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.ZZHSzLUs1at2pcuaXQ-atbmxMrjcSehJwioVGNPXCYo?)
[No idea!](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.4Bedkinmze4lApyke0vlnV0ZYRW2hjuMvqeE0IrduUU?)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..uRbZ4vYdNIOEiOsLYyw2PJnS23yP-x19PuSSENZZFKE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138607822)
I also found it quite curious that [the Director of National Intelligence Avril Haines declassified a report in 2022 that concluded "pulsed electromagnetic energy, particularly in the radiofrequency range, plausibly explains the core characteristics"](https://substack.com/redirect/b22cf253-4d46-4e05-9563-e5335496a510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the unusual health symptoms. Further, Director Haines issued an updated assessment in 2023 that [concluded it was "very unlikely a foreign adversary is responsible](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ec0bc3-77f1-49cf-819b-c01f6fd3913f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." So if Havana syndrome is being caused by pulsed energy, but is not a weapon being tested by an adversary, why is it only happening in certain geographies to certain people? What do you think?
| | POLL
---
Do you believe a foreign adversary is testing a new weapon?
| [Yes, not coincidental](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.uDShMxH3N_DPr69hsrQNpSoH1X7FlIVaHVEpWzEZ6RI?)
---
[Probably, but not certain](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.pgXcPt0odBAyAhvUYgbKp0GSLnrataMNSKpuXoWG01k?)
[No, conspiracy theory ](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.3ZskeOX3TFwUes_zExMWoJ3D7NVxX-ue1L8AJsXlFGY?)
[No idea!](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.xsdAGLltnriKTzMtGjKrVw_d-VAofQnSSYBKHOh9sFU?)
If there is a connection between Havana syndrome and foreign adversaries, how and where might we find out about it? As luck would have it, three open source intelligence analysts formed the CCP Biothreats Initiative and recently penned a 12 pages report about this very link:
> **[Unknown to many, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and its People's Liberation Army (PLA) have established themselves as world leaders in the development of NeuroStrike weapons. These platforms directly attack, or even control, mammalian brains (including humans) with microwave/directed energy weapons via standalone platforms (i.e., handheld gun) or the broader electromagnetic spectrum.](https://substack.com/redirect/68e68464-d04f-42d6-b8e4-2186a5a7e8b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
It's also important to note that Chinese efforts to target the brain and human cognition go well beyond the concept of a potential Havana-Syndrome-inducing capability. The CCP Biothreats team goes on to explicitly note "["...CCP's weaponization of neuroscience extends well beyond the scope and understanding of classical microwave weapons. Their new landscape of NeuroStrike development includes using massively distributed human-computer interfaces to control entire populations as well as a range of weapons designed to cause cognitive damage."](https://substack.com/redirect/78a0ef13-8f3b-4f06-8c62-c284aba7105e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So what exactly is "Neurostrike"? According to a _Washington Times_ article exploring China's development of these technologies, "[neurostrike is a military term defined as the engineered targeting of the brains of military personnel or civilians using non kinetic technology. The goal is to impair thinking, reduce situational awareness, inflict long-term neurological damage, and cloud normal cognitive function.](https://substack.com/redirect/acf6aebf-555d-4774-8f1b-4a2985eef58d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Lest we think the US government is unaware or ignorant of these risks, it's worth noting the US Department of Commerce in 2021 imposed sanctions on 12 Chinese entities that were using _["biotechnology processes to support Chinese military end-uses and end-users, to include purported brain-control weaponry." ](https://substack.com/redirect/acf6aebf-555d-4774-8f1b-4a2985eef58d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Unsurprisingly, these sanctions were focused on China's Academy of Military Medical Sciences and have not be the subject of public studies or discussions. [The only public figure to appropriately highlight the risk of China's efforts in brain-control weaponry is Nikki Haley, who has used her presidential campaign to shine a spotlight upon Chinese neuro-technological efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/869f09b9-693a-4ef9-8254-0a8b032440ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..uRbZ4vYdNIOEiOsLYyw2PJnS23yP-x19PuSSENZZFKE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138607822)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f27851bb-1aca-45dc-b841-094214af151d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Academy of Military Medical Sciences. Source: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academy_of_Military_Medical_Sciences](https://substack.com/redirect/ba580773-e989-4a66-b3c2-c7d9efcc7b5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The US-China War is intensifying every day. Technological competition, in combination with military rivalry, is leading to new weaponry and domains of conflict. This is, of course, not a new concept and was a hallmark of the Cold War. [Edl Schamiloglu, a Distinguished Professor at the University of Mexico who spent decades working on high power microwaves with the US Department of Defense, wrote a piece that described the Cold War origins of directed pulsed power weapons](https://substack.com/redirect/82e1dfbf-3c0a-4e77-90c7-874990ae11be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He recalls how the development of the technology led to a "microwave power derby" between the US and Soviet Union. A pulsed energy race, he notes, is again under way with Chinese investment dwarfing the "dozens of countries" pursuing similar programs. Professor Schamiloglu bluntly states that the "the Russians and the Chinese certainly possess the capabilities of fielding high-power microwave sources."
All signs point to the emergence of a new class of weapons targeting human cognition. Just as cyber attacks disrupt the "brains" behind the technology that powers our lives, so too are neurostrike weapons targeting the software and neural networks that enable our decision-making. As much as we might want to (protectively) put our heads in the sand, it's critical we start thinking about the forthcoming brain wars on human cognition and their mind-blowing implications.
| | POLL
---
What do you think about Dr. Mansharamani's piece "Havana Syndrome, Neurostrike, and Brain Wars"?
| [Thought-provoking and useful](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.vkYQSgysa5nagN7ZYFLjW2dzfq3BUhlWoR4Faar-13A?)

Is human cognition an emerging domain of warfare? | | | Nov 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- In 2016, American personnel and their families stationed at the US Embassy in Havana, Cuba reported the rapid onset of unusual and concerning symptoms. More than 1000 individuals complained of loud noise, suffered from ear pain, and felt intense pressure on their head. Other symptoms included feeling dizzy, visual problems, and cognitive 'fog." Given the geography of the first reports, the "illnesses" quickly became known as "Havana Syndrome." Many worried it was the emergence of a new energy weapon targeting the brain; others dismissed such theories while noting the enormous stress placed on embassy personnel. | | ---|---|--- Soure: . But reports were not constrained to Cuba. and . And in March 2023, the Wall Street Journal noted The US Department of State was so concerned about these reports that it asked the National Academies of Sciences, Engineering and Medicine to explore possible causes of these symptoms. A committee was formed and " (emphasis added). What if it was a test of a new weapon, rather than a "sustained global campaign"? With significant confusion and uncertainty around the analysis, it's hard to definitively conclude anything. Nevertheless, I'm skeptical that government reports would ever publicly acknowledge that America's been the target or successful brain-altering attacks. **_FIRST_**** _,_** she became the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York’s attorney general – and she wasted no time going toe to toe with the most powerful and corrupt forces in the _nation_. She took gun manufacturers and sellers, Big Pharma, predatory landlords, and more to court – all so she could be a voice for the voiceless.

**_THEN_**** _,_** she ran for re-election – and you were right there with her every step of the way. You helped her defeat her well-funded, far-right opponent and _make history once again_ as the first Black woman ever to be re-elected to the office.

**_NOW_**** _,_** she’s continuing her fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, climate change, voting rights, and MORE – but she needs to know if you’re still on this team.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: One last note before Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Since I first announced my candidacy for Kentucky governor more than five years ago, I never could have imagined where we would end up. Hey Peter – I want to reach out one last time before Election Day.

Since I first announced my candidacy for Kentucky governor more than five years ago, I never could have imagined where we would end up.

I ran for governor in 2019 because I knew Kentuckians deserved a leader who wasn't afraid to put partisan politics aside to do what's best for our Commonwealth. One who knew we needed to move Kentucky not to the left or the right, but forward.

We faced an uphill battle, but thanks to overwhelming support from Kentuckians across the Commonwealth – we were able to win in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes. And since the day I was sworn into office, I have fought nonstop to make good on my campaign promise to make progress for every Kentuckian.

We've accomplished a lot together, Peter. Thousands of new jobs have been brought to the Commonwealth, we've invested in our infrastructure, helped families rebuild after devastating natural disasters, and so much more. We have come so far, but the road ahead of us is still long.

That's why I'm hoping I can count on your support tomorrow. If we're going to defeat Daniel Cameron and his super PAC allies, we need to all make our voices heard at the ballot box and send a message that we're ready to continue our progress.

[**If you're ready to join me in the fight to continue moving Kentucky forward, please consider chipping in one last time to my re-election campaign to help ensure my team and I have the resources to get out the vote tomorrow.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72916255/436793127/368185137?refcode=em23_231106_fnalfr_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231106_fnalfr_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ea6822a3-f87c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTY4MjJhMy1mODdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=15kaH6w0Rvtj-4r350ei8Y84Sk8onDCu0nVq-XfdAWI=)

Let's do this,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72916257/436793128/368185137?refcode=em23_231106_fnalfr_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231106_fnalfr_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ea6822a3-f87c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTY4MjJhMy1mODdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=15kaH6w0Rvtj-4r350ei8Y84Sk8onDCu0nVq-XfdAWI=)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: An inflection point in our Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Friend --
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important moment in our Senate campaign: Former one-term Congressman Peter Meijer entered the Republican primary today, making for a third serious candidate in that primary. You can read more about Peter Meijer and how, despite his vote to impeach Trump in 2020 in his first week on the job, he thereafter supported extreme, party-line positions that don’t align with Michigan voters in our note below.
But here's one thing we cannot lose sight of: Meijer self-funded his previous races for Congress -- to the tune of $1.6 million for his House races -- and, given his family’s significant wealth, has the ability to self-fund even more in this Senate race. **He’s even copied his family’s grocery store logo from the mid 80s through the early 2000s as his official campaign logo – a nod to his family’s wealth and influence across the state.**
Meijer may have his own personal fortune, but we have lots of people who are prepared to come together to send Elissa to the Senate. And right now Elissa is relying on a large number of grassroots contributions to build a winning campaign and defend this seat next year.
Emails like this are the number one source of those contributions, that’s why we’re asking: **[Can you make a contribution of $3-- or whatever you can afford -- to Elissa's campaign for Senate today? It's important that we show we have the resources to defend this seat for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-2-30&t=1&akid=776%2E135344%2Eqv43VI)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin
\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: ElissaSlotkin.org
Subject: Rep. Peter Meijer just entered the Michigan Senate race
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-2-30&t=2&akid=776%2E135344%2Eqv43VI)

Friend --
BIG news today in the Michigan Senate race: As of this morning, former U.S. Representative Peter Meijer, Republican from Grand Rapids, has officially entered the race.
**Meijer, of the well-known Michigan-based Meijer Grocery Store family, self-funded his previous races for Congress, to the tune of $1.6 million and has the ability to self-fund even more in this Senate race.** **[CONTRIBUTE NOW →](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-2-30&t=3&akid=776%2E135344%2Eqv43VI)**
This means that the Republican primary just got more crowded: Meijer is the third credible candidate to enter in the past 8 weeks, joining former Congressman Mike Rogers and former Detroit Chief of Police James Craig. It’s clear this three-way battle will pull the field to the most extreme elements in the GOP: We have already witnessed Rogers selling out his former colleagues at the FBI (in week two in the race) to earn Donald Trump and his supporters’ votes, and seen James Craig go on Steve Bannon’s podcast in the hope of currying Trump’s endorsement. We should expect Peter Meijer to similarly make healthy nods to the extreme base of the party to have a chance in the primary in August.
While many will remember Peter for his early vote to impeach Trump in 2020, the reality is that he spent the next two years making up for that impeachment vote by taking extreme and party-line positions well outside of the mainstream in Michigan. Here on Team Slotkin, we do our homework, and here’s what you should know about Peter Meijer’s record, and where he stands on the issues:
He has said publicly that he supports a federal ban on abortion and has campaigned on being “100% pro-life” -- even in cases of rape or incest. Meijer voted against legislation that would ensure women have better access to contraceptives.
He has stood against workers by vocally supporting right-to-work and other anti-union legislation. Meijer is from one of the wealthiest families in America, one of the 9 billionaire families in Michigan, so it is no surprise that he also supports tax cuts for the rich -- including publicly supporting the 2017 Trump tax law which was the largest giveaway to the ultra-wealthy and richest corporations in our country’s history.
**Not surprisingly, during his campaigns for Congress, he took over $100,000 from the DeVos family, likely because he supports their crusade to destroy public education in America -- and for his support for Trump’s tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. **
This is a big moment of inflection in the campaign. We have the full range of voices in the Republican Party -- so it’s time for our campaign to show we have what it takes to compete and win in Michigan, and it’s why we’re asking for your support to continue building the kind of campaign we’ll need to WIN. **[Will you make a donation now? Every contribution in these first 24 hours following this announcement will help us send a clear message about the strength of our campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231106-2-30&t=4&akid=776%2E135344%2Eqv43VI)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3eWQbG&refcode=em231106-2-30&t=23&akid=776%2E135344%2Eqv43VI)**

Team Slotkin

Please listen carefully:

Democrats control the Senate and they control the White House. If they manage to flip JUST a handful of House seats, they'll take complete control.

_**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=25c07e429a484c2a8597b1b76777117c&_e=m-6q5rLVaeiWRwqUcpNgwI4PQY0Gw7m_QVwPhFG-38jAQbrFy1Nniiyjz5_OqmUZebx2__5Els-PKWGgVHNQGwRqhY_6yxAPPV3CE88TbwG-plUgC_LlEsAu1Lgb2W2urXBEg8RnWlu553Vjtnx-oHIzPRJWr2OjySAhLahTNkNz9CO72uQ93M9PfJDQQ56tllEr_byYYfp-7h5WU6hnVcjsPF4ly7WcOaD_00Z9rWBgepSFrSRO1ut7StzBz6jS7TDL6c6sRGO-odDPuGeEnS83S7zH7GCG7DL4UBZlipcpuDWLNWRogNBzfKq-hwxMCN3wrzI03O5HUTnzzuEaStpcWZx0pPfnI973_VuIZ-CM5NnVjCMuuwWMvVlLkXxnZWOR2cyb0Z-OTeQhkU_LxQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for help.")**_

**You know what would happen if Democrats take control of the House: our strong border security bill will come to a SCREECHING HALT, our plan to secure our elections will be SCRAPPED, we will LOSE subpoena power, Liberals will TAKE OVER all House committees, and our impeachment inquiry will go UP IN FLAMES ... **

That is, unless Conservatives everywhere rise to the occasion and come together right now.

The first Special Election is imminent. Democrat fundraising is surging. And our House Majority hangs in the balance.

_Are you ready to meet this moment and step up? I hope so. _

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

Peter, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. **Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans._If you are, I’m asking for you to send us _just_ $5 right now_.**
---
[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b87d8a1f82484cf8b3bf2b3a657299c8&_e=X0xpziT0wYCB41T2sJ1ursjNRh-YU3ZrRIc9pe3zldqlR-vi4Z6IfEtN44PqGdx5JN7L04nS2Kx6p5lYZrh2wq5ZiRsRlknmyXti6RlOww0rmxwZ-_Rnf0CPBGh7Bof6zfvtLxAyZKlEFZy5VH7ZPXDVl1_XxXO0qYip6EfhpdvQFftQ0f6Aa3hvhbWHonJuMqmLuVQz9Ce0MvWQJ__E15AZ94wEPzPkt2e98sG8709weWzcSwynvSxrucCbalR3DmTTNbkf4ZWlKjolLkp1Gwh7x8ILUawr955xG9hlEKhVGbVqiUeGrqYnYBtHNG4XSK-eDxnmN2X4WhF0Sb62Xfwo2d3EsaCAD6yAJGHyx1nmR5WH2BLu-GcPtgVSeUKolZLC1b1GE1qpOU8xDbChLNSAx4n1Cj0OzJSgB7G6wB58bthoVBNEggUdSM90j7OU9yjFkYr7S2_WzjXiB2UITqdbx9Odb3ru7HKGoh3SIpr4oZGtOteuCStbo-acKgfB)

name: Gloria Cazares via Team Roland
subject: My life changed forever on May 24, 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=YZbQ4%2BUMqT%2B0i09g3384yNRcvyBrAReeoHg2WY1To%2BVbW9Gth53YlrJku5nra47lMx436tzBRNZCds6XQA22WB65poVPaDtszIRiDSJuum8YstvLw07YgLOwDJO7USrPCBLROlUqge%2FugOabqB77b6gh7p89fHYPx9Tz8s%2BAFd3pp24FgUMildTtoxHfPL1OSr7UfPT5H0mRRU5TWuy8ERRIoNZ%2BUOCl6aoHG0y2djxHSHCvVtl9bhOH0TzhG8syMhCC53rDYdgmZN6Bz1wL8wF9ityJkcl020jX%2Byxu4Y2L8Vz6%2BNHv8L2QamKo40B53GpIHbphCSRcZ0GSXZ9xiZl2pfwP11htDQI1znuRD3sGDudU6drY0vXS1n51SIbjIU9IIV%2FI96oS7Ta1mBOvjkRWuu4g8cIWyDEt2aaPmkUeEC6pox2Q5N5Bz44f%2FjVs .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Hi, Peter. My name is Gloria Cazares.
On May 24, 2022, I lost one of the most important people in my life.
My daughter, Jackie, was among the 19 children and two teachers killed by a gunman at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde.
While the chaos and pain of that day is indescribable, I knew I had to channel my grief into action — and so did my state senator, Roland Gutierrez.
In the days after Jackie’s death, Roland dedicated himself to supporting families like mine, investigating the tragedy at Robb Elementary School, and changing the loose gun laws that led to this massacre.
But our governor refused to act. And our U.S. Senator, Ted Cruz, didn’t lift a finger to support our grieving community.
That’s why I’m proud to support Roland Gutierrez in this race, Peter. I’ve seen firsthand his commitment to this fight, and I know he has what it takes to win — but he needs our help. So please, Peter: Will you join me in supporting Roland with a contribution of $10 or more straight away? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Our household is no stranger to guns, Peter.
My husband, like so many families in our community, has a license to carry.
But after losing our daughter and her classmates in that terrible tragedy, we knew in our hearts that we could not sit by and let this happen again.
We knew we had to fight for kids like Jackie until the day we died.
And Roland promised he’d be right there with us, fighting to fix Texas’s broken gun laws and showing us how to organize for a better, safer future.
As a parent, nothing is more important than the safety of our kids.
I know. Roland knows.
That’s why I’m supporting him in this campaign.
And that’s why I’m asking you to join me. Please, Peter: Will you chip in $10, $15, or $25 to help me bring Roland’s leadership to Washington and finally end the gun violence that plagues our communities? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you for joining me in this fight,
Gloria Cazares
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Are you registered to vote in the 2024 Republican Presidential Primary? 2. Will you be watching the third Presidential Debate? 3. What question or topic do you want to see the candidates and myself debate? | - The truth is, right now I am the only presidential candidate with a plan for the issues facing America today. From reviving our national identity to unleashing our economy and declaring economic independence from communist China, to preventing World War III, my vision is focused on national revival, not a national divorce. Together, we can take America First to the next level. [_**Tomorrow is Election Day, so I want to tell you a little bit about myself and then ask you to split a donation between me and Future Forum PAC to help us make history together.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72917258/436796802/-359839058?&refcode=E4833-20231106-GabeAmoSurrogate-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZTA0ODFlLWZjN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OtMnUIJeV4eeRPCy7v5DoLriFr4CnmCTBARKHLK8INs=) Growing up in Pawtucket, Rhode Island as the working class son of Ghanaian and Liberian immigrants, I knew I wanted to do big things to help people. I had the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to work in the Obama White House, where I had the experience of working on important issues like healthcare. Then I served under Governor Gina Raimondo in the State House, and most recently, I was the primary liaison to state and local officials for President Biden. Now I’m running for Congress because the stakes have never been higher. We need a new generation of leaders who will stand up to extreme Republicans to protect reproductive freedom, fight to end gun violence, and defend Medicare and Social Security. [_**Election Day is tomorrow! So, can I count on you to split a critical last-minute donation with me and Future Forum PAC to help us get out the vote and win this special election?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72917259/436796803/-359839058?&refcode=E4833-20231106-GabeAmoSurrogate-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZTA0ODFlLWZjN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OtMnUIJeV4eeRPCy7v5DoLriFr4CnmCTBARKHLK8INs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72917260/436796804/-359839058?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4833-20231106-GabeAmoSurrogate-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZTA0ODFlLWZjN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OtMnUIJeV4eeRPCy7v5DoLriFr4CnmCTBARKHLK8INs=) | [$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72917261/436796805/-359839058?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4833-20231106-GabeAmoSurrogate-EG-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZTA0ODFlLWZjN2MtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OtMnUIJeV4eeRPCy7v5DoLriFr4CnmCTBARKHLK8INs=)

The group I co-founded and co-led, Prosecutors Against Gun Violence, co-issued a report on how jurisdictions across America could do the same. And I had the honor of speaking at the Obama White House to policymakers from across the country about how laws like these can save lives. body:
**** As Speaker Mike Johnson and his MAGA Republican caucus push their far-right agenda in the House, they’re proving to the American people that division and extremism are all we can expect while they hold power.

Conversely, restoring a Democratic majority means creating a safer, more prosperous future for _all_ Americans.

Year after year, we’ve seen GOP special interest dollars target the Philadelphia suburbs – including Mad’s district in Montgomery and Berks Counties. That’s why we’re building the early infrastructure we’ll need to fight back against the forthcoming attacks. **We are preparing for 2024 by activating as many $24 donors as possible –[will you be one of them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917344/436797176/-2127077206?amount=24&refcode=11062023_md_oneyearout_fr_2&refcode2=066d9368-fc7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZkOTM2OC1mYzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ul5Oj3l9ic8T1PgN7n5yFeALGKEyDnjBS-wNAAR6OEM=)** | | [ **DONATE $24** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917345/436797177/-2127077206?amount=24&refcode=11062023_md_oneyearout_fr_2&refcode2=066d9368-fc7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZkOTM2OC1mYzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ul5Oj3l9ic8T1PgN7n5yFeALGKEyDnjBS-wNAAR6OEM=)

Cole

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. # **INFLATION WARNING!!!**
---
|
---
According to a recent letter to Berkshire Hathaway shareholders...
---
| | **“Billionaire Investment Guru Warren Buffett****issues stark inflation warning”
-_Daily Mail_**
---
| | Even huge asset management companies are sounding the alarm...
---
| | **“Markets Are Underestimating Inflation Again,****BlackRock and Fidelity Warn”** **-_Bloomberg_**
---
| | The new numbers have shown a comeback for inflation, **surging to its highest levels in six months** , and it’s now looking like there’s little chance our policy makers can put this cat back in the bag. That’s why it’s critical **you heed Warren’s Buffet’s advice and “brace yourself”** , before it’s too late. That means having a **comprehensive strategy to protect your savings and investments** from the devastating consequences of inflation. **Especially if you have retirement savings that may be at risk.** There may never be a better time to **protect your financial future** for you and your family than right now. body:
Please see this email with updated information on how to turn in your ballot tomorrow. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917554/436797937/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231106_info_GOTV_cand_kw_openers_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWYxNWUyOS1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5YJ1b_6Jr1toDj-HA39lV1y09fggWh05EMbYSHAMrY=)
---
Hey team - Earlier today, you received the email below about casting your ballot in tomorrow's critical elections. Our original email incorrectly indicated that voters could submit their mail-in ballots at their polling location. In order to vote by mail, [**return your mail-in ballot at an official drop box or at your County Board of Elections. ****Find your local ballot drop box here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917555/436797938/-797440119?emci=e9ba4009-f37c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWYxNWUyOS1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5YJ1b_6Jr1toDj-HA39lV1y09fggWh05EMbYSHAMrY=) If you have more questions about what to do with your mail-in ballot, [find out more here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917556/436797939/-514786513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWYxNWUyOS1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5YJ1b_6Jr1toDj-HA39lV1y09fggWh05EMbYSHAMrY=&emci=e9ba4009-f37c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8af15e29-fd7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323) Thanks, Team Ashley \---------------------------------------- We’re in the final sprint of the election, co-pilots! The future of our school boards, county commissions, state Supreme Court, and Superior Courts all hang in balance. So let's make sure everyone in PA makes their voice heard – please forward this info to every Pennsylvanian you know: **WHEN TO VOTE**
November 7
7am-8pm
_(if you are in line by 8pm you MUST be allowed to vote, so stay in line!)_ **WHERE TO VOTE**
[Confirm your polling place >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917557/436797940/88266837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWYxNWUyOS1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5YJ1b_6Jr1toDj-HA39lV1y09fggWh05EMbYSHAMrY=&emci=e9ba4009-f37c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8af15e29-fd7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323) **GOT A MAIL-IN BALLOT?**
Ballots must be returned by 8pm tomorrow (11/7), so drop it off at your local ballot drop box! **MORE QUESTIONS?**
Call 833-PAVOTES (that's 833-728-6837) There are some folks that campaigns just can't reach – but you can! **An email or text from you today really could be the difference between someone casting their vote or not.** Thanks for helping to get out the vote, Ashley _(P.S. It's really important to me that folks show up for every election, not just mine. But that does mean this is one less email dedicated to raising the money we'll need to win next year.[So after you've messaged your PA friends, can you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917558/436797941/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231106_info_GOTV_cand_kw_openers_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWYxNWUyOS1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5YJ1b_6Jr1toDj-HA39lV1y09fggWh05EMbYSHAMrY=))_ | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.
---

clean_body: Please see this email with updated information on how to turn in your ballot tomorrow. | = Hey team - Earlier today, you received the email below about casting your ballot in tomorrow's critical elections. Our original email incorrectly indicated that voters could submit their mail-in ballots at their polling location. In order to vote by mail, = If you have more questions about what to do with your mail-in ballot, Thanks, Team Ashley \---------------------------------------- We’re in the final sprint of the election, co-pilots! The future of our school boards, county commissions, state Supreme Court, and Superior Courts all hang in balance. So let's make sure everyone in PA makes their voice heard – please forward this info to every Pennsylvanian you know: WHEN TO VOTE November 7 7am-8pm (if you are in line by 8pm you MUST be allowed to vote, so stay in line!) WHERE TO VOTE GOT A MAIL-IN BALLOT? Ballots must be returned by 8pm tomorrow (11/7), so drop it off at your local ballot drop box! MORE QUESTIONS? Call 833-PAVOTES (that's 833-728-6837) There are some folks that campaigns just can't reach – but you can! An email or text from you today really could be the difference between someone casting their vote or not. Thanks for helping to get out the vote, Ashley (P.S. It's really important to me that folks show up for every election, not just mine. But that does mean this is one less email dedicated to raising the money we'll need to win next year.=) | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. The China, Russia, Iran, and North Korea axis pose a clear and present danger to America, and Joe Biden’s feckless leadership is making matters worse. That’s the thesis of my new op/ed, published in the conservative national publication Townhall: [https://townhall.com/columnists/gabe-evans/2023/11/04/the-clear-and-present-danger-under-joe-biden-and-how-to-fix-it-n2630770](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMDQxMzgwMzE3NTIwMjE0MTYsXCJyXCI6MTA0MTM4MDMzNTUwMzI5Mjc2fSIsInMiOiJlYzlhMzYxNjYwNWU0NjEyIn0). I hope you’ll take a moment to read it! The good news? Just as bad leadership and policy empowers bad actors, strong leadership and good policy can improve America’s standing in the world and promote peace and security. I lay out 5 policies to turn the tide. Who we elect matters! I want to put my experience as a Middle East combat veteran and former police officer to work for you. Together, we can make our streets safer at home and protect America’s interests on the international stage. [**_But I need your help to continue this fight. Democrats will spend millions of dollars to protect Joe Biden’s hand-picked congresswoman, Yadira Caraveo, in 2024_.**](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMDQxMzgwMzE3NTcyNjQyOTcsXCJyXCI6MTA0MTM4MDMzNTUwMzI5Mjc2fSIsInMiOiIzNTFkYzdhZDgxOGU2MjQ4In0) If you agree with my conclusions, and you are ready to shake up Washington with conservative change, would you consider [making a contribution](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMDQxMzgwMzE3NjE0NTg2MDIsXCJyXCI6MTA0MTM4MDMzNTUwMzI5Mjc2fSIsInMiOiJkMTcxYjliNjg4MmRjODc2In0) to my campaign today? I am so grateful to all of you who have invested in my campaign so far. Regards, Gabe P.S. Any amount helps![ **_Help me continue the fight to shake up Washington with new, conservative leadership_. **This includes placing _at least_ three yard signs at every polling place in Ohio.**

[**We're kicking off a GOTV Yard Sign Fund of $17,000 to place our final order of yard signs by MIDNIGHT. Will you chip in any amount to Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights and Emilia Sykes to help us put yard signs in front of every polling place in Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917571/436798012/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.06_b2_ourr_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJkNDI1NC1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijRAa3k8Q8nwbHbPqDrWs-xgWR8uPYd1xwfQ1NYnSTY=) | [**CHIP IN: PUT YARD SIGNS AT EVERY POLL >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917572/436798013/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.06_b2_ourr_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJkNDI1NC1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijRAa3k8Q8nwbHbPqDrWs-xgWR8uPYd1xwfQ1NYnSTY=)
