There are still Ohioans that are undecided on Issue 1, and will be undecided until the moment they walk into their polling place.

Studies have shown that physical displays of support (television ads, social media posts, and yes – yard signs!) add up and can be a deciding factor for how an individual votes. Essentially, a strong showing of grassroots support can make an enormous difference.

This election could come down to undecided voters on Election Day, and anti-abortion extremists know this too. They'll have plenty of yard signs at every poll, so we need to at least match them one-for-one.

[**Can you make a contribution of $10 or more to OURR and Emilia and help us put yard signs at every polling place in Ohio? Undecided voters will see our signs right before they vote, so it's crucial that we have a strong presence.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72917574/436798015/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.06_b2_ourr_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJkNDI1NC1mZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijRAa3k8Q8nwbHbPqDrWs-xgWR8uPYd1xwfQ1NYnSTY=)

Thank you for your help,

Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

clean_body: Peter, Election Day is tomorrow and we need to make sure that we have everything we need to secure a win for abortion rights. This includes placing at least three yard signs at every polling place in Ohio. = | = = There are still Ohioans that are undecided on Issue 1, and will be undecided until the moment they walk into their polling place. Studies have shown that physical displays of support (television ads, social media posts, and yes – yard signs!) add up and can be a deciding factor for how an individual votes. Essentially, a strong showing of grassroots support can make an enormous difference. This election could come down to undecided voters on Election Day, and anti-abortion extremists know this too. They'll have plenty of yard signs at every poll, so we need to at least match them one-for-one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your help, Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. body:
Hey Peter,

What a whirlwind! Since I announced my decision to run for MO-01, I've received an outpouring of support, from personal, heartfelt messages online to private phone calls and voicemails from people wanting to endorse my campaign.

I'm certain that my decision was the right one.

Growing up, my family had its ups and downs. But we were close and filled with love. And it's this love that has me looking to do better for St. Louisans. I'm running to challenge Cori Bush for the Democratic nomination in the U.S. House of Representatives for Missouri's 1st Congressional District.

After many conversations with St. Louisans who wanted more from their leadership, I'm stepping up to the plate and I'm ready to get to work fighting for the people of MO-01 in Congress.

[**I'm asking one more time: Will you join me in this new fight with a donation of $5 or more to get our campaign off the ground?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72918017/436799125/1029727644?refcode=em23_231106_launty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231106_launty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d5520012-ff7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU1MjAwMTItZmY3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-fxSP7gJ0EZTSrgo3SQL4WX6mYcBbA6L1vvNBKM1t4g=)

It's clear people are ready for a different kind of leadership in MO-01, so let's do it together.

Thank you,

Wesley Bell
| [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72918018/436799126/1029727644?refcode=em23_231106_launty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231106_launty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d5520012-ff7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDU1MjAwMTItZmY3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-fxSP7gJ0EZTSrgo3SQL4WX6mYcBbA6L1vvNBKM1t4g=)
